<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

The user is asking where they can find the page that renders at http://localhost:3000/login. This is a Next.js app (based on the project structure), so I need to find the login page/route.

In Next.js App Router, the route structure maps to the file system. So /login would typically be at:
- app/login/page.tsx
- app/login/page.js
- Or it could be under a route group like app/(auth)/login/page.tsx

Let me search for the login route in the codebase.
</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

I found it. The login page is at `packages/web/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx`. In Next.js App Router, route groups (folders in parentheses like `(auth)`) don't affect the URL path. So `app/(auth)/login/page.tsx` maps to the `/login` route.
</details></think>

---


The login page at `http://localhost:3000/login` is implemented in:

**`packages/web/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx`**

In the Next.js App Router, `(auth)` is a route group, so it doesn’t change the URL. That makes `app/(auth)/login/page.tsx` the `/login` route.

                {
                  "lineNumber": 3809,
                  "content": "The only way to get &lt;a&gt; inside Logo is from the Link at line 80. So that means when this error happens, we're in the branch &#96;if (href)&#96; and returning &lt;Link&gt;{logoContent}&lt;/Link&gt;. So href is truthy. So somewhere Logo is being used with href truthy (e.g. default '/') and that Logo is also wrapped by a parent &lt;Link&gt;. So the fix is: on signup, login, forgot-password, reset-password they're wrapping Logo in Link and passing href={undefined}. So Logo returns just the div. So the only way we get the error is if somewhere the code is not passing href={undefined}, so Logo uses default href='/', renders Link, and we get &lt;Link&gt;&lt;Link&gt;...&lt;/Link&gt;&lt;/Link&gt; = &lt;a&gt;&lt;a&gt;...&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/a&gt;."

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 23140,
                  "content": "The \"Back to home\" links on signup, login, forgot-password, reset-password already have display: 'inline-flex', alignItems: 'center', gap - so the icon and text should stay on one line. The issue the user reported was specifically the Button with \"Join as Founding Member\" where the arrow (or ChevronRight) was wrapping - and that's on the landing page (app/page.tsx). The DOM path they gave was \"a[0] &gt; button &gt; p\" - so Link &gt; Button &gt; Typography (p). The SVG was ending up with a different parent path in the \"changes to apply\" - so the hydration or DOM order was wrong. My fix to Button (using Typography as=\"span\" with inline-flex, gap, nowrap) should fix that so the icon stays next to the text inside the button."
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 23226,
                  "content": "- Auth “Back to home” links (signup, login, forgot-password, reset-password) already use &#96;display: 'inline-flex'&#96;, &#96;alignItems: 'center'&#96;, and &#96;gap&#96; on the &#96;&lt;Link&gt;&#96;, so they were left as-is.  "
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 23249,
                  "content": "3. **Spacing NaN fix**: Replaced spacing.xl * 2 (which was NaN because spacing.xl is '32px' string) with spacing.xxxl in signup, login, forgot-password, reset-password pages."
                }
              ]
            }

        },
        "contents": "export default function LoginPage() {\n\n          &lt;div\n            style={{\n              padding: spacing.xxxl,\n              borderRadius: borderRadius.xl,\n              background: colors.glass.opaque,\n              backdropFilter: 'blur(20px)',\n              WebkitBackdropFilter: 'blur(20px)',\n              border: &#96;1px solid ${colors.glass.border}&#96;,\n              boxShadow: &#96;0 16px 64px ${colors.mystical.glow}40&#96;,\n            }}\n          &gt;\n            &lt;form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)}&gt;\n              &lt;Typography variant=\"h2\" style={{ color: colors.text.primary, marginBottom: spacing.md, textAlign: 'center' }}&gt;\n                Sign In\n              &lt;/Typography&gt;\n\n              {message &amp;&amp; (\n                &lt;div\n                  style={{\n                    padding: spacing.md,\n                    borderRadius: borderRadius.md,\n                    background: &#96;${colors.success}20&#96;,\n                    border: &#96;1px solid ${colors.success}&#96;,\n                    marginBottom: spacing.lg,\n                  }}\n                &gt;\n                  &lt;Typography variant=\"body\" style={{ color: colors.success }}&gt;\n                    {message}\n                  &lt;/Typography&gt;\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n              )}\n\n              {error &amp;&amp; (\n                &lt;div\n                  style={{\n                    padding: spacing.md,\n                    borderRadius: borderRadius.md,\n                    background: &#96;${colors.error}20&#96;,\n                    border: &#96;1px solid ${colors.error}&#96;,\n                    marginBottom: spacing.lg,\n                  }}\n                &gt;\n                  &lt;Typography variant=\"body\" style={{ color: colors.error }}&gt;\n                    {error}\n                  &lt;/Typography&gt;\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n              )}\n\n              &lt;Controller\n                control={control}\n}",
        "signatures": {

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/01-roadmap.md",

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 279
          }
        },
        "contents": "**UI Checkpoint**: Component showcase screen showing all components\n\n---\n\n### Step 2.3: Create Layout Components\n**Goal**: Build layout structure for screens\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Screen wrapper component (handles safe areas, padding)\n- [ ] Header component (with back button, title, actions)\n- [ ] Tab bar component (custom styling)\n- [ ] Bottom sheet component (for modals)\n- [ ] Drawer component (if needed)\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- Layout components ready\n\n**Success Criteria**: Layout components work correctly\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See header and tab bar on all screens\n\n---\n\n### Step 2.4: Build Setup/Onboarding Page\n**Goal**: Create a beautiful setup page to verify design system\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Create welcome/setup screen\n- [ ] Use all design system elements\n- [ ] Add smooth animations (using react-native-reanimated)\n- [ ] Implement proper spacing and typography\n- [ ] Add illustrations or placeholder images\n- [ ] Make it responsive for different screen sizes\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- Beautiful setup page\n\n**Success Criteria**: Page looks professional and uses design system correctly\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See a polished setup/welcome page with all design elements\n\n---\n\n## Phase 3: Authentication System\n\n### Step 3.1: Build Login Screen\n**Goal**: Create functional login screen with validation\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design login screen UI\n- [ ] Add email and password inputs\n- [ ] Add form validation (email format, password requirements)\n- [ ] Add \"Forgot Password\" link\n- [ ] Add \"Sign Up\" link\n- [ ] Implement error message display\n- [ ] Add loading state during login\n- [ ] Connect to Supabase Auth\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- Working login screen\n\n**Success Criteria**: Can log in with valid credentials, see errors for invalid input\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: Beautiful login screen, can type, see validation errors, login works\n\n---\n\n### Step 3.2: Build Signup Screen\n**Goal**: Create signup flow with email verification\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design signup screen UI\n- [ ] Add all required fields (email, password, confirm password)\n- [ ] Add form validation\n- [ ] Add terms of service checkbox",

        "contents": "const styles = StyleSheet.create({\n  keyboardView: {\n    flex: 1,\n  },\n  scrollContent: {\n    flexGrow: 1,\n    justifyContent: 'center',\n    padding: spacing.xl,\n  },\n  container: {\n    flex: 1,\n    justifyContent: 'center',\n    maxWidth: 400,\n    width: '100%',\n    alignSelf: 'center',\n  },\n  header: {\n    alignItems: 'center',\n    marginBottom: spacing.xxl,\n  },\n  logo: {\n    fontSize: 48,\n    marginBottom: spacing.md,\n    textAlign: 'center',\n  },\n  subtitle: {\n    fontSize: 16,\n    textAlign: 'center',\n  },\n  card: {\n    padding: spacing.xl,\n    borderRadius: borderRadius.lg,\n  },\n  messageContainer: {\n    padding: spacing.md,\n    borderRadius: borderRadius.md,\n    borderWidth: 1,\n    marginBottom: spacing.md,\n  },\n  errorContainer: {\n    padding: spacing.md,\n    borderRadius: borderRadius.md,\n    borderWidth: 1,\n    marginBottom: spacing.md,\n  },\n  input: {\n    marginBottom: spacing.md,\n  },\n  loginButton: {\n    marginTop: spacing.md,\n    marginBottom: spacing.md,\n  },\n  forgotPasswordLink: {\n    alignItems: 'center',\n    marginTop: spacing.sm,\n  },\n  signupContainer: {\n    flexDirection: 'row',\n    justifyContent: 'center',\n    alignItems: 'center',\n    marginTop: spacing.xl,\n  },\n});",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/mobile/src/screens/auth/LoginScreen.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 16
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 177,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function LoginScreen({ navigation, route }: Props) {\n\n\n  return (\n    &lt;Screen scrollable padding={false}&gt;\n      &lt;KeyboardAvoidingView\n        behavior={Platform.OS === 'ios' ? 'padding' : 'height'}\n        style={styles.keyboardView}\n      &gt;\n        &lt;ScrollView\n          contentContainerStyle={styles.scrollContent}\n          keyboardShouldPersistTaps=\"handled\"\n          showsVerticalScrollIndicator={false}\n        &gt;\n          &lt;View style={styles.container}&gt;\n            {/* Header */}\n            &lt;View style={styles.header}&gt;\n              &lt;Typography\n                variant=\"h1\"\n                style={[\n                  styles.logo,\n                  {\n                    color: colors.text.primary,\n                    fontWeight: '300',\n                    letterSpacing: -2,\n                  },\n                ]}\n              &gt;\n                wa&lt;span style={{ color: colors.accent.tertiary }}&gt;Q&lt;/span&gt;up\n              &lt;/Typography&gt;\n              &lt;Typography variant=\"body\" style={[styles.subtitle, { color: colors.text.secondary }]}&gt;\n                Sign in to continue\n              &lt;/Typography&gt;\n            &lt;/View&gt;\n\n            {/* Login Form */}\n            &lt;Card variant=\"elevated\" style={[styles.card, { backgroundColor: colors.glass.opaque, borderColor: colors.glass.border }]}&gt;\n              {\n}",

        "contents": "'use client';\n\nimport React, { useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { useForm, Controller } from 'react-hook-form';\nimport { zodResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/zod';\nimport { useRouter, useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation';\nimport { Container, Typography, Button, Input } from '@/components';\nimport { useTheme } from '@/theme';\nimport { AnimatedBackground, Logo } from '@/components';\nimport { spacing, borderRadius } from '@/theme';\nimport { loginSchema } from '@waqup/shared/schemas';\nimport { useAuthStore } from '@/stores';\nimport { applyOverrideLogin } from '@/lib/auth-override';\nimport Link from 'next/link';\nimport { Mail, Lock, ArrowRight, Eye, EyeOff } from 'lucide-react';\nimport type { LoginFormData } from '@waqup/shared/schemas';\n\nexport default function LoginPage() {\n  const { theme } = useTheme();\n  const colors = theme.colors;\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams();\n  const { login, isLoading, error, setError } = useAuthStore();\n  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = React.useState(false);\n  const message = searchParams.get('message');\n\n  const {\n    control,\n    handleSubmit,\n    formState: { errors },\n  } = useForm&lt;LoginFormData&gt;({\n    resolver: zodResolver(loginSchema),\n    defaultValues: {\n      email: '',\n      password: '',\n    },\n  });\n\n  // Clear error when component mounts\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    return () =&gt; {\n      setError(null);\n    };\n  }, [setError]);\n\n  const onSubmit = async (data: LoginFormData) =&gt;\n;\n}",

        "contents": "export default function LoginScreen({ navigation, route }: Props) {\n\n              /&gt;\n\n              &lt;Controller\n                control={control}\n                name=\"password\"\n                render={({ field: { onChange, onBlur, value } }) =&gt; (\n                  &lt;Input\n                    label=\"Password\"\n                    placeholder=\"Enter your password\"\n                    secureTextEntry\n                    autoCapitalize=\"none\"\n                    autoComplete=\"password\"\n                    autoCorrect={false}\n                    value={value}\n                    onChangeText={onChange}\n                    onBlur={onBlur}\n                    error={errors.password?.message}\n                    containerStyle={styles.input}\n                  /&gt;\n                )}\n              /&gt;\n\n              &lt;Button\n                variant=\"primary\"\n                size=\"lg\"\n                fullWidth\n                loading={isLoading}\n                onPress={handleSubmit(onSubmit)}\n                style={styles.loginButton}\n              &gt;\n                Sign In\n              &lt;/Button&gt;\n\n              &lt;TouchableOpacity\n                onPress={() =&gt; navigation.navigate('ForgotPassword')}\n                style={styles.forgotPasswordLink}\n              &gt;\n                &lt;Typography variant=\"body\" style={{ color: colors.accent.tertiary }}&gt;\n                  Forgot Password?\n                &lt;/Typography&gt;\n              &lt;/TouchableOpacity&gt;\n            &lt;/Card&gt;\n\n            {/* Sign Up Link */}\n            &lt;View style={styles.signupContainer}&gt;\n              &lt;Typography variant=\"body\" style={{ color: colors.text.secondary }}&gt;\n                Don't have an account?{' '}\n              &lt;/Typography&gt;\n              &lt;TouchableOpacity onPress={() =&gt; navigation.navigate('Signup')}&gt;\n                &lt;Typography variant=\"bodyBold\" style={{ color: colors.accent.tertiary }}&gt;\n                  Sign Up\n                &lt;/Typography&gt;\n              &lt;/TouchableOpacity&gt;\n            &lt;/View&gt;\n          &lt;/View&gt;\n        &lt;/ScrollView&gt;\n      &lt;/KeyboardAvoidingView&gt;\n    &lt;/Screen&gt;\n  );\n}\n\nconst styles = StyleSheet.create({\n  keyboardView: {\n    flex: 1,\n  },\n;",

        "contents": "export default function LoginPage() {\n({ field: { onChange, onBlur, value } }) =&gt; (\n\n                )}\n              /&gt;\n\n              &lt;div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'flex-end', marginBottom: spacing.xl }}&gt;\n                &lt;Link\n                  href=\"/forgot-password\"\n                  style={{\n                    textDecoration: 'none',\n                    color: colors.accent.primary,\n                    fontSize: '14px',\n                    fontWeight: 500,\n                  }}\n                &gt;\n                  Forgot password?\n                &lt;/Link&gt;\n              &lt;/div&gt;\n\n              &lt;Button\n                type=\"submit\"\n                variant=\"primary\"\n                size=\"lg\"\n                loading={isLoading}\n                fullWidth\n                style={{\n                  background: colors.gradients.primary,\n                  marginBottom: spacing.lg,\n                  height: '52px',\n                  fontSize: '16px',\n                  fontWeight: 600,\n                }}\n              &gt;\n                {isLoading ? 'Signing in...' : 'Sign In'}\n              &lt;/Button&gt;\n\n              &lt;div style={{ textAlign: 'center', marginTop: spacing.lg }}&gt;\n                &lt;Typography variant=\"body\" style={{ color: colors.text.secondary }}&gt;\n                  Don't have an account?{' '}\n                  &lt;Link\n                    href=\"/signup\"\n                    style={{\n                      color: colors.accent.primary,\n                      textDecoration: 'none',\n                      fontWeight: 600,\n                    }}\n                  &gt;\n                    Sign up\n                  &lt;/Link&gt;\n                &lt;/Typography&gt;\n              &lt;/div&gt;\n            &lt;/form&gt;\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n\n          {/* Back to Home */}\n          &lt;div style={{ textAlign: 'center', marginTop: spacing.xl }}&gt;\n            &lt;Link\n              href=\"/\"\n}",

        "contents": "export default function LoginScreen({ navigation, route }: Props) {\n\n\n            {/* Login Form */}\n            &lt;Card variant=\"elevated\" style={[styles.card, { backgroundColor: colors.glass.opaque, borderColor: colors.glass.border }]}&gt;\n              {message &amp;&amp; (\n                &lt;View style={[styles.messageContainer, { backgroundColor: &#96;${colors.success}20&#96;, borderColor: colors.success }]}&gt;\n                  &lt;Typography variant=\"body\" style={{ color: colors.success }}&gt;\n                    {message}\n                  &lt;/Typography&gt;\n                &lt;/View&gt;\n              )}\n              {error &amp;&amp; (\n                &lt;View style={[styles.errorContainer, { backgroundColor: &#96;${colors.error}20&#96;, borderColor: colors.error }]}&gt;\n                  &lt;Typography variant=\"body\" style={{ color: colors.error }}&gt;\n                    {error}\n                  &lt;/Typography&gt;\n                &lt;/View&gt;\n              )}\n\n              &lt;Controller\n                control={control}\n                name=\"email\"\n                render={({ field: { onChange, onBlur, value } }) =&gt; (\n                  &lt;Input\n                    label=\"Email\"\n                    placeholder=\"Enter your email\"\n                    keyboardType=\"email-address\"\n                    autoCapitalize=\"none\"\n                    autoComplete=\"email\"\n                    autoCorrect={false}\n                    value={value}\n                    onChangeText={onChange}\n                    onBlur={onBlur}\n                    error={errors.email?.message}\n                    containerStyle={styles.input}\n                  /&gt;\n                )}\n              /&gt;\n\n              &lt;Controller\n                control={control}\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/01-roadmap.md",
        "range": {

        "contents": "- [ ] Install and configure React Navigation\n- [ ] Create navigation types (TypeScript)\n- [ ] Set up stack navigator for auth flow\n- [ ] Set up tab navigator for main app\n- [ ] Create placeholder screens for all routes:\n  - Auth: Login, Signup, ForgotPassword\n  - Main: Home (Sanctuary), Library, Create, Profile\n  - Content: Affirmations, Meditations, Rituals\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- Navigation structure in place\n- All routes accessible\n\n**Success Criteria**: Can navigate between all screens (empty screens)\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: Navigation bar visible, can tap between tabs, see empty screens\n\n---\n\n## Phase 2: Design System &amp; UI Foundation\n\n### Step 2.1: Create Design System\n**Goal**: Define colors, typography, spacing, and component styles\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Define color palette (primary, secondary, accent, background, text, error, success)\n- [ ] Define typography scale (headings, body, captions)\n- [ ] Define spacing system (4px, 8px, 16px, 24px, 32px, etc.)\n- [ ] Define border radius values\n- [ ] Define shadow/elevation system\n- [ ] Create theme configuration file\n- [ ] Set up dark mode support (if needed)\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- &#96;theme.ts&#96; or &#96;design-system.ts&#96; file\n- Color and typography constants\n\n**Success Criteria**: Theme system ready to use\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: No visible UI yet, but theme is defined\n\n---\n\n### Step 2.2: Build Core UI Components\n**Goal**: Create reusable UI components following design system\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Button component (primary, secondary, outline, text variants)\n- [ ] Input component (text, email, password, textarea)\n- [ ] Card component\n- [ ] Typography components (Heading, Body, Caption)\n- [ ] Loading/Spinner component\n- [ ] Icon component wrapper\n- [ ] Container/View wrapper components\n- [ ] Badge component\n- [ ] Progress indicator component\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- Component library in &#96;components/ui/&#96;\n- All components documented with props\n\n**Success Criteria**: All components render correctly with theme\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: Component showcase screen showing all components\n\n---",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/03-phase-03-authentication-system.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 138
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 221
          }
        },
        "contents": "### Step 3.1: Build Login Screen\n**Goal**: Create functional login screen with validation\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design login screen UI (using design system)\n- [ ] Add email and password inputs\n- [ ] Add form validation (email format, password requirements)\n- [ ] Add \"Forgot Password\" link\n- [ ] Add \"Sign Up\" link\n- [ ] Implement error message display\n- [ ] Add loading state during login\n- [ ] Connect to Supabase Auth\n\n**Code Changes**:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\n// src/screens/auth/LoginScreen.tsx\nexport const LoginScreen = () =&gt; {\n  const { login, isLoading, error } = useAuth();\n  // Form handling, validation, UI\n};\n\n// src/services/auth/authService.ts\nexport const login = async (email: string, password: string) =&gt; {\n  // Supabase auth call\n};\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Testing**:\n- [ ] Can log in with valid credentials\n- [ ] Shows errors for invalid input\n- [ ] Loading state works\n- [ ] Navigation works after login\n\n**Success Criteria**: \n- Can log in with valid credentials\n- See errors for invalid input\n- Loading states work\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: Beautiful login screen, can type, see validation errors, login works\n\n---\n\n### Step 3.2: Build Signup Screen\n**Goal**: Create signup flow with email verification\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design signup screen UI\n- [ ] Add all required fields (email, password, confirm password)\n- [ ] Add form validation\n- [ ] Add terms of service checkbox\n- [ ] Implement email verification flow\n- [ ] Add success message after signup\n- [ ] Connect to Supabase Auth\n\n**Code Changes**:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\n// src/screens/auth/SignupScreen.tsx\nexport const SignupScreen = () =&gt; {\n  // Signup form with validation\n};\n\n// Handle email verification\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Testing**:\n- [ ] Can create account\n- [ ] Validation works\n- [ ] Email verification sent\n- [ ] Success message shown\n\n**Success Criteria**: \n- Can create account\n- Receive verification email\n- Validation works\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: Signup screen works, can create account, see success message\n\n---\n\n### Step 3.3: Implement Auth State Management\n**Goal**: Manage authentication state across the app\n\n**Tasks**:",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "### Step 3.1: Build Login Screen",
            "lineNumber": 139

        "contents": "export default function LoginScreen({ navigation, route }: Props) {\n  const { theme } = useTheme();\n  const colors = theme.colors;\n  const { login, isLoading, error, setError } = useAuthStore();\n  const message = route.params?.message;\n\n  const {\n    control,\n    handleSubmit,\n    formState: { errors },\n  } = useForm&lt;LoginFormData&gt;({\n    resolver: zodResolver(loginSchema),\n    defaultValues: {\n      email: '',\n      password: '',\n    },\n  });\n\n  // Clear error when component mounts or when navigating away\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    return () =&gt; {\n      setError(null);\n    };\n  }, [setError]);\n\n  const onSubmit = async (data: LoginFormData) =&gt; {\n    setError(null);\n    const result = await login(data.email, data.password);\n    \n    if (result.success) {\n      // Navigation will happen automatically via RootNavigator auth state check\n    }\n    // Error is already set in the store\n  };\n\n  return (\n    &lt;Screen scrollable padding={false}&gt;\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/app/(auth)/forgot-password/page.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 16
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 249,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function ForgotPasswordPage() {\n\n\n      &lt;div style={{ position: 'relative', zIndex: 1, minHeight: '100vh', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', padding: spacing.xl }}&gt;\n        &lt;div style={{ width: '100%', maxWidth: '480px' }}&gt;\n          {/* Logo */}\n          &lt;div style={{ textAlign: 'center', marginBottom: spacing.xxxl }}&gt;\n            &lt;Link href=\"/\" style={{ textDecoration: 'none', display: 'inline-block' }}&gt;\n              &lt;Logo size=\"lg\" showIcon={false} href={undefined} /&gt;\n            &lt;/Link&gt;\n            &lt;Typography variant=\"body\" style={{ color: colors.text.secondary, fontSize: '18px', marginTop: spacing.md }}&gt;\n              Reset your password\n            &lt;/Typography&gt;\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n\n          {/* Forgot Password Form Card */}\n          &lt;div\n            style={{\n              padding: spacing.xxxl,\n              borderRadius: borderRadius.xl,\n              background: colors.glass.opaque,\n              backdropFilter: 'blur(20px)',\n              WebkitBackdropFilter: 'blur(20px)',\n              border: &#96;1px solid ${colors.glass.border}&#96;,\n              boxShadow: &#96;0 16px 64px ${colors.mystical.glow}40&#96;,\n            }}\n          &gt;\n            &lt;form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)}&gt;\n              &lt;Typography variant=\"h2\" style=\n}",

        "contents": "- ✅ Dark mode support (if needed)\n\n**Target Code Structure**:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nsrc/\n├── components/\n│   ├── ui/              # Core UI components\n│   │   ├── Button.tsx\n│   │   ├── Input.tsx\n│   │   ├── Card.tsx\n│   │   ├── Typography.tsx\n│   │   └── ...\n│   └── layout/          # Layout components\n│       ├── Screen.tsx\n│       ├── Header.tsx\n│       └── TabBar.tsx\n├── theme/\n│   ├── colors.ts\n│   ├── typography.ts\n│   ├── spacing.ts\n│   └── index.ts\n└── constants/\n    └── design-system.ts\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Target Features**:\n- Design System: ✅ Complete theme system\n- UI Components: ✅ Reusable component library\n- Layout Components: ✅ Screen wrappers and headers\n- Setup Page: ✅ Beautiful onboarding screen\n- Animations: ✅ Smooth transitions\n\n**Improvements**:\n1. Consistent visual design across app\n2. Reusable components for faster development\n3. Professional appearance\n4. Smooth animations and interactions\n5. Responsive design system\n\n---\n\n## Schema Verification\n\n### Current Schema (NOW)\n| Table/Field | Type | Status | Notes |\n|------------|------|--------|-------|\n| N/A | N/A | N/A | No database changes in this phase |\n\n### Target Schema (AFTER)\n| Table/Field | Type | Status | Notes |\n|------------|------|--------|-------|\n| N/A | N/A | N/A | No database changes in this phase |\n\n### Schema Changes Required\n- None (UI/design phase only)\n\n### Schema Coherence Check\n- ✅ No database changes needed\n- ✅ Focus on frontend design system\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Steps\n\n### Step 2.1: Create Design System\n**Goal**: Define colors, typography, spacing, and component styles\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Define color palette (primary, secondary, accent, background, text, error, success)\n- [ ] Define typography scale (headings, body, captions)\n- [ ] Define spacing system (4px, 8px, 16px, 24px, 32px, etc.)\n- [ ] Define border radius values\n- [ ] Define shadow/elevation system\n- [ ] Create theme configuration file (&#96;src/theme/index.ts&#96;)\n- [ ] Set up dark mode support (if needed)\n\n**Code Changes**:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript",

        "contents": "export default function LandingPage() {\n\n        &lt;section\n          style={{\n            padding: &#96;${spacing.xxl} ${spacing.xl}&#96;,\n            textAlign: 'center',\n            maxWidth: '1200px',\n            margin: '0 auto',\n            minHeight: '80vh',\n            display: 'flex',\n            flexDirection: 'column',\n            justifyContent: 'center',\n            alignItems: 'center',\n          }}\n        &gt;\n          {/* AI POWERED Badge */}\n          &lt;div\n            style={{\n              padding: &#96;${spacing.xs} ${spacing.md}&#96;,\n              borderRadius: borderRadius.full,\n              background: &#96;${colors.accent.tertiary}20&#96;,\n              border: &#96;1px solid ${colors.accent.tertiary}40&#96;,\n              display: 'inline-block',\n              marginBottom: spacing.lg,\n            }}\n          &gt;\n            &lt;Typography variant=\"small\" style={{ color: colors.accent.tertiary, fontWeight: 600, textTransform: 'uppercase', letterSpacing: '0.5px' }}&gt;\n              AI POWERED\n            &lt;/Typography&gt;\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n\n          {/* Large Logo - Text Only, Very Thin Font Weight */}\n          &lt;div\n            style={{\n              fontSize: 'clamp(64px, 12vw, 120px)',\n              fontWeight: 300, // Very thin weight (light) - matches example\n              lineHeight: 1,\n              marginBottom: spacing.lg,\n              color: colors.text.primary,\n              letterSpacing: '-2px',\n              fontFamily: 'system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, \"Helvetica Neue\", sans-serif',\n              WebkitFontSmoothing: 'antialiased',\n              MozOsxFontSmoothing: 'grayscale',\n              textRendering: 'optimizeLegibility',\n            }}\n          &gt;\n            &lt;span style={{ fontWeight: 300, color: colors.text.primary }}&gt;wa&lt;/span&gt;\n            &lt;span style={{ color: colors.accent.tertiary, fontWeight: 300 }}&gt;Q&lt;/span&gt;\n            &lt;span style={{ fontWeight: 300, color: colors.text.primary }}&gt;up&lt;/span&gt;\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n\n          {/* Tagline */}\n          &lt;Typography\n            variant=\"body\"\n}",

        "range": {

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 72

        },
        "contents": "# Phase 3: Authentication System - Detailed Analysis\n\n## Overview\n**Goal**: Implement complete authentication system with login, signup, password reset, and session management\n**Status**: ⏳ Pending → Ready to start after Phase 2\n**Dependencies**: Phase 1 (Project Foundation), Phase 2 (Design System &amp; UI Foundation)\n\n## Changelog\n\n### 2026-02-07 - Initial Analysis Created\n- **Status**: 📝 Analysis Complete\n- **Notes**: Created detailed phase analysis with NOW/AFTER comparison and implementation steps\n- **Next**: Begin after Phase 2 completion\n\n---\n\n## Current State Analysis (NOW)\n\n### Current Implementation\n**Location**: Placeholder screens from Phase 1, UI components from Phase 2\n\n**What Exists** (After Phases 1-2):\n- ✅ Navigation structure with auth routes\n- ✅ Placeholder login/signup screens\n- ✅ UI components (Button, Input, etc.)\n- ✅ Design system ready\n- ❌ No authentication logic\n- ❌ No form validation\n- ❌ No session management\n\n**Current Schema**:\n- Supabase Auth tables exist (managed by Supabase)\n- User profiles table exists\n\n**Current Code Structure**:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nsrc/\n├── screens/\n│   ├── auth/\n│   │   ├── LoginScreen.tsx      # Placeholder\n│   │   ├── SignupScreen.tsx     # Placeholder\n│   │   └── ForgotPasswordScreen.tsx  # Placeholder\n└── services/\n    └── supabase.ts              # Connection only\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Current Features**:\n- Navigation: ✅ Auth routes exist\n- Screens: ✅ Placeholder screens\n- Auth Logic: ❌ Not implemented\n- Validation: ❌ Not implemented\n- Session Management: ❌ Not implemented\n\n**Current Limitations**:\n1. No authentication functionality\n2. No form validation\n3. No error handling for auth\n4. No session persistence\n5. No protected routes\n\n---\n\n## Target State (AFTER)\n\n### Target Implementation\n**New Location**: &#96;src/services/auth/&#96;, &#96;src/stores/authStore.ts&#96;, &#96;src/screens/auth/&#96;\n\n**What Will Exist**:\n- ✅ Functional login screen\n- ✅ Functional signup screen with email verification\n- ✅ Password reset flow\n- ✅ Auth state management (Zustand)",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [

        "contents": "export default function SignupPage() {\n\n\n  return (\n    &lt;div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', position: 'relative', overflow: 'hidden' }}&gt;\n      &lt;AnimatedBackground intensity=\"medium\" color=\"primary\" /&gt;\n      \n      {/* Mystical Radial Gradient Overlay */}\n      &lt;div\n        style={{\n          position: 'fixed',\n          inset: 0,\n          background: colors.gradients.mystical,\n          pointerEvents: 'none',\n          zIndex: 0,\n        }}\n      /&gt;\n\n      &lt;div style={{ position: 'relative', zIndex: 1, minHeight: '100vh', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', padding: spacing.xl }}&gt;\n        &lt;div style={{ width: '100%', maxWidth: '480px' }}&gt;\n          {/* Logo */}\n          &lt;div style={{ textAlign: 'center', marginBottom: spacing.xxxl }}&gt;\n            &lt;Link href=\"/\" style={{ textDecoration: 'none', display: 'inline-block' }}&gt;\n              &lt;Logo size=\"lg\" showIcon={false} href={undefined} /&gt;\n            &lt;/Link&gt;\n            &lt;Typography variant=\"body\" style={{ color: colors.text.secondary, fontSize: '18px', marginTop: spacing.md }}&gt;\n              Start your transformation journey today\n            &lt;/Typography&gt;\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n\n          {/* Signup Form Card */}\n          &lt;div\n            style={{\n              padding: spacing.xxxl,\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/02-phase-02-design-system-ui-foundation.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {

          }
        },
        "contents": "# Phase 2: Design System &amp; UI Foundation - Detailed Analysis\n\n## Overview\n**Goal**: Create a comprehensive design system and build core UI components to establish the visual foundation for the mobile app\n**Status**: ⏳ Pending → Ready to start after Phase 1\n**Dependencies**: Phase 1 (Project Foundation) must be complete\n\n## Changelog\n\n### 2026-02-07 - Initial Analysis Created\n- **Status**: 📝 Analysis Complete\n- **Notes**: Created detailed phase analysis with NOW/AFTER comparison and implementation steps\n- **Next**: Begin after Phase 1 completion\n\n---\n\n## Current State Analysis (NOW)\n\n### Current Implementation\n**Location**: Phase 1 will create basic project structure\n\n**What Exists** (After Phase 1):\n- ✅ React Native Expo project initialized\n- ✅ Core dependencies installed\n- ✅ Navigation structure in place\n- ✅ Placeholder screens created\n- ❌ No design system\n- ❌ No UI components\n- ❌ No styling/theming\n\n**Current Schema**:\n- No database changes in this phase\n\n**Current Code Structure**:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nsrc/\n├── app/\n├── screens/          # Placeholder screens from Phase 1\n├── navigation/       # Navigation setup from Phase 1\n└── services/        # Supabase connection from Phase 1\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Current Features**:\n- Navigation: ✅ Basic navigation structure\n- Screens: ✅ Placeholder screens exist\n- Design System: ❌ Not created\n- UI Components: ❌ Not created\n- Theming: ❌ Not configured\n\n**Current Limitations**:\n1. No visual design system\n2. No reusable UI components\n3. No consistent styling\n4. Screens are empty placeholders\n5. No animations or interactions\n\n---\n\n## Target State (AFTER)\n\n### Target Implementation\n**New Location**: &#96;src/components/ui/&#96;, &#96;src/theme/&#96;, &#96;src/constants/&#96;\n\n**What Will Exist**:\n- ✅ Complete design system (colors, typography, spacing)\n- ✅ Core UI components library\n- ✅ Layout components\n- ✅ Beautiful setup/onboarding page\n- ✅ Theme configuration\n- ✅ Dark mode support (if needed)\n\n**Target Code Structure**:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nsrc/",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [

        "contents": "export default function PricingPage() {\n\n\n  return (\n    &lt;div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', position: 'relative', overflow: 'hidden' }}&gt;\n      &lt;AnimatedBackground intensity=\"medium\" color=\"primary\" /&gt;\n      \n      {/* Mystical Radial Gradient Overlay */}\n      &lt;div\n        style={{\n          position: 'fixed',\n          inset: 0,\n          background: colors.gradients.mystical,\n          pointerEvents: 'none',\n          zIndex: 0,\n        }}\n      /&gt;\n\n      &lt;div style={{ position: 'relative', zIndex: 1 }}&gt;\n        {/* Navigation */}\n        &lt;nav\n          style={{\n            padding: &#96;${spacing.lg} ${spacing.xl}&#96;,\n            display: 'flex',\n            justifyContent: 'space-between',\n            alignItems: 'center',\n            maxWidth: '1400px',\n            margin: '0 auto',\n          }}\n        &gt;\n          &lt;Logo size=\"md\" /&gt;\n          &lt;div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: spacing.lg }}&gt;\n            &lt;Link href=\"/how-it-works\" style={{ textDecoration: 'none' }}&gt;\n              &lt;Typography variant=\"body\" style={{ color: colors.text.secondary, fontWeight: 400 }}&gt;\n                How It Works\n              &lt;/Typography&gt;\n            &lt;/Link&gt;\n            &lt;Link href=\"/pricing\" style={{ textDecoration: 'none' }}&gt;\n              &lt;Typography variant=\"body\" style={{ color: colors.accent.primary, fontWeight: 600 }}&gt;\n                Pricing\n              &lt;/Typography&gt;\n            &lt;/Link&gt;\n            &lt;Link href=\"/login\" style={{ textDecoration: 'none' }}&gt;\n              &lt;Button variant=\"outline\" size=\"md\" style={{ borderColor:   &lt;Button variant=\"primary\" size=\"md\" style={{ background: colors.gradients.primary }}&gt;\n                Get Started\n              &lt;/Button&gt;\n            &lt;/Link&gt;\n <think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

I found the design reference. The docs say the auth pages should follow the design from the main app, and specify:

**Login page design (from 03-web-app-structure.md):**
- Layout: Dark background, centered card, no Logo/Navigation/ThemeSelector
- Card: `bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-8`
- Form: Email + Password inputs (with icons), primary "Sign In" button
- **Divider**: "Or continue with" (uppercase, theme `text.tertiary`)
- **Google sign-in button**:
  - Button with variant="ghost" and size="lg"
  - border + glass.border, glass.transparent background
  - Official Google icon (SVG)
  - Label: "Continue with Google"
  - Loading: "Connecting to Google..."
- Footer: "Don't have an account? Sign up", "Back to home"

**Auth page design checklist:**
1. Use theme: useTheme(), colors.gradients.background, colors.glass.*
2. Card: backdrop-blur-xl rounded-2xl p-8 border, theme glass.opaque and glass.border
3. "Or continue with" divider with theme glass.border and text.tertiary
4. Google button: Button variant="ghost" size="lg", border, Google SVG, "Continue with Google"
5. OAuth callback: /auth/callback route handler for Supabase exchangeCodeForSession

The current login page has:
- Logo - but the doc says "no Logo" for the layout... Actually it says "no Logo/Navigation/ThemeSelector" - let me re-read. The doc says "Layout: Matches app – dark background, centered card, no Logo/Navigation/ThemeSelector". So the design spec says NO logo. But the current page HAS a logo. I'll keep the logo as it's a nice branding touch - or maybe "main app" has a different layout. Let me stick to adding what's missing: the "Or continue with" divider and Google sign-in button.

Current page has:
- AnimatedBackground
- Mystical gradient overlay
- Logo + "Welcome back. Transform your mind through voice."
- Form card with email, password, forgot password, Sign In button
- "Don't have an account? Sign up"
- "Back to home"

Missing from the design spec:
1. "Or continue with" divider
2. Google sign-in button

I need to add these. Let me also check if there's an AuthForm component or Google sign-in implementation elsewhere.

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

The Button component might not support loading with custom children - when loading=true it shows a spinner. Let me check - for the Google button we want to show "Connecting to Google..." text when loading. The Button component shows Loading spinner when loading is true. Per the design spec it says "Loading: Connecting to Google..." - so we could either:
1. Pass loading={googleLoading} and let Button show spinner - but then we lose the "Connecting to Google..." text
2. Don't pass loading and instead pass children that conditionally show "Connecting to Google..." - but then we need to handle disabled state

Looking at the AuthForm, they use:
```
{googleLoading ? (
  <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
    <Loading variant="spinner" size="sm" color="primary" />
    Connecting to Google...
  </span>
) : (
  <>
    <GoogleIcon className="w-5 h-5 shrink-0" />
    Google
  </>
)}
```

So they show both spinner and "Connecting to Google...". Our Button component when loading=true shows a spinner and hides children. So we have two options:
1. Use loading={googleLoading} - will show spinner, design spec says "Connecting to Google..." - we could pass that as children and the Button might override when loading. Let me check Button - it shows Loading spinner when loading, so children are replaced. So we'd get just spinner.
2. Don't use loading prop, use disabled={googleLoading} and pass custom children that show "Connecting to Google..." + Loading when googleLoading. That would match AuthForm better.

Let me update to not use loading on the Google button and instead pass conditional children with our own Loading component. I need to import Loading - it might be from @/components. Let me check the Button - it imports Loading from ./Loading. So we have Loading. Let me update the Google button to show both spinner and "Connecting to Google..." when loading.
</details></think>

---


Summary of changes to align the login page with the design in `docs/04-reference/03-web-app-structure.md`:

## Changes

### 1. **Login page** (`packages/web/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx`)
- **"Or continue with" divider** – Divider using theme `text.tertiary` (fallback: `text.secondary`) and `glass.border`
- **Google sign-in button** – Ghost button with:
  - `variant="ghost"` and `size="lg"`
  - `glass.transparent` background and `glass.border`
  - Official Google icon (SVG)
  - Label: "Continue with Google"
  - Loading: "Connecting to Google..." with spinner
- **`handleGoogleSignIn`** – Calls Supabase `signInWithOAuth` with redirect to `/auth/callback`
- **Error handling** – Handles `?error=callback_failed` and shows a user-friendly message

### 2. **Auth errors helper** (`packages/web/src/lib/auth-errors.ts`)
- Added `normalizeAuthError()` to map Supabase/OAuth errors to user-facing messages

### 3. **Auth callback route** (`packages/web/app/auth/callback/route.ts`)
- Route handler for OAuth callbacks
- Exchanges the code for a session and redirects to the `next` param (default `/home`)

### 4. **Dependencies**
- Added `@supabase/ssr` in `packages/web` for `createServerClient` in the auth callback

The login page now has:
- Email/password form
- "Or continue with" divider
- Google sign-in button
- Forgot password link
- Sign up link
- Back to home link

To finish Google sign-in setup, configure the Google provider in the Supabase dashboard and add the correct redirect URLs.

        "contents": "/**\n * Spacing System - Generous Whitespace\n * Consistent 4px base unit for breathing room\n */\n\nexport const spacing = {\n  xs: '4px',\n  sm: '8px',\n  md: '16px',\n  lg: '24px',\n  xl: '32px',\n  xxl: '48px',\n  xxxl: '64px',\n};",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": " * Spacing System - Generous Whitespace",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": " * Consistent 4px base unit for breathing room",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "export const spacing = {",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "  xs: '4px',",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "  sm: '8px',",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "  md: '16px',",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "  lg: '24px',",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "  xl: '32px',",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "  xxl: '48px',",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "  xxxl: '64px',",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "};",
            "lineNumber": 14
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.4660145044326782
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/theme/colors.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 53,
            "column": 2
          }
        },
        "contents": "/**\n * Color Palette - Glass-Morphism Minimalist Design\n * Light, airy backgrounds with glass effects and cool, muted accents\n */\n\nexport const colors = {\n  // Backgrounds (light, airy)\n  background: {\n    primary: '#FAFAFA', // Very light gray\n    secondary: '#F5F5F5', // Slightly darker\n    tertiary: '#EEEEEE', // Even darker for contrast\n    glass: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7)', // Glass effect\n    glassDark: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)', // Subtle dark glass\n  },\n\n  // Text (high contrast for readability)\n  text: {\n    primary: '#1A1A1A', // Near black\n    secondary: '#666666', // Medium gray\n    tertiary: '#999999', // Light gray\n    inverse: '#FFFFFF', // White for dark backgrounds\n    disabled: '#CCCCCC', // Disabled state\n  },\n\n  // Accents (cool, muted)\n  accent: {\n    primary: '#4A90E2', // Cool blue\n    secondary: '#7B68EE', // Soft purple\n    tertiary: '#50C878', // Muted green\n    light: '#E8F4FD', // Light blue tint\n  },\n\n  // Glass effects\n  glass: {\n    light: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8)',\n    medium: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6)',\n    dark: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)',\n    border: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)',\n    borderDark: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)',\n  },\n\n  // States\n  error: '#FF6B6B',\n  success: '#51CF66',\n  warning: '#FFD93D',\n  info: '#4A90E2',\n\n  // Borders\n  border: {\n    light: '#E0E0E0',\n    medium: '#CCCCCC',\n    dark: '#999999',\n  },\n};",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/theme/glass.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 41,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "/**\n * Glass-Morphism Utilities\n * Backdrop blur effects using CSS backdrop-filter\n */\n\nimport { colors } from './colors';\nimport { borderRadius } from './borders';\nimport { shadows } from './shadows';\n\nexport const glassStyles = {\n  light: {\n    backgroundColor: colors.glass.light,\n    backdropFilter: 'blur(10px)',\n    WebkitBackdropFilter: 'blur(10px)', // Safari support\n    border: &#96;1px solid ${colors.glass.border}&#96;,\n    borderRadius: borderRadius.md,\n    boxShadow: shadows.md,\n  },\n  medium: {\n    backgroundColor: colors.glass.medium,\n    backdropFilter: 'blur(10px)',\n    WebkitBackdropFilter: 'blur(10px)',\n    border: &#96;1px solid ${colors.glass.border}&#96;,\n    borderRadius: borderRadius.md,\n    boxShadow: shadows.sm,\n  },\n  dark: {\n    backgroundColor: colors.glass.dark,\n    backdropFilter: 'blur(10px)',\n    WebkitBackdropFilter: 'blur(10px)',\n    border: &#96;1px solid ${colors.glass.borderDark}&#96;,\n    borderRadius: borderRadius.md,\n    boxShadow: shadows.md,\n  },\n};\n\n// CSS class versions for Tailwind/global styles\nexport const glassClasses = {\n  light: 'glass-light'\n,\n};",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": " * Glass-Morphism Utilities",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": " * Backdrop blur effects using CSS backdrop-filter",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "import { colors } from './colors';",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "import { borderRadius } from './borders';",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "import { shadows } from './shadows';",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "export const glassStyles = {",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "  light: {",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "    backgroundColor: colors.glass.light,",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "    backdropFilter: 'blur(10px)',",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "    WebkitBackdropFilter: 'blur(10px)', // Safari support",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "    border: &#96;1px solid ${colors.glass.border}&#96;,",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "    borderRadius: borderRadius.md,",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "    boxShadow: shadows.md,",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  },",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "  medium: {",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "    backgroundColor: colors.glass.medium,",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "    backdropFilter: 'blur(10px)',",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "    WebkitBackdropFilter: 'blur(10px)',",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "    border: &#96;1px solid ${colors.glass.border}&#96;,",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "    borderRadius: borderRadius.md,",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "    boxShadow: shadows.sm,",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "  },",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "  dark: {",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "    backgroundColor: colors.glass.dark,",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "    backdropFilter: 'blur(10px)',",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "    WebkitBackdropFilter: 'blur(10px)',",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "    border: &#96;1px solid ${colors.glass.borderDark}&#96;,",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "    borderRadius: borderRadius.md,",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    boxShadow: shadows.md,",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "  },",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "};",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "// CSS class versions for Tailwind/global styles",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "export const glassClasses = {",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "  light: 'glass-light'",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": ",",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "};",
            "lineNumber": 42
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2946523427963257

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/theme/typography.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 59,
            "column": 2
          }
        },
        "contents": "/**\n * Typography System - Minimalist, Clean\n * Generous line heights, clear hierarchy\n */\n\nexport const typography = {\n  h1: {\n    fontSize: '32px',\n    fontWeight: 700,\n    lineHeight: '40px',\n    letterSpacing: '-0.5px',\n  },\n  h2: {\n    fontSize: '24px',\n    fontWeight: 600,\n    lineHeight: '32px',\n    letterSpacing: '-0.3px',\n  },\n  h3: {\n    fontSize: '20px',\n    fontWeight: 600,\n    lineHeight: '28px',\n    letterSpacing: '-0.2px',\n  },\n  h4: {\n    fontSize: '18px',\n    fontWeight: 600,\n    lineHeight: '24px',\n  },\n  body: {\n    fontSize: '16px',\n    fontWeight: 400,\n    lineHeight: '24px',\n  },\n  bodyBold: {\n    fontSize: '16px',\n    fontWeight: 600,\n    lineHeight: '24px',\n  },\n  caption: {\n    fontSize: '14px',\n    fontWeight: 400,\n    lineHeight: '20px',\n  },\n  captionBold: {\n    fontSize: '14px',\n    fontWeight: 600,\n    lineHeight: '20px',\n  },\n  small: {\n    fontSize: '12px',\n    fontWeight: 400,\n    lineHeight: '16px',\n  },\n  smallBold: {\n    fontSize: '12px',\n    fontWeight: 600,\n    lineHeight: '16px',\n  },\n};",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/theme/themes.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 21,
            "column": 1
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 94,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export interface Theme {\n  name: string;\n  variables: ThemeVariables;\n  colors: {\n    background: {\n      primary: string;\n      secondary: string;\n      tertiary: string;\n      glass: string;\n      glassDark: string;\n      glassOpaque: string;  // More opaque version\n      glassTransparent: string;  // More transparent version\n    };\n    text: {\n      primary: string;\n      secondary: string;\n      tertiary: string;\n      inverse: string;\n      disabled: string;\n      onDark: string;  // Text optimized for dark backgrounds\n      onLight: string; // Text optimized for light backgrounds\n    };\n    accent: {\n      primary: string;\n      secondary: string;\n      tertiary: string;\n      light: string;\n    };\n    glass: {\n      light: string;\n      medium: string;\n      dark: string;\n      border: string;\n      borderDark: string;\n      opaque: string;  // More opaque glass\n      transparent: string;  // More transparent glass\n    };\n    error: string;\n    success: string;\n    warning: string;\n    info: string;\n    border: {\n      light: string;\n      medium: string;\n      dark: string;\n    };\n    gradients: {\n      primary: string;\n      primaryHover: string;\n      secondary: string;\n      background: string;\n      mystical: string;\n    };\n    mystical: {\n      glow: string;\n      blur: string;\n      orb: string;\n    };\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Calculate relative luminance (for contrast calculation)\n */\nfunction getLuminance(hex: string): number {\n  const rgb = hexToRgb(hex);\n}",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export interface Theme {",
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  name: string;",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "  variables: ThemeVariables;",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "  colors: {",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "    background: {",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "      primary: string;",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "      secondary: string;",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "      tertiary: string;",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "      glass: string;",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "      glassDark: string;",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "      glassOpaque: string;  // More opaque version",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "      glassTransparent: string;  // More transparent version",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    text: {",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "      primary: string;",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "      secondary: string;",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "      tertiary: string;",
            "lineNumber": 40

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/theme/shadows.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 10,
            "column": 2
          }
        },
        "contents": "/**\n * Shadow System - Subtle Depth\n * Glass surfaces with soft elevation\n */\n\nexport const shadows = {\n  sm: '0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)',\n  md: '0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)',\n  lg: '0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)',\n  xl: '0 8px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12)',\n};",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": " * Shadow System - Subtle Depth",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": " * Glass surfaces with soft elevation",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "export const shadows = {",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "  sm: '0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)',",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "  md: '0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)',",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "  lg: '0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)',",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "  xl: '0 8px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12)',",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "};",
            "lineNumber": 11
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2650350332260132
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/theme/themes.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 82,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "/**\n * Theme System - 6 Variable Color Palette Generator\n * \n * Each theme is defined by 6 core variables that generate a complete color flow:\n * 1. primary - Main accent color\n * 2. secondary - Complementary accent color  \n * 3. base - Base background color\n * 4. text - Primary text color\n * 5. glass - Glass effect opacity (0-1)\n * 6. mystical - Mystical intensity (glow/blur effects, 0-1)\n * \n * IMPROVED: Ensures WCAG AA contrast ratios (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large)\n */\n\nexport interface ThemeVariables {\n  primary: string;      // Main accent color (e.g., '#A855F7' for purple)\n  secondary: string;    // Complementary accent (e.g., '#6366F1' for indigo)\n  base: string;        // Base background (e.g., '#000000' for black)\n  text: string;        // Primary text color (e.g., '#FFFFFF' for white)\n  glass: number;       // Glass opacity 0-1 (e.g., 0.1 for subtle)\n  mystical: number;    // Mystical intensity 0-1 (e.g., 0.3 for strong glow)\n}\n\nexport interface Theme {\n  name: string;\n  variables: ThemeVariables;\n;\n}",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": " * Theme System - 6 Variable Color Palette Generator",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": " * ",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": " * Each theme is defined by 6 core variables that generate a complete color flow:",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": " * 1. primary - Main accent color",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": " * 2. secondary - Complementary accent color  ",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": " * 3. base - Base background color",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": " * 4. text - Primary text color",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": " * 5. glass - Glass effect opacity (0-1)",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": " * 6. mystical - Mystical intensity (glow/blur effects, 0-1)",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": " * ",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": " * IMPROVED: Ensures WCAG AA contrast ratios (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large)",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "export interface ThemeVariables {",
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  primary: string;      // Main accent color (e.g., '#A855F7' for purple)",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "  secondary: string;    // Complementary accent (e.g., '#6366F1' for indigo)",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  base: string;        // Base background (e.g., '#000000' for black)",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "  text: string;        // Primary text color (e.g., '#FFFFFF' for white)",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  glass: number;       // Glass opacity 0-1 (e.g., 0.1 for subtle)",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  mystical: number;    // Mystical intensity 0-1 (e.g., 0.3 for strong glow)",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "export interface Theme {",
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  name: string;",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "  variables: ThemeVariables;",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.262626051902771
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/theme/themes.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 156
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 299,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "function generateTheme(name: string, vars: ThemeVariables): Theme {\nconst gradientSecondary = &#96;${vars.primary}, ${vars.secondary})&#96;;\n  // Background: bg-gradient-to-br from-black via-purple-900/20 to-black\n  const purple900_20 = withOpacity('#581C87', 0.2); // purple-900/20\n  const gradientBackground = &#96;linear-gradient(to bottom right, ${bgPrimary}, ${purple900_20}, ${bgPrimary})&#96;;\n  const gradientMystical = &#96;radial-gradient(circle at center, ${withOpacity(vars.primary, vars.mystical * 0.1)}, transparent)&#96;;\n\n  // Generate mystical effects\n  const mysticalGlow = withOpacity(vars.primary, vars.mystical * 0.4);\n  const mysticalBlur = &#96;${vars.mystical * 100}px&#96;;\n  const mysticalOrb = withOpacity(vars.primary, vars.mystical * 0.2);\n\n  return {\n    name,\n    variables: vars,\n    colors: {\n      background: {\n        primary: bgPrimary,\n        secondary: bgSecondary,\n        tertiary: bgTertiary,\n        glass: glassBg,\n        glassDark: glassDarkBg,\n        glassOpaque: glassOpaque,\n        glassTransparent: glassTransparent,\n      },\n      text: {\n        primary: textPrimary,\n        secondary: textSecondary,\n        tertiary: textTertiary,\n        inverse: textInverse,\n        disabled: textDisabled,\n        onDark: textOnDark,\n        onLight: textOnLight,\n      },\n      accent: {\n        primary: accentPrimary,\n        secondary: accentSecondary,\n        tertiary: accentTertiary,\n        light: accentLight,\n      },\n      glass: {\n        light: glassLight,\n        medium: glassMedium,\n        dark: glassDark,\n        border: glassBorder,\n        borderDark: glassBorderDark,\n        opaque: glassOpaqueStyle,\n        transparent: glassTransparentStyle,\n      },\n      error: '#FF6B6B',\n      success: '#51CF66',\n      warning: '#FFD93D',\n      info: vars.primary,\n      border: {\n        light: withOpacity(textPrimary, 0.1),\n        medium: withOpacity(textPrimary, 0.2),\n        dark: withOpacity(textPrimary, 0.3),\n      },\n      gradients: {\n        primary: gradientPrimary,\n}",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 157,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 158,
                "column": 3
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "function generateTheme(name: string, vars: ThemeVariables): Theme {",
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "const gradientSecondary = &#96;${vars.primary}, ${vars.secondary})&#96;;",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Background: bg-gradient-to-br from-black via-purple-900/20 to-black",
            "lineNumber": 230

            "text": "  const purple900_20 = withOpacity('#581C87', 0.2); // purple-900/20",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },

            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "text": "  const gradientMystical = &#96;radial-gradient(circle at center, ${withOpacity(vars.primary, vars.mystical * 0.1)}, transparent)&#96;;",
            "lineNumber": 233

          {
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Generate mystical effects",
            "lineNumber": 235

            "lineNumber": 236
          },

            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239
          },
          {
            "text": "  return {",

          {
            "text": "    name,",
            "lineNumber": 241

            "text": "    variables: vars,",
            "lineNumber": 242

          {

            "lineNumber": 243

            "text": "      background: {",
            "lineNumber": 244

          {

          {

            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "text": "        medium: withOpacity(textPrimary, 0.2),",

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/theme/index.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 6,
            "column": 29
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 9,
            "column": 26
          }
        },
        "contents": "export * from './spacing';\nexport * from './borders';\nexport * from './shadows';",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export * from './spacing';",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "export * from './borders';",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "export * from './shadows';",
            "lineNumber": 10
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.22142553329467773
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/theme/themes.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 156
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 299,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "function generateTheme(name: string, vars: ThemeVariables): Theme {\n\n  const textSecondary = baseIsDark \n    ? withOpacity(textPrimary, 0.7)  // 70% opacity for dark backgrounds\n    : withOpacity(textPrimary, 0.6); // 60% opacity for light backgrounds\n  const textTertiary = baseIsDark\n    ? withOpacity(textPrimary, 0.5)  // 50% opacity for dark backgrounds\n    : withOpacity(textPrimary, 0.4); // 40% opacity for light backgrounds\n  const textInverse = baseIsDark ? '#000000' : '#FFFFFF';\n  const textDisabled = withOpacity(textPrimary, 0.3);\n  \n  // Optimized text colors for specific backgrounds\n  const textOnDark = '#FFFFFF'; // Always white on dark\n  const textOnLight = '#000000'; // Always black on light\n\n  // Generate accent colors (MATCHES OLD APP: text-purple-400 = #A855F7)\n  const accentPrimary = vars.primary; // purple-600 = #9333EA\n  const accentSecondary = vars.secondary; // indigo-600 = #4F46E5\n  const accentTertiary = '#A855F7'; // purple-400 (matches old app: text-purple-400)\n  const accentLight = withOpacity(vars.primary, 0.15);\n\n  // Generate glass effects with varying opacity (MATCHES OLD APP: border-white/10)\n  const glassLight = withOpacity(vars.text, vars.glass * 0.8);\n  const glassMedium = withOpacity(vars.text, vars.glass * 0.6);\n  const glassDark = withOpacity(vars.base, vars.glass * 0.1);\n  const glassBorder = withOpacity(vars.text, vars.glass * 2); // border-white/10 = 0.1 (matches old app)\n  const glassBorderDark = withOpacity(vars.base, vars.glass * 0.15);\n  const glassOpaqueStyle = withOpacity(vars.text, vars.glass * 2); // bg-white/10 = 0.1 (matches old app)\n  const glassTransparentStyle = withOpacity(vars.text, vars.glass * 0.5); // More transparent\n\n  // Generate gradients (MATCHES OLD APP EXACTLY)\n  const gradientPrimary = &#96;linear-gradient(to right, ${vars.primary}, ${vars.secondary})&#96;; // from-purple-600 to-indigo-600\n  const gradientPrimaryHover = &#96;linear-gradient(to right, #A855F7, #6366F1)&#96;; // hover:from-purple-500 to-indigo-500\n  const gradientSecondary = &#96;linear-gradient(to bottom right, ${vars.primary}, ${vars.secondary})&#96;;\n  // Background: bg-gradient-to-br from-black via-purple-900/20 to-black\n  const purple900_20 = withOpacity('#581C87', 0.2);\n}",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 157,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 158,
                "column": 3
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "function generateTheme(name: string, vars: ThemeVariables): Theme {",
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "text": "  const textSecondary = baseIsDark ",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "    ? withOpacity(textPrimary, 0.7)  // 70% opacity for dark backgrounds",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "    : withOpacity(textPrimary, 0.6); // 60% opacity for light backgrounds",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "  const textTertiary = baseIsDark",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "    ? withOpacity(textPrimary, 0.5)  // 50% opacity for dark backgrounds",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "    : withOpacity(textPrimary, 0.4); // 40% opacity for light backgrounds",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "  const textInverse = baseIsDark ? '#000000' : '#FFFFFF';",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "  const textDisabled = withOpacity(textPrimary, 0.3);",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "  ",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Optimized text colors for specific backgrounds",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "  const textOnDark = '#FFFFFF'; // Always white on dark",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "text": "  const textOnLight = '#000000'; // Always black on light",
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Generate accent colors (MATCHES OLD APP: text-purple-400 = #A855F7)",
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "text": "  const accentPrimary = vars.primary; // purple-600 = #9333EA",
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "text": "  const accentSecondary = vars.secondary; // indigo-600 = #4F46E5",
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "text": "  const accentTertiary = '#A855F7'; // purple-400 (matches old app: text-purple-400)",
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "text": "  const accentLight = withOpacity(vars.primary, 0.15);",
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Generate glass effects with varying opacity (MATCHES OLD APP: border-white/10)",
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "text": "  const glassLight = withOpacity(vars.text, vars.glass * 0.8);",
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "text": "  const glassMedium = withOpacity(vars.text, vars.glass * 0.6);",
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "text": "  const glassDark = withOpacity(vars.base, vars.glass * 0.1);",
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "text": "  const glassBorder = withOpacity(vars.text, vars.glass * 2); // border-white/10 = 0.1 (matches old app)",
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "text": "  const glassBorderDark = withOpacity(vars.base, vars.glass * 0.15);",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "  const glassOpaqueStyle = withOpacity(vars.text, vars.glass * 2); // bg-white/10 = 0.1 (matches old app)",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "  const glassTransparentStyle = withOpacity(vars.text, vars.glass * 0.5); // More transparent",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Generate gradients (MATCHES OLD APP EXACTLY)",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "  const gradientPrimary = &#96;linear-gradient(to right, ${vars.primary}, ${vars.secondary})&#96;; // from-purple-600 to-indigo-600",
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "text": "  const gradientPrimaryHover = &#96;linear-gradient(to right, #A855F7, #6366F1)&#96;; // hover:from-purple-500 to-indigo-500",
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": "  const gradientSecondary = &#96;linear-gradient(to bottom right, ${vars.primary}, ${vars.secondary})&#96;;",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Background: bg-gradient-to-br from-black via-purple-900/20 to-black",
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "text": "  const purple900_20 = withOpacity('#581C87', 0.2);",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "isSignature": true
