    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/theme/themes.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 151,
            "column": 1
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 299,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "/**\n * Generate a complete theme from 6 variables\n */\nfunction generateTheme(name: string, vars: ThemeVariables): Theme {\n  // Helper to adjust opacity\n  const withOpacity = (color: string, opacity: number) =&gt; {\n    const rgb = hexToRgb(color);\n    return &#96;rgba(${rgb.r}, ${rgb.g}, ${rgb.b}, ${opacity})&#96;;\n  };\n\n  // Helper to lighten color\n  const lighten = (color: string, amount: number) =&gt; {\n    const rgb = hexToRgb(color);\n    const r = Math.min(255, rgb.r + amount);\n    const g = Math.min(255, rgb.g + amount);\n    const b = Math.min(255, rgb.b + amount);\n    return &#96;#${r.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}${g.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}${b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}&#96;;\n  };\n\n  // Helper to darken color\n  const darken = (color: string, amount: number) =&gt; {\n    const rgb = hexToRgb(color);\n    const r = Math.max(0, rgb.r - amount);\n    const g = Math.max(0, rgb.g - amount);\n    const b = Math.max(0, rgb.b - amount);\n    return &#96;#${r.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}${g.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}${b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}&#96;;\n  };\n\n  // Determine if base is dark or light\n  const baseIsDark = isDark(vars.base);\n  \n  // Generate background colors from base\n  const bgPrimary = vars.base;\n  const bgSecondary = baseIsDark ? lighten(vars.base, 15) : darken(vars.base, 10);\n  const bgTertiary = baseIsDark ? lighten(vars.base, 25) : darken(vars.base, 20);\n  \n  // Glass backgrounds with varying opacity (MATCHES OLD APP: bg-white/5, bg-white/10)\n  const glassBg = withOpacity(vars.text, vars.glass); // bg-white/5 = 0.05\n  const glassDarkBg = withOpacity(vars.base, vars.glass * 0.5);\n  const glassOpaque = withOpacity(vars.text, vars.glass * 2); // bg-white/10 = 0.1 (more opaque)\n  const glassTransparent = withOpacity(vars.text, vars.glass * 0.5); // More transparent\n\n  // Generate text colors with proper contrast\n  const textPrimary = getOptimalTextColor(bgPrimary);\n  const textSecondary = baseIsDark \n    ? withOpacity(textPrimary, 0.7)\n;\n}",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {

          }
        },
        "contents": "/**\n * Theme System - Glass-Morphism Minimalist Design\n * Central export for all theme tokens\n */\n\nexport * from './colors';\nexport * from './typography';\nexport * from './spacing';",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": " * Theme System - Glass-Morphism Minimalist Design",

            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "export * from './colors';",
            "lineNumber": 6

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/theme/ThemeProvider.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 25,
            "column": 1
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 92,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export const ThemeProvider: React.FC&lt;ThemeProviderProps&gt; = ({\n  children,\n  defaultThemeName = 'mystical-purple',\n}) =&gt; {\n  // Always start with defaultThemeName to prevent hydration mismatch\n  const [themeName, setThemeName] = useState&lt;string&gt;(defaultThemeName);\n  const [mounted, setMounted] = useState(false);\n\n  // Only check localStorage after component mounts (client-side only)\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    setMounted(true);\n    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {\n      const saved = localStorage.getItem('waqup-theme');\n      if (saved &amp;&amp; themes[saved]) {\n        setThemeName(saved);\n      }\n    }\n  }, []);\n\n  const theme = themes[themeName] || defaultTheme;\n\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {\n      localStorage.setItem('waqup-theme', themeName);\n      // Apply theme CSS variables\n      const root = document.documentElement;\n      const themeColors = theme.colors;\n      \n      // Set CSS variables\n      root.style.setProperty('--theme-bg-primary', themeColors.background.primary);\n      root.style.setProperty('--theme-bg-secondary', themeColors.background.secondary);\n      root.style.setProperty('--theme-bg-tertiary', themeColors.background.tertiary);\n      root.style.setProperty('--theme-text-primary', themeColors.text.primary);\n      root.style.setProperty('--theme-text-secondary', themeColors.text.secondary);\n      root.style.setProperty('--theme-text-tertiary', themeColors.text.tertiary);\n      root.style.setProperty('--theme-accent-primary', themeColors.accent.primary);\n      root.style.setProperty('--theme-accent-secondary', themeColors.accent.secondary);\n      root.style.setProperty('--theme-glass-light', themeColors.glass.light);\n      root.style.setProperty('--theme-glass-border', themeColors.glass.border);\n      root.style.setProperty('--theme-gradient-primary', themeColors.gradients.primary);\n      root.style.setProperty('--theme-gradient-background', themeColors.gradients.background);\n      root.style.setProperty('--theme-mystical-glow', themeColors.mystical.glow);\n      root.style.setProperty('--theme-mystical-blur', themeColors.mystical.blur\n  }\n;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        },
        "contents": "// CSS class versions for Tailwind/global styles\nexport const glassClasses = {\n  light: 'glass-light',\n  medium: 'glass-medium',\n  dark: 'glass-dark',\n};",
        "signatures": {},

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/theme/themes.ts",
        "range": {

          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 333,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "// Professional Blue - Clean, trustworthy, modern\nexport const professionalBlue: Theme = generateTheme('Professional Blue', {\n  primary: '#3B82F6',      // Blue\n  secondary: '#06B6D4',    // Cyan\n  base: '#0F172A',         // Dark slate\n  text: '#F8FAFC',         // Light gray\n  glass: 0.12,             // Medium glass\n  mystical: 0.1,           // Minimal mystical effects\n});\n\n// Serene Green - Calm, natural, peaceful\nexport const sereneGreen: Theme = generateTheme\n;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "// Professional Blue - Clean, trustworthy, modern",

    {
      "codeBlock": {

            "line": 151,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "/**\n * Get optimal text color for a background (ensures WCAG AA contrast)\n */\nfunction getOptimalTextColor(backgroundColor: string, preferLight: boolean = false): string {\n  const isBgDark = isDark(backgroundColor);\n  \n  // If background is dark, use light text; if light, use dark text\n  if (isBgDark) {\n    // Ensure white text has good contrast (at least 4.5:1)\n    const whiteContrast = getContrastRatio('#FFFFFF', backgroundColor);\n    if (whiteContrast &gt;= 4.5) {\n      return '#FFFFFF';\n    }\n    // If white doesn't have enough contrast, use a lighter shade\n    return '#F5F5F5'; // Very light gray\n  } else {\n    // Ensure black text has good contrast\n    const blackContrast = getContrastRatio('#000000', backgroundColor);\n    if (blackContrast &gt;= 4.5) {\n      return '#000000';\n    }\n    // If black doesn't have enough contrast, use a darker shade\n    return '#1A1A1A'; // Very dark gray\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Convert hex to RGB\n */\nfunction hexToRgb(hex: string): { r: number; g: number; b: number } {\n  const hexClean = hex.replace('#', '');\n}",
        "signatures": {},

      "score": 0.08349909633398056

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/theme/themes.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 94,
            "column": 1
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 114,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "/**\n * Calculate contrast ratio between two colors\n * WCAG AA requires 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text\n */\nfunction getContrastRatio(color1: string, color2: string): number {\n  const lum1 = getLuminance(color1);\n  const lum2 = getLuminance(color2);\n  const lighter = Math.max(lum1, lum2);\n  const darker = Math.min(lum1, lum2);\n  return (lighter + 0.05) / (darker + 0.05);\n}\n\n/**\n * Determine if color is dark (for text color selection)\n */\nfunction isDark(color: string): boolean {\n  const luminance = getLuminance(color);\n}",
        "signatures": {},

        "contents": "export default function LandingPage() {\n\n\n  const benefits = [\n    'Transform your subconscious mind',\n    'Create personalized voice content',\n    'Practice unlimited times for free',\n    'Science-backed transformation methods',\n    'Privacy-first architecture',\n    'AI-guided creation process',\n  ];\n\n  return (\n    &lt;div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', position: 'relative', overflow: 'hidden' }}&gt;\n      &lt;ThemeSelector /&gt;\n      &lt;AnimatedBackground intensity=\"high\" color=\"primary\" /&gt;\n      \n      {/* Mystical Radial Gradient Overlay */}\n      &lt;div\n        style={{\n          position: 'fixed',\n          inset: 0,\n          background: colors.gradients.mystical,\n          pointerEvents: 'none',\n          zIndex: 0,\n        }}\n      /&gt;\n\n      &lt;div style={{ position: 'relative', zIndex: 1 }}&gt;\n        {/* Navigation */}\n        &lt;nav\n          style={{\n            padding: &#96;${spacing.lg} ${spacing.xl}&#96;,\n            display: 'flex',\n            justifyContent: 'space-between',\n            alignItems: 'center',\n            maxWidth: '1400px',\n            margin: '0 auto',\n          }}\n        &gt;\n          &lt;Logo size=\"md\" /&gt;\n          &lt;div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: spacing.lg }}&gt;\n            &lt;Link href=\"/how-it-works\" style={{ textDecoration: 'none' }}&gt;\n}",

            "line": 26,
            "column": 1

        },
        "contents": "import type { Metadata, Viewport } from 'next';\nimport './globals.css';\nimport '../src/styles/animations.css';\nimport { ThemeProvider } from '@/theme';\nimport { AuthProvider } from '@/components/auth/AuthProvider';\n\nexport const metadata: Metadata = {\n  title: 'waQup',\n  description: 'Transform your mind through voice and sacred frequencies',\n  icons: {\n    icon: [\n      { url: '/favicon.ico' },\n      { url: '/favicon-16x16.png', sizes: '16x16', type: 'image/png' },\n      { url: '/favicon-32x32.png', sizes: '32x32', type: 'image/png' },\n    ],\n    apple: [\n      { url: '/apple-touch-icon.png', sizes: '180x180', type: 'image/png' },\n    ],\n  },\n  manifest: '/manifest.json',\n};\n\nexport const viewport: Viewport = {\n  width: 'device-width',\n  initialScale: 1\n,\n};",
        "signatures": {},

        "contents": "export default function ProfilePage() {\n\n\n  return (\n    &lt;Container&gt;\n      &lt;AnimatedBackground intensity=\"medium\" color=\"primary\" /&gt;\n      \n      &lt;div\n        style={{\n          minHeight: '100vh',\n          padding: spacing.xl,\n          background: colors.gradients.background,\n          position: 'relative',\n        }}\n      &gt;\n        {/* Mystical Radial Gradient Overlay */}\n        &lt;div\n          style={{\n            position: 'fixed',\n            inset: 0,\n            background: colors.gradients.mystical,\n            pointerEvents: 'none',\n            zIndex: 0,\n          }}\n        /&gt;\n\n        &lt;div style={{ maxWidth: '1400px', margin: '0 auto', position: 'relative', zIndex: 1 }}&gt;\n          {/* Header */}\n          &lt;div style={{ marginBottom: spacing.xl }}&gt;\n            &lt;Typography variant=\"h1\" style={{ marginBottom: spacing.sm, color: colors.text.primary }}&gt;\n              Profile &amp; Settings\n            &lt;/Typography&gt;\n            &lt;Typography variant=\"body\" style={{ color: colors.text.secondary }}&gt;\n              Manage your account and preferences\n            &lt;/Typography&gt;\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n\n          {/* User Info Card */}\n          &lt;Card\n            variant=\"elevated\"\n            style={{\n              padding: spacing.xl,\n}",

            "line": 83,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export function AuthProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {\n\n [initializeAuth]);\n\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    // Handle protected route redirects\n    if (!isReady || !isInitialized) return;\n\n    const publicRoutes = [\n      '/',\n      '/login',\n      '/signup',\n      '/forgot-password',\n      '/reset-password',\n      '/confirm-email',\n      '/auth/beta-signup',\n      '/how-it-works',\n      '/pricing',\n      '/pages',\n      '/sitemap',\n    ];\n    const isPublicRoute =\n      publicRoutes.includes(pathname) ||\n      pathname.startsWith('/showcase') ||\n      pathname.startsWith('/onboarding');\n    const isProtectedRoute =\n      pathname.startsWith('/home') ||\n      pathname.startsWith('/library') ||\n      pathname.startsWith('/create') ||\n      pathname.startsWith('/profile') ||\n      pathname.startsWith('/sanctuary');\n\n    if (isProtectedRoute &amp;&amp; !user) {\n      // Redirect to login if trying to access protected route without auth\n      router.push('/login');\n    } else if\n  }\n}",

        "contents": "'use client';\n\nimport React, { useState } from 'react';\nimport { Container } from '@/components';\nimport {\n  Typography,\n  Button,\n  Input,\n  Card,\n  Loading,\n  Badge,\n  Progress,\n} from '@/components';\nimport { spacing, typography, borderRadius } from '@/theme';\nimport { useTheme } from '@/theme';\nimport { AnimatedBackground, ThemeSelector, SpeakingAnimation } from '@/components';\nimport Link from 'next/link';\n\nexport default function ShowcasePage() {\n  const { theme } = useTheme();\n  const colors = theme.colors;\n  const [inputValue, setInputValue] = useState('');\n  const [progressValue, setProgressValue] = useState(45);\n  const [selectedTab, setSelectedTab] = useState('Home');\n  const [isSpeaking, setIsSpeaking] = useState(false);\n\n  return (\n    &lt;Container&gt;\n      &lt;ThemeSelector /&gt;\n      &lt;AnimatedBackground intensity=\"medium\" color=\"primary\" /&gt;\n      \n      &lt;div\n        style={{\n          minHeight: '100vh',\n}",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "'use client';",

            "lineNumber": 2

            "lineNumber": 8

          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/components/auth/AuthProvider.tsx",
        "range": {

            "column": 1

        "contents": "'use client';\n\nimport React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';\nimport { useRouter, usePathname } from 'next/navigation';\nimport { useAuthStore } from '@/stores';\nimport { getOverrideUserToRestore } from '@/lib/auth-override';\n\n/**\n * Auth Provider Component\n * Initializes auth state and handles protected route redirects\n */\nexport function AuthProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {\n  const { user, isInitialized, initializeAuth } = useAuthStore();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const pathname = usePathname();\n  const [isReady, setIsReady] = useState(false);\n\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    // Initialize auth state on mount\n    let unsubscribe: (() =&gt; void) | null = null;\n    \n    initializeAuth().then((unsub) =&gt; {\n      unsubscribe = unsub;\n      // If no Supabase session but override is stored, restore override user so pages are visible\n      const overrideUser = getOverrideUserToRestore();\n      if (overrideUser) {\n        useAuthStore.getState().setUser(overrideUser);\n      }\n      setIsReady(true);\n    });\n    \n    return () =&gt; {\n      if (unsubscribe) {\n        unsubscribe();\n      }\n    };\n  }, [initializeAuth]);\n\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    // Handle protected route redirects\n    if (!isReady || !isInitialized) return;\n  }\n}",
        "signatures": {},

        "contents": "const MENU_ITEMS: MenuItem[] = [\n  {\n    name: 'Preferences',\n    description: 'Customize your experience',\n    icon: Settings,\n    href: '/sanctuary/settings',\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'Notifications',\n    description: 'Manage your notification settings',\n    icon: Bell,\n    href: '/sanctuary/reminders',\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'Credits',\n    description: 'View and manage your credits',\n    icon: CreditCard,\n    href: '/sanctuary/credits',\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'Privacy &amp; Security',\n    description: 'Manage your privacy settings',\n    icon: Shield,\n    href: '/sanctuary/settings',\n  },\n];\n\nexport default function ProfilePage() {\n  const { theme } = useTheme();\n  const colors = theme.colors;\n  const router = useRouter();\n\n  // TODO: Get actual user data from auth context/store\n  const user = {\n    name: 'User Name',\n    email: 'user@example.com',\n  };\n\n  return (\n    &lt;Container&gt;\n      &lt;AnimatedBackground intensity=\"medium\"\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "contents": "'use client';\n\nimport React from 'react';\nimport { Container, Typography, Button } from '@/components';\nimport { useTheme } from '@/theme';\nimport { AnimatedBackground, Logo, ThemeSelector } from '@/components';\nimport { spacing, borderRadius } from '@/theme';\nimport Link from 'next/link';\nimport {\n  Sparkles,\n  Brain,\n  Music,\n  Zap,\n  Shield,\n  Heart,\n  ArrowRight,\n  Check,\n  Play,\n  Users,\n  Star,\n  ChevronRight,\n} from 'lucide-react';\n\nexport default function LandingPage() {\n  const { theme } = useTheme();\n  const colors = theme.colors;\n\n  const features = [\n    {\n      icon: Brain,\n      title: 'Neuroplasticity-Based',\n      description: 'Scientifically designed to rewire your subconscious mind through voice-first experiences',\n      color: colors.accent.primary,\n    },\n    {\n      icon: Music,\n      title: 'Voice Cloning',\n      description: 'Create personalized affirmations and rituals with your own voice or choose from our library',\n      color: colors.accent.secondary,\n    },\n    {\n      icon: Sparkles,\n      title: 'AI-Powered Creation',\n      description: 'Conversational AI guides you through creating transformative content tailored to your goals',\n      color: colors.accent.tertiary,\n    },\n    {\n      icon: Shield,\n      title: 'Privacy First',\n      description: 'Your voice data is encrypted and stored securely. You own your transformation journey',\n      color: colors.accent.primary,\n    },\n    {\n      icon: Heart,\n      title: 'Three Content Types',\n      description: 'Affirmations for cognitive re-patterning, Meditations for state induction, Rituals for identity encoding',\n      color: colors.accent.secondary,\n    },\n    {\n      icon: Zap,\n      title: 'Practice is Free',\n      description: 'Unlimited replay of your content. Credits only used for creation, never for practice',\n      color: colors.accent.tertiary,\n    },\n  ];\n\n  const benefits = [\n    'Transform your subconscious mind',\n,\n  ];\n}",
        "signatures": {},

        "contents": "const QUICK_ACTIONS: QuickAction[] = [\n  {\n    name: 'Create New',\n    description: 'Start a new ritual or affirmation',\n    icon: Sparkles,\n    href: '/create',\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'Set Reminder',\n    description: 'Schedule your practice',\n    icon: Bell,\n    href: '/sanctuary/reminders',\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'Learn &amp; Transform',\n    description: 'Understand the science of transformation',\n    icon: GraduationCap,\n    href: '/sanctuary/learn',\n  },\n];\n\nconst MENU_ITEMS: MenuItem[] = [\n  {\n    name: 'Library',\n    description: 'Your rituals and affirmations',\n    icon: Library,\n    href: '/library',\n    count: 0,\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'Progress',\n    description: 'Track your transformation journey',\n    icon: TrendingUp,\n    href: '/sanctuary/progress',\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'Credits',\n    description: 'Manage your credits',\n    icon: CreditCard,\n    href: '/sanctuary/credits',\n    count: 50,\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'Settings',\n    description: 'Customize your experience',\n    icon: Settings,\n    href: '/sanctuary/settings',\n  },\n];\n\nexport default function HomePage() {\n  const { theme } = useTheme();\n}",

        "contents": ";\n}\n\n/**\n * Logo Component - waQup text-only logo\n * \n * Features:\n * - Text-only logo (no icon/image)\n * - Very thin font weight (300 - light) for elegant, minimal appearance\n * - Q letter highlighted in purple gradient\n * - Matches the thin, elegant logo style from design reference\n */\nexport const Logo: React.FC&lt;LogoProps&gt; = (props) =&gt; {\n  const {\n    size = 'md',\n    showIcon = false, // Default to false - logo is now text-only\n    href,\n    className = '',\n  } = props;\n  const { theme } = useTheme();\n  const colors = theme.colors;\n\n  // When href is omitted, default to '/'. When href={undefined} is passed (e.g. parent wraps in Link), render no link to avoid nested &lt;a&gt;.\n  const hasHrefProp = 'href' in props;\n  const linkHref = !hasHrefProp ? '/' : (href ?? '/');\n  const renderAsLink = !hasHrefProp || (href != null &amp;&amp; href !== '');\n\n  const sizeMap = {\n    sm: { icon: '24px', fontSize: '20px', gap: spacing.sm },\n    md: { icon: '32px', fontSize: '24px', gap: spacing.md },\n    lg: { icon: '48px', fontSize: '32px', gap: spacing.lg },\n  };\n\n  const { icon, fontSize, gap } = sizeMap[size];\n\n  const logoContent = (\n    &lt;div\n      style=\n  );\n;",
        "signatures": {},

            "lineNumber": 19

          {

            "text": " * - Matches the thin, elegant logo style from design reference",
            "lineNumber": 27

          {

            "lineNumber": 34

            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "  const { theme } = useTheme();",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "  const colors = theme.colors;",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "  // When href is omitted, default to '/'. When href={undefined} is passed (e.g. parent wraps in Link), render no link to avoid nested &lt;a&gt;.",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "  const hasHrefProp = 'href' in props;",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "  const linkHref = !hasHrefProp ? '/' : (href ?? '/');",
            "lineNumber": 41

            "lineNumber": 42

            "lineNumber": 43

          {

            "lineNumber": 44

          {

            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/app/page.tsx",
        "range": {

            "line": 494,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function LandingPage() {\n\n        &lt;section\n          style={{\n            padding: &#96;${spacing.xxl} ${spacing.xl}&#96;,\n            textAlign: 'center',\n            maxWidth: '1200px',\n            margin: '0 auto',\n            minHeight: '80vh',\n            display: 'flex',\n            flexDirection: 'column',\n            justifyContent: 'center',\n            alignItems: 'center',\n          }}\n        &gt;\n          {/* AI POWERED Badge */}\n          &lt;div\n            style={{\n              padding: &#96;${spacing.xs} ${spacing.md}&#96;,\n              borderRadius: borderRadius.full,\n              background: &#96;${colors.accent.tertiary}20&#96;,\n              border: &#96;1px solid ${colors.accent.tertiary}40&#96;,\n              display: 'inline-block',\n              marginBottom: spacing.lg,\n            }}\n          &gt;\n            &lt;Typography variant=\"small\" style={{ color: colors.accent.tertiary, fontWeight: 600, textTransform: 'uppercase', letterSpacing: '0.5px' }}&gt;\n              AI POWERED\n            &lt;/Typography&gt;\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n\n          {/* Large Logo - Text Only, Very Thin Font Weight */}\n          &lt;div\n            style={{\n              fontSize: 'clamp(64px, 12vw, 120px)',\n              fontWeight: 300, // Very thin weight (light) - matches example\n              lineHeight: 1,\n              marginBottom: spacing.lg,\n              color: colors.text.primary,\n              letterSpacing: '-2px',\n              fontFamily: 'system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, \"Helvetica Neue\", sans-serif',\n              WebkitFontSmoothing: 'antialiased',\n              MozOsxFontSmoothing: 'grayscale',\n              textRendering: 'optimizeLegibility',\n            }}\n          &gt;\n            &lt;span style={{ fontWeight: 300, color: colors.text.primary }}&gt;wa&lt;/span&gt;\n            &lt;span style={{ color: colors.accent.tertiary, fontWeight: 300 }}&gt;Q&lt;/span&gt;\n            &lt;span style={{ fontWeight: 300, color: colors.text.primary }}&gt;up&lt;/span&gt;\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n\n          {/* Tagline */}\n          &lt;Typography\n            variant=\"body\"\n}",

        "contents": "import type { NextRequest } from 'next/server';\n\n/**\n * Proxy for protected routes\n * Checks authentication state and redirects if needed\n *\n * Note: This is a basic implementation. For production, you may want to\n * verify the session server-side or use a more robust approach.\n */\nexport function proxy(request: NextRequest) {\n  const { pathname } = request.nextUrl;\n\n  // Public routes that don't require authentication\n  const publicRoutes = [\n    '/',\n    '/login',\n    '/signup',\n    '/forgot-password',\n    '/reset-password',\n    '/confirm-email',\n    '/auth/beta-signup',\n    '/how-it-works',\n    '/pricing',\n    '/pages',\n    '/sitemap',\n  ];\n\n  // Check if route is public\n  const isPublicRoute =\n    publicRoutes.some((route) =&gt; pathname === route || pathname.startsWith(route + '/')) ||\n    pathname.startsWith('/showcase') ||\n    pathname.startsWith('/onboarding');\n}",

        "contents": "export default function LoginPage() {\nconst handleGoogleSignIn = async \n\n    try {\n      if (!supabase) throw new Error('Authentication service unavailable');\n      const returnUrl = typeof window !== 'undefined' ? new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get('next') || '/home' : '/home';\n      const { error: oauthError } = await supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth({\n        provider: 'google',\n        options: {\n          redirectTo: &#96;${typeof window !== 'undefined' ? window.location.origin : ''}/auth/callback?next=${encodeURIComponent(returnUrl)}&#96;,\n          queryParams: { access_type: 'offline', prompt: 'consent' },\n        },\n      });\n      if (oauthError) throw oauthError;\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error('Google Sign In error:', err);\n      setError(normalizeAuthError(err));\n    } finally {\n      setGoogleLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const onSubmit = async (data: LoginFormData) =&gt; {\n    setError(null);\n    const result = await login(data.email, data.password);\n\n    if (result.success) {\n      router.push('/home');\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Try override login (env-configured admin/dev credentials)\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch('/api/auth/override',\n;\n;\n}",

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

I have enough context. Let me create a comprehensive design consistency analysis and list of features to adopt, plus a page-by-page review checklist. The user wants this as information/reference - not edits.
</details></think>

---


Here’s an analysis and checklist based on your design system and current usage.

---

## 1. Design tokens (use consistently)

### Borders & radius
- **Tokens**: `borderRadius.sm` (8px), `borderRadius.md` (12px), `borderRadius.lg` (16px), `borderRadius.xl` (24px), `borderRadius.full` (9999px)
- **Glass surfaces**: `border: 1px solid ${colors.glass.border}`
- **Auth/form cards**: `borderRadius.xl` (24px)
- **Buttons/pills/tags**: `borderRadius.full` for pills; `borderRadius.md` for buttons

### Spacing
- **Tokens**: xs(4), sm(8), md(16), lg(24), xl(32), xxl(48), xxxl(64)
- **Page padding**: `spacing.xl` (32px) for main content
- **Card padding**: `spacing.xxxl` (64px) for auth cards; `spacing.xl` or `spacing.lg` for smaller cards
- **Section gaps**: `spacing.xl` between sections; `spacing.lg` between related items
- **Form spacing**: `spacing.lg` between inputs; `spacing.md` between label and input
- **Max content width**: `1400px` for main app; `480px` for auth forms; `800–900px` for marketing/utility pages

### Glass surfaces
- **Auth/form cards**: `colors.glass.opaque`, `backdrop-filter: blur(20px)`, `border: 1px solid ${colors.glass.border}`, `borderRadius.xl`
- **Inputs**: `colors.glass.transparent`
- **Cards/panels**: `colors.glass.opaque` or `glass.transparent` depending on context

---

## 2. Header / navigation

Right now:
- Only **Landing** (`/`) and **How It Works** (`/how-it-works`) have a shared-style nav
- Auth, main app, sanctuary, onboarding, showcase, etc. each implement their own (or none)

For consistency:
- Introduce a reusable **AppHeader** (or similar) with Logo, links, auth CTAs
- Use it in layouts instead of per-page nav
- Variants: `public` (Logo + How It Works, Pricing, Sign In, Get Started) vs `authenticated` (Logo + Home, Library, Create, Profile, Logout)

---

## 3. Design features to standardize

| # | Feature | Spec / rule |
|---|--------|-------------|
| 1 | **Page wrapper** | `minHeight: 100vh`, `position: relative`, `overflow: hidden` |
| 2 | **AnimatedBackground** | Use on all main pages; `intensity`: "high" for landing, "medium" elsewhere |
| 3 | **Mystical gradient overlay** | `position: fixed`, `inset: 0`, `background: colors.gradients.mystical`, `pointerEvents: 'none'`, `zIndex: 0` |
| 4 | **Content container** | `maxWidth: 1400px`, `margin: '0 auto'`, `position: relative`, `zIndex: 1`, `padding: spacing.xl` |
| 5 | **Section header** | `Typography variant="h1"` with `marginBottom: spacing.sm`, subtitle `Typography variant="body"` with `marginBottom: spacing.xl` |
| 6 | **Glass cards** | `padding: spacing.xxxl` (auth) or `spacing.lg/xl` (others), `borderRadius.xl`, `glass.opaque`, `backdrop-filter: blur(20px)` |
| 7 | **Input containers** | `background: colors.glass.transparent`, `marginBottom: spacing.lg` |
| 8 | **Buttons** | Primary `height: 52px`, `fontSize: 16px`, `fontWeight: 600` for main CTAs |
| 9 | **Divider** | 1px line `colors.glass.border`, "Or continue with" in `text.tertiary`, uppercase |
| 10 | **Typography hierarchy** | h1 (32px) → h2 (24px) → h3 (20px) → h4 (18px) → body (16px) → caption (14px) → small (12px) |
| 11 | **Link styles** | Accent `colors.accent.primary`, `textDecoration: 'none'`, `fontWeight: 600` |
| 12 | **Error/success messages** | `padding: spacing.md`, `borderRadius: borderRadius.md`, `background: ${colors.error/success}20`, `border: 1px solid ${colors.error/success}` |
| 13 | **ThemeSelector** | Present on all layouts (already used) |
| 14 | **Back links** | ArrowRight rotated 180° + "Back to home" or similar, `colors.text.secondary` |
| 15 | **Empty states** | Centered content, `Typography` + optional icon, helpful message and CTA |

---

## 4. Page inventory for review

| # | Page / route group | Route(s) | Current issues to check |
|---|--------------------|----------|--------------------------|
| 1 | Landing | `/` | Reference; has nav |
| 2 | Auth | `/login`, `/signup`, `/forgot-password`, `/reset-password`, `/confirm-email` | No shared header; spacing/glass consistency |
| 3 | Main app | `/home`, `/library`, `/create`, `/profile` | No shared nav; section headers vary |
| 4 | Marketing | `/how-it-works`, `/pricing` | Nav present; spacing consistency |
| 5 | Sanctuary | `/sanctuary`, `/sanctuary/credits`, etc. | No shared nav; layout consistency |
| 6 | Onboarding | `/onboarding`, `/onboarding/profile`, etc. | No shared nav; flow consistency |
| 7 | Utility | `/showcase`, `/pages`, `/sitemap` | Layout and spacing consistency |
| 8 | Auth special | `/auth/beta-signup` | Match auth design system |

---

## 5. Suggested review order

1. **Create shared AppHeader** – centralize nav/header logic
2. **Landing** (`/`) – reference for nav, spacing, and gradients
3. **Auth** – login, signup, forgot/reset, confirm-email (same borders, spacing, glass)
4. **Main app** – home, library, create, profile (shared header + layout)
5. **Marketing** – how-it-works, pricing (shared header + layout)
6. **Sanctuary** – all sanctuary routes (shared header + layout)
7. **Onboarding** – all onboarding routes (shared header + flow)
8. **Utility** – showcase, pages, sitemap (layout + spacing)
9. **Auth special** – beta-signup (align with auth design)

---

## 6. Quick reference

**Import from theme:**
```ts
import { spacing, borderRadius } from '@/theme';
import { useTheme } from '@/theme';
const { theme } = useTheme();
const colors = theme.colors;
```

**Standard card:**
```ts
padding: spacing.xxxl,  // or spacing.xl for smaller cards
borderRadius: borderRadius.xl,
background: colors.glass.opaque,
backdropFilter: 'blur(20px)',
WebkitBackdropFilter: 'blur(20px)',
border: `1px solid ${colors.glass.border}`,
boxShadow: `0 16px 64px ${colors.mystical?.glow ?? 'rgba(0,0,0,0.1)'}40`,
```

**Standard content container:**
```ts
maxWidth: '1400px',
margin: '0 auto',
position: 'relative',
zIndex: 1,
padding: spacing.xl,
```

You can use this as a checklist when going through each page to align borders, spacing, and headers.

            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": " * Logo Component - waQup text-only logo",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": " * ",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": " * Features:",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": " * - Text-only logo (no icon/image)",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": " * - Very thin font weight (300 - light) for elegant, minimal appearance",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": " * - Q letter highlighted in purple gradient",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": " * - Matches the thin, elegant logo style from design reference",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 28
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3314785063266754
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/components/shared/Logo.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 28
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 93,
            "column": 2
          }
        },
        "contents": "export const Logo: React.FC&lt;LogoProps&gt; = \n\n\n  const logoContent = (\n    &lt;div\n      style={{\n        display: 'flex',\n        alignItems: 'center',\n        justifyContent: 'center',\n      }}\n      className={className}\n    &gt;\n      {/* Text-only logo - no icon/image */}\n      &lt;div\n        style={{\n          color: colors.text.primary,\n          fontWeight: 300, // Very thin weight (light) - matches example\n          letterSpacing: '-1px', // Tighter letter spacing like the large centered logo\n          fontSize: fontSize,\n          lineHeight: 1,\n          fontFamily: 'system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, \"Helvetica Neue\", sans-serif',\n          // Ensure consistent thin thickness across all characters\n          WebkitFontSmoothing: 'antialiased',\n          MozOsxFontSmoothing: 'grayscale',\n          fontFeatureSettings: '\"liga\" 1, \"kern\" 1', // Enable ligatures and kerning for consistent rendering\n          textRendering: 'optimizeLegibility',\n          // Match the style from the example - very thin, elegant, consistent\n        }}\n      &gt;\n        &lt;span style={{ fontWeight: 300, color: colors.text.primary }}&gt;wa&lt;/span&gt;\n        &lt;span style={{ color: colors.accent.tertiary, fontWeight: 300 }}&gt;Q&lt;/span&gt;\n        &lt;span style={{ fontWeight: 300, color: colors.text.primary }}&gt;up&lt;/span&gt;\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n    &lt;/div&gt;\n  );\n\n  if (renderAsLink) {\n    return (\n      &lt;Link href={linkHref} style={{ textDecoration: 'none', display: 'inline-block' }}&gt;\n        {logoContent}\n      &lt;/Link&gt;\n    );\n  }\n\n  return logoContent;\n};",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/components/auth/AuthProvider.tsx",
        "range": {

            "line": 83,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export function AuthProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {\n\n [initializeAuth]);\n\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    // Handle protected route redirects\n    if (!isReady || !isInitialized) return;\n\n    const publicRoutes = [\n      '/',\n      '/login',\n      '/signup',\n      '/forgot-password',\n      '/reset-password',\n      '/confirm-email',\n      '/auth/beta-signup',\n      '/how-it-works',\n      '/pricing',\n      '/pages',\n      '/sitemap',\n    ];\n    const isPublicRoute =\n      publicRoutes.includes(pathname) ||\n      pathname.startsWith('/showcase') ||\n      pathname.startsWith('/onboarding');\n    const isProtectedRoute =\n      pathname.startsWith('/home') ||\n      pathname.startsWith('/library') ||\n      pathname.startsWith('/create') ||\n      pathname.startsWith('/profile') ||\n      pathname.startsWith('/sanctuary');\n\n    if (isProtectedRoute &amp;&amp; !user) {\n      // Redirect to login if trying to access protected route without auth\n      router.push('/login');\n    } else if\n  }\n}",
        "signatures": {

      "codeBlock": {

        "contents": "'use client';\n\nimport React from 'react';\nimport { useTheme } from '@/theme';\nimport { Button } from '@/components';\nimport { spacing, borderRadius } from '@/theme';\n\nexport const ThemeSelector: React.FC = () =&gt; {\n  const { themeName, setTheme, availableThemes, theme } = useTheme();\n\n  const themeNames: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {\n    'mystical-purple': 'Mystical Purple',\n    'professional-blue': 'Professional Blue',\n    'serene-green': 'Serene Green',\n    'golden-sunset': 'Golden Sunset',\n    'cosmic-dark': 'Cosmic Dark',\n    'minimalist-light': 'Minimalist Light',\n  };\n\n  return (\n    &lt;div\n      style={{\n        position: 'fixed',\n        top: spacing.md,\n        right: spacing.md,\n        zIndex: 1000,\n        display: 'flex',\n        flexDirection: 'column',\n        gap: spacing.xs,\n        padding: spacing.md,\n        borderRadius: borderRadius.md,\n        background: theme.colors.glass.light,\n        backdropFilter: 'blur(10px)',\n        WebkitBackdropFilter: 'blur(10px)',\n        border: &#96;1px solid ${theme.colors.glass.border}&#96;,\n        boxShadow: '0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)',\n      }}\n    &gt;\n      &lt;div style={{ fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 600, color: theme.colors.text.secondary, marginBottom: spacing.xs }}&gt;\n        Theme\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n      &lt;div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: spacing.xs }}&gt;\n        {availableThemes.map((name) =&gt; (\n          &lt;Button\n            key={name}\n            variant={themeName === name ? 'primary' : 'outline'}\n            size=\"sm\"\n            onClick={() =&gt; setTheme(name)}\n            style={{\n              fontSize: '11px',\n              padding: &#96;${spacing.xs} ${spacing.sm}&#96;,\n              whiteSpace: 'nowrap',\n            }}\n          &gt;\n            {themeNames[name] || name}\n          &lt;/Button&gt;\n        ))}\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n    &lt;/div&gt;\n  );\n};",
        "signatures": {},

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/components/auth/AuthProvider.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 83,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "'use client';\n\nimport React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';\nimport { useRouter, usePathname } from 'next/navigation';\nimport { useAuthStore } from '@/stores';\nimport { getOverrideUserToRestore } from '@/lib/auth-override';\n\n/**\n * Auth Provider Component\n * Initializes auth state and handles protected route redirects\n */\nexport function AuthProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {\n  const { user, isInitialized, initializeAuth } = useAuthStore();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const pathname = usePathname();\n  const [isReady, setIsReady] = useState(false);\n\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    // Initialize auth state on mount\n    let unsubscribe: (() =&gt; void) | null = null;\n    \n    initializeAuth().then((unsub) =&gt; {\n      unsubscribe = unsub;\n      // If no Supabase session but override is stored, restore override user so pages are visible\n      const overrideUser = getOverrideUserToRestore();\n      if (overrideUser) {\n        useAuthStore.getState().setUser(overrideUser);\n      }\n      setIsReady(true);\n    });\n    \n    return () =&gt; {\n      if (unsubscribe) {\n        unsubscribe();\n      }\n    };\n  }, [initializeAuth]);\n\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    // Handle protected route redirects\n    if (!isReady || !isInitialized) return;\n  }\n}",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "'use client';",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "import { useRouter, usePathname } from 'next/navigation';",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores';",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "import { getOverrideUserToRestore } from '@/lib/auth-override';",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": " * Auth Provider Component",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": " * Initializes auth state and handles protected route redirects",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "export function AuthProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {",
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const { user, isInitialized, initializeAuth } = useAuthStore();",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "  const router = useRouter();",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "  const pathname = usePathname();",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "  const [isReady, setIsReady] = useState(false);",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Initialize auth state on mount",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "    let unsubscribe: (() =&gt; void) | null = null;",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "    initializeAuth().then((unsub) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "      unsubscribe = unsub;",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "      // If no Supabase session but override is stored, restore override user so pages are visible",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "      const overrideUser = getOverrideUserToRestore();",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (overrideUser) {",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "        useAuthStore.getState().setUser(overrideUser);",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "      setIsReady(true);",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Handle protected route redirects",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },

            "lineNumber": 41

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/components/ui/Icon.tsx",
        "range": {

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 99,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "/**\n * Icon component wrapper for Lucide React icons\n * Provides consistent styling and theme integration\n */\nexport const Icon: React.FC&lt;IconProps&gt; = ({\n  name,\n  size = 24,\n  color,\n  strokeWidth = 2,\n  className,\n  style,\n}) =&gt; {\n  const { theme } = useTheme();\n  const colors = theme.colors;\n\n  // Get the icon component from Lucide\n  const IconComponent = LucideIcons[name] as React.ComponentType&lt;{\n    size?: number | string;\n    color?: string;\n    strokeWidth?: number;\n    className?: string;\n    style?: React.CSSProperties;\n  }&gt;;\n\n  if (!IconComponent) {\n    console.warn(&#96;Icon \"${name}\" not found in Lucide React&#96;);\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  // Use theme color if no color specified\n  const iconColor = color || colors.text.primary;\n\n  return (\n    &lt;IconComponent\n      size={size}\n      color={iconColor}\n      strokeWidth={strokeWidth}\n      className={className}\n      style={{\n        display: 'inline-block',\n        flexShrink: 0,\n        ...style,\n      }}\n    /&gt;\n  );\n};\n\n/**\n * Pre-configured icon components for common use cases\n */\nexport const IconButton: React.FC&lt;IconProps &amp; { onClick?: () =&gt; void }&gt; = ({\n  name,\n  size = 20,\n  color,\n  onClick,\n  ...props\n})\n;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [

            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!IconComponent) {",
            "lineNumber": 40

            "lineNumber": 47

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/components/ui/Container.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 53,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export const Container: React.FC&lt;ContainerProps&gt; = ({\n  variant = 'primary',\n  padding = true,\n  maxWidth = 'lg',\n  children,\n  style,\n  className,\n  ...props\n}) =&gt; {\n  const containerStyle: React.CSSProperties = {\n    width: '100%',\n    ...(variant === 'primary' &amp;&amp; { backgroundColor: colors.background.primary }),\n    ...(variant === 'secondary' &amp;&amp; { backgroundColor: colors.background.secondary }),\n    ...(variant === 'transparent' &amp;&amp; { backgroundColor: 'transparent' }),\n    ...(padding &amp;&amp; { padding: spacing.md }),\n    ...(maxWidth !== 'full' &amp;&amp; {\n      maxWidth: getMaxWidth(maxWidth),\n      marginLeft: 'auto',\n      marginRight: 'auto',\n    }),\n    ...style,\n  };\n\n  return (\n    &lt;div style={containerStyle} className={className} {...props}&gt;\n      {children}\n    &lt;/div&gt;\n  );\n};\n\nfunction getMaxWidth(size: string): string {\n  switch (size)\n}",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "lineNumber": 20

            "text": "    ...(variant === 'primary' &amp;&amp; { backgroundColor: colors.background.primary }),",

            "lineNumber": 23

            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {

          {

            "lineNumber": 35

          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/components/ui/Icon.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 60,
            "column": 2
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 99,
            "column": 2
          }
        },
        "contents": "/**\n * Pre-configured icon components for common use cases\n */\nexport const IconButton: React.FC&lt;IconProps &amp; { onClick?: () =&gt; void }&gt; = ({\n  name,\n  size = 20,\n  color,\n  onClick,\n  ...props\n}) =&gt; {\n  const { theme } = useTheme();\n  const colors = theme.colors;\n\n  return (\n    &lt;button\n      onClick={onClick}\n      style={{\n        background: 'transparent',\n        border: 'none',\n        cursor: 'pointer',\n        padding: '4px',\n        display: 'inline-flex',\n        alignItems: 'center',\n        justifyContent: 'center',\n        borderRadius: '4px',\n        transition: 'all 0.2s ease',\n      }}\n      onMouseEnter={(e) =&gt; {\n        e.currentTarget.style.background = colors.glass.light;\n      }}\n      onMouseLeave={(e) =&gt; {\n        e.currentTarget.style.background = 'transparent';\n      }}\n    &gt;\n      &lt;Icon name={name} size={size} color={color} {...props} /&gt;\n    &lt;/button&gt;\n  );\n};",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "lineNumber": 79

            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "        transition: 'all 0.2s ease',",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "      }}",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "      onMouseEnter={(e) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 90

          {

            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {

        "contents": "'use client';\n\nimport React, { useCallback, useMemo } from 'react';\nimport { spacing, borderRadius } from '@/theme';\nimport { useTheme } from '@/theme';\nimport { Typography } from './Typography';\nimport { Loading } from './Loading';\nimport { getTextColor, getTextVariant } from '@waqup/shared/utils';\n\nexport interface ButtonProps extends React.ButtonHTMLAttributes&lt;HTMLButtonElement&gt; {\n  variant?: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'outline' | 'text' | 'ghost';\n  size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg';\n  loading?: boolean;\n  fullWidth?: boolean;\n  children: React.ReactNode;\n}\n\nexport const Button: React.FC&lt;ButtonProps&gt; = (\n;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "'use client';",

            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "export interface ButtonProps extends React.ButtonHTMLAttributes&lt;HTMLButtonElement&gt; {",

          {

        "contents": "import React from 'react';\nimport * as LucideIcons from 'lucide-react';\nimport { useTheme } from '@/theme';\n\nexport type IconName = keyof typeof LucideIcons;\n\nexport interface IconProps {\n  name: IconName;\n  size?: number | string;\n;\n}",

            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export const Card: React.FC&lt;CardProps&gt; = ({\n  variant = 'default',\n  pressable = false,\n  onPress,\n  header,\n  footer,\n  children,\n  style,\n  className,\n  ...props\n}) =&gt; {\n  const { theme } = useTheme();\n  const colors = theme.colors;\n\n  const cardStyle: React.CSSProperties = {\n    borderRadius: borderRadius.lg,\n    backgroundColor: colors.glass.opaque, // bg-white/5 (matches old app: bg-white/5)\n    backdropFilter: 'blur(20px)', // backdrop-blur-xl (matches old app)\n    WebkitBackdropFilter: 'blur(20px)',\n    border: &#96;1px solid ${colors.glass.border}&#96;, // border-white/10 (matches old app)\n    padding: spacing.md,\n    boxShadow: variant === 'elevated' \n      ? &#96;0 8px 32px ${colors.mystical.glow}40&#96; \n      : variant === 'flat' \n        ? &#96;0 2px 8px ${colors.mystical.glow}20&#96; \n        : &#96;0 4px 16px ${colors.mystical.glow}30&#96;,\n    transition: 'all 0.2s ease-in-out',\n    ...(pressable &amp;&amp; {\n      cursor: 'pointer',\n    }),\n    ...style,\n  };\n\n  const content = (\n    &lt;&gt;\n      {header &amp;&amp; &lt;div style={{ marginBottom: spacing.md }}&gt;{header}&lt;/div&gt;}\n      &lt;div style={{ flex: 1 }}&gt;{children}&lt;/div&gt;\n      {footer &amp;&amp; &lt;div style={{ marginTop: spacing.md }}&gt;{footer}&lt;/div&gt;}\n    &lt;/&gt;\n  );\n\n  if (pressable) {\n    return (\n      &lt;div\n        style={cardStyle}\n        className={className}\n        onClick={onPress}\n        onMouseEnter={(e) =&gt; {\n          e.currentTarget.style.transform = 'translateY(-2px)';\n          e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = &#96;0 8px 32px ${colors.mystical.glow}60&#96;;\n        }}\n        onMouseLeave={(e) =&gt; {\n          e.currentTarget.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';\n          e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = variant === 'elevated' \n            ? &#96;0 8px 32px ${colors.mystical.glow}40&#96; \n            : variant === 'flat' \n              ? &#96;0 2px 8px ${colors.mystical.glow}20&#96; \n              : &#96;0 4px 16px ${colors.mystical.glow}30&#96;;\n        }}\n        {...props}\n      &gt;\n        {content}\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    &lt;div style={cardStyle}\n;",

        "contents": "export const Button: React.FC&lt;ButtonProps&gt; = \n\n\n  return (\n    &lt;button\n      style={buttonStyle}\n      disabled={disabled || loading}\n      className={className}\n      aria-busy={loading}\n      aria-disabled={disabled || loading}\n      aria-label={typeof children === 'string' ? children : undefined}\n      onMouseEnter={(e) =&gt; {\n        if (variant === 'primary' &amp;&amp; !disabled &amp;&amp; !loading) {\n          e.currentTarget.style.background = colors.gradients.primaryHover;\n        }\n      }}\n      onMouseLeave={(e) =&gt; {\n        if (variant === 'primary' &amp;&amp; !disabled &amp;&amp; !loading) {\n          e.currentTarget.style.background = colors.gradients.primary;\n        }\n      }}\n      {...props}\n    &gt;\n      {loading ? (\n        &lt;span style={{ display: 'inline-flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center' }}&gt;\n          &lt;Loading variant=\"spinner\" size=\"sm\" color={variant === 'primary' ? 'white' : 'primary'} /&gt;\n        &lt;/span&gt;\n      ) : (\n        &lt;Typography\n          as=\"span\"\n          variant={textVariant}\n          style={{\n            color: textColor,\n            textAlign: 'center',\n            display: 'inline-flex',\n            alignItems: 'center',\n            justifyContent: 'center',\n            gap: spacing.sm,\n            flexWrap: 'nowrap',\n          }}\n        &gt;\n          {children}\n        &lt;/Typography&gt;\n      )}\n    &lt;/button&gt;\n  );\n};\n\nfunction getBaseStyles(): React.CSSProperties {\n  return\n}",

            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export const Typography: React.FC&lt;TypographyProps&gt; = memo(({\n  variant = 'body',\n  color = 'primary',\n  as,\n  style,\n  children,\n  className,\n  ...props\n}) =&gt; {\n  const Tag = (as || getDefaultTag(variant)) as React.ElementType;\n  \n  // Filter out invalid CSS values (NaN, undefined, null)\n  const cleanStyle = style ? Object.fromEntries(\n    Object.entries(style).filter(([_, value]) =&gt; \n      value !== null &amp;&amp; value !== undefined &amp;&amp; !Number.isNaN(value)\n    )\n  ) : {};\n  \n  const textStyle = {\n    ...typography[variant],\n    color: colors.text[color],\n    ...cleanStyle,\n  };\n\n  return (\n    &lt;Tag style={textStyle} className={className} {...props}&gt;\n      {children}\n    &lt;/Tag&gt;\n  );\n});\n\nfunction getDefaultTag(variant: string): string {\n  switch (variant)\n}",
        "signatures": {},

            "text": "  const Tag = (as || getDefaultTag(variant)) as React.ElementType;",

            "lineNumber": 21
          },

            "text": "  // Filter out invalid CSS values (NaN, undefined, null)",

          },

        "contents": "export const AnimatedBackground: React.FC&lt;AnimatedBackgroundProps&gt; = \n\n\n  return (\n    &lt;div\n      style={{\n        position: 'fixed',\n        top: 0,\n        left: 0,\n        right: 0,\n        bottom: 0,\n        pointerEvents: 'none',\n        zIndex: -10,\n        overflow: 'hidden',\n      }}\n    &gt;\n      {/* Base gradient background (MATCHES OLD APP: bg-gradient-to-br from-black via-purple-900/20 to-black) */}\n      &lt;div\n        style={{\n          position: 'absolute',\n          inset: 0,\n          background: &#96;linear-gradient(to bottom right, ${colors.background.primary}, rgba(88, 28, 135, 0.2), ${colors.background.primary})&#96;,\n        }}\n      /&gt;\n\n      {/* Animated orb 1 (MATCHES OLD APP: purple-500/30 blur-[100px]) */}\n      &lt;div\n        style={{\n          position: 'absolute',\n          top: '25%',\n          left: '25%',\n          width: '500px',\n          height: '500px',\n          borderRadius: '50%',\n          background: &#96;radial-gradient(circle, ${hexToRgba('#A855F7', 0.3)}, transparent)&#96;, // purple-500/30\n          filter: 'blur(100px)',\n          animation: 'float 2s ease-in-out infinite',\n        }}\n      /&gt;\n\n      {/* Animated orb 2 (MATCHES OLD APP: indigo-500/30 blur-[120px]) */}\n      &lt;div\n        style={{\n          position: 'absolute',\n          bottom: '25%',\n          right: '25%',\n          width: '600px',\n          height: '600px',\n          borderRadius: '50%',\n          background:   animationDelay: '1s',\n        }}\n      /&gt;\n\n      {/* Radial gradient overlay (MATCHES OLD APP) */}\n      &lt;div\n        style={{\n          position: 'absolute',\n          inset: 0,\n          background: &#96;radial-gradient(circle at center, transparent 0%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8) 100%)&#96;,\n        }}\n      /&gt;\n\n      {/* CSS Animations */}\n      &lt;style jsx&gt;{&#96;\n        @keyframes float {\n          0%,\n          100% {\n            transform: translateY(0px) translateX(0px) scale(0.8);\n            opacity: 0;\n          }\n          50% {\n            transform:         "contents": "import React from 'react';\nimport { spacing, borderRadius, shadows } from '@/theme';\nimport { useTheme } from '@/theme';\n\nexport interface CardProps extends React.HTMLAttributes&lt;HTMLDivElement&gt; {\n  variant?: 'default' | 'elevated' | 'flat';\n  pressable?: boolean;\n  onPress?: () =&gt; void;\n  header?: React.ReactNode;\n  footer?: React.ReactNode;\n  children: React.ReactNode;\n}\n\nexport const Card: React.FC&lt;CardProps&gt; = (\n;",

        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},

        },
        "contents": "# Audio Components\n\n## SpeakingAnimation\n\nA **refined, professional** 4-page animated component with ChatGPT-like simplicity and futuristic glass-morphism design. Features clean minimalism, ample white space, and subtle animations that maintain a high-quality, professional feel.\n\n### 🎨 Design Philosophy\n\n- **ChatGPT-like Simplicity** - Clean, minimal design with focus on content\n- **Professional Glass-morphism** - Subtle translucent effects with backdrop blur\n- **Futuristic Vibes** - Refined, high-quality aesthetic without overwhelming visuals\n- **Ample White Space** - Clean layouts with breathing room\n- **Subtle Animations** - Smooth, professional transitions\n\n### ✨ Features\n\n- **4 Clean Pages**: Each page features elegant, minimal animations:\n  1. **Minimal Floating Orbs** - Three glass orbs with subtle floating motion\n  2. **Clean Frequency Bars** - 12 refined frequency bars with gentle pulsing\n  3. **Subtle Wave Pattern** - Layered concentric waves with soft expansion\n  4. **Minimal Rotating Rings** - Two rotating rings with clean lines\n\n- **Professional Effects**:\n  - 🪟 **Glass-morphism** - Subtle translucent cards with backdrop blur\n  - 🎨 **Clean Gradients** - Refined color transitions\n  - ✨ **Subtle Glows** - Minimal shadow effects\n  - 🌊 **Smooth Transitions** - Professional fade and slide animations\n\n- **Theme Integration**:\n  - Uses &#96;useTheme()&#96; hook for dynamic theming\n  - Respects theme colors and glass effects\n  - Fully responsive and accessible\n\n### 📦 Usage\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;tsx\nimport { SpeakingAnimation } from '@/components';\n\nfunction AudioPlayer() {\n  const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false);",
        "signatures": {},

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

I have a clear picture now. Let me create a comprehensive plan that covers:

1. **AppHeader component** - Reusable nav with public (Logo + How It Works + Pricing + Sign In + Get Started) and authenticated (Logo + Home + Library + Create + Profile + Logout) variants. Need to use useAuthStore to check if user is logged in.

2. **PageShell/PageWrapper component** - Shared wrapper with AnimatedBackground + mystical gradient + content container. Props: variant ('full' | 'centered' | 'content'), maxWidth, padding, showHeader.

3. **Design tokens reference file** - Create a design-tokens.ts or update docs with canonical values for card padding, borders, spacing between elements.

4. **Layout updates** - Add AppHeader to layouts. But there's a complexity: 
   - Auth pages: doc says "no Logo/Navigation/ThemeSelector" - so auth pages have NO header. Keep that.
   - Marketing (landing, how-it-works, pricing): public header
   - Main (home, library, create, profile): authenticated header  
   - Sanctuary: authenticated header (nested under main? or separate?)
   - Onboarding: maybe simplified header or no header
   - Showcase, pages, sitemap: public header? or minimal

5. **Layout structure** - Currently layouts only have ThemeSelector. We need to add AppHeader to layouts but:
   - (auth)/layout: NO header per design doc
   - (marketing)/layout: add public AppHeader
   - (main)/layout: add authenticated AppHeader  
   - sanctuary/layout: add authenticated AppHeader
   - (onboarding)/layout: add simplified header or back link

   Actually - landing (/) and marketing pages each have their OWN nav inline. So we could either:
   A) Add AppHeader to layouts and remove inline nav from each page
   B) Create AppHeader and use it in each page that needs it

   Option A is cleaner - put AppHeader in layout, and pages that need "no header" (auth) use (auth) layout. Pages with header get it from their layout.

6. **Page-by-page updates** - Each page needs to use consistent:
   - spacing tokens
   - borderRadius tokens
   - glass styles
   - content container maxWidth and padding
   - section headers (h1 + subtitle pattern)

Let me also consider: the landing page (/) is at app/page.tsx - it's not under (marketing). So we have:
- app/page.tsx (landing) - has own nav
- app/(marketing)/how-it-works, pricing - have own nav
- app/(auth)/* - no nav per spec
- app/(main)/* - no nav currently
- app/sanctuary/* - no nav
- app/(onboarding)/* - no nav
- app/showcase, pages, sitemap - no nav

So the plan:
1. Create AppHeader (public + authenticated variants)
2. Create PageShell for consistent page wrapper (AnimatedBackground + gradient + optional content container)
3. Update layouts to include AppHeader where appropriate
4. Remove duplicate nav from landing, how-it-works, pricing - get it from layout
5. Update all pages to use PageShell and design tokens consistently
6. Update docs (03-web-app-structure.md) with the new design pattern

For layouts - we need a structure. The root layout wraps everything. Then we have route groups. The challenge: landing (/) is NOT in (marketing), so it has its own layout... actually it uses root layout only. So:
- Root layout: ThemeProvider, AuthProvider
- We could add a "DefaultLayout" that includes AppHeader for public pages
- Or we add AppHeader to root layout and use pathname to show public vs authenticated vs none

Actually simpler: create layouts per section that include the appropriate header.
- (marketing) layout: AppHeader variant="public" - but landing is not in (marketing)
- We need landing to also have the header. Option: move landing into (marketing) as index, OR create a shared layout for "public with header" that both landing and marketing use.

Looking at the route structure:
- / is app/page.tsx
- /how-it-works is app/(marketing)/how-it-works/page.tsx
- /pricing is app/(marketing)/pricing/page.tsx

So landing is at root. The root layout wraps everything. We could:
1. Add a layout.tsx in app/ that wraps children with... nothing extra, just ThemeProvider/AuthProvider
2. For pages that need header, each page includes AppHeader - OR we use a layout group

Actually the cleanest: create a (public) route group for landing + marketing:
- app/(public)/page.tsx (move from app/page.tsx)
- app/(public)/how-it-works/page.tsx
- app/(public)/pricing/page.tsx
- app/(public)/layout.tsx with AppHeader variant="public"

But that would require moving files. Simpler: keep structure, add AppHeader to (marketing) layout. For landing (app/page.tsx), it's at root - we could add a layout for the root page... but app/page.tsx is a direct child of app/, so it uses app/layout.tsx. We can't add header to app/layout.tsx for all pages because auth shouldn't have it.

So the solution: header is added per layout. (auth) layout: no header. (marketing) layout: header. (main) layout: header. sanctuary layout: header. (onboarding) layout: header maybe. For landing (app/page.tsx), we need a layout. We could use a route group: app/(landing)/page.tsx with app/(landing)/layout.tsx. But that changes the path - (landing) is a route group so the path stays /. So we could do:
- app/(landing)/page.tsx - same as /
- app/(landing)/layout.tsx - includes AppHeader public
- app/(marketing)/layout.tsx - includes AppHeader public
- Merge (landing) and (marketing) into (public): app/(public)/page.tsx, app/(public)/how-it-works/page.tsx, app/(public)/pricing/page.tsx

That would restructure. Simpler approach: don't restructure. Create AppHeader component. Add it explicitly to each page that needs it (landing, how-it-works, pricing) - replace the inline nav. For (main) and sanctuary, add AppHeader to their layouts. So:
- Layouts: (main), sanctuary, (onboarding) get AppHeader in layout
- Pages: landing, how-it-works, pricing - replace inline nav with <AppHeader variant="public" />
- Auth: no header (already correct)

This way we don't move files. The header appears in the same place, just from a shared component instead of duplicated markup.
</details></think>

This plan unifies everything.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Create Shared Components\n\n### 1.1 AppHeader (&#96;packages/web/src/components/shared/AppHeader.tsx&#96;)\n\nReusable navigation header with two variants:\n\n| Variant | Use case | Content |\n|---------|----------|---------|\n| &#96;public&#96; | Landing, marketing, utility | Logo, How It Works, Pricing, Sign In, Get Started |\n| &#96;authenticated&#96; | Main app, sanctuary | Logo, Home, Library, Create, Profile, Logout |\n\n**Design spec:**\n- Container: &#96;padding: ${spacing.lg} ${spacing.xl}&#96;, &#96;maxWidth: 1400px&#96;, &#96;margin: 0 auto&#96;\n- Links: &#96;gap: spacing.lg&#96;, &#96;Typography variant=\"body\"&#96;, active link &#96;fontWeight: 600&#96;, inactive &#96;fontWeight: 400&#96;\n- Use &#96;useAuthStore()&#96; to select variant (show authenticated when user exists)\n- Use &#96;usePathname()&#96; for active link highlighting (current page gets accent color)\n- Export from [packages/web/src/components/shared/index.ts](packages/web/src/components/shared/index.ts)\n\n### 1.2 PageShell (&#96;packages/web/src/components/shared/PageShell.tsx&#96;)\n\nShared page wrapper that provides:\n\n- &#96;minHeight: 100vh&#96;, &#96;position: relative&#96;, &#96;overflow: hidden&#96;\n- &#96;AnimatedBackground&#96; (prop: &#96;intensity&#96; = \"medium\" | \"high\")\n- Mystical gradient overlay (&#96;colors.gradients.mystical&#96;, &#96;position: fixed&#96;, &#96;inset: 0&#96;, &#96;zIndex: 0&#96;)\n- Optional content container: &#96;maxWidth&#96;, &#96;padding: spacing.xl&#96;, &#96;position: relative&#96;, &#96;zIndex: 1&#96;\n\n**Props:**\n- &#96;intensity?: 'medium' | 'high'&#96; <think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

Layouts need to add AppHeader. For (main) and sanctuary - authenticated. For (marketing) - public. For (onboarding) - simplified. The layouts themselves don't have a page wrapper - they just render children. So the AppHeader needs to be inside the page content flow. The pages will have their own structure. The layout wraps the children - so if we add AppHeader to the layout, it will appear above the page content. But the pages have their own backgrounds and content structure. The AppHeader should be inside the visual flow - it needs the gradient/background behind it. So the structure would be:
- Layout: ThemeSelector, AppHeader, children
- Page: PageShell (or its own wrapper) with content

Actually - the PageShell has AnimatedBackground and gradient. If we put AppHeader in the layout, it would be a sibling to children. So the structure is:
```
<ThemeSelector />
<AppHeader />
{children}
```

The children (page) would typically have its own full-page div with background. So the AppHeader would be outside that - it would appear at the top, then the page content below. The page content might have its own background. Let me check - the home page has Container which wraps everything, and inside that AnimatedBackground + content. So the page has the full visual. If we add AppHeader to layout, it would render BEFORE the page. The page would then render below the header. So we'd have:
- AppHeader (no background of its own - it would need to be in a container that has the page background, or it would sit on top of whatever is behind it)
- Page content (with its own background)

Actually the way the landing page works - the structure is:
```
<div minHeight 100vh>
  <AnimatedBackground />
  <gradient overlay />
  <div zIndex 1>
    <nav>...</nav>
    <content>...</content>
  </div>
</div>
```

So the nav is INSIDE the page, as part of the same visual layer. The layout just wraps - it doesn't provide the page shell. So when we add AppHeader to layout, it will be:
```
<ThemeSelector />
<AppHeader />
{children}  // e.g. the whole page div with background
```

The AppHeader would appear above the page's root div. So we'd have:
- ThemeSelector (fixed position)
- AppHeader (static, at top)
- Page div (minHeight 100vh, etc.)

The AppHeader would need a background or the page background would need to extend behind it. Looking at the landing page - the nav is the first child of the zIndex 1 div, and that div has the gradient/background behind it (from the fixed overlay). So the header needs to be inside a structure that has the background. 

The layout wraps all pages in that section. So for (marketing) layout:
- ThemeSelector
- AppHeader
- children (the page)

The page (e.g. how-it-works) has:
```
<div minHeight 100vh>
  <AnimatedBackground />
  <gradient />
  <div zIndex 1>
    <nav>...</nav>  // we're removing this and using AppHeader from layout
    <content>...
  </div>
</div>
```

If AppHeader is in the layout, it renders outside the page's div. So we'd have:
```
<ThemeSelector />
<AppHeader />
<div minHeight 100vh>  // from page
  <AnimatedBackground />
  <gradient />
  <div zIndex 1>
    <content>...  // nav removed
  </div>
</div>
```

The AppHeader would be a sibling to the page div. The page div has position relative and contains the AnimatedBackground (position fixed) and gradient (position fixed). So the AnimatedBackground and gradient cover the whole viewport. The AppHeader, being before the page div, would appear above it in the DOM. The page div would push down. So we'd have:
- ThemeSelector (fixed top-right)
- AppHeader at top (normal flow)
- Page content (the div with background) - this would start below AppHeader

But wait - the AnimatedBackground and gradient in the page are position:fixed, so they cover the viewport regardless. The AppHeader would be in normal flow - it would have the default (transparent?) background, and the fixed background from the page would show through. So it could work - the AppHeader would be at the top, and the page's fixed background would extend behind everything. The key is that the page's root div doesn't have a background that would cover the header - the AnimatedBackground and gradient are fixed and overlay the whole viewport. So the header would be on top of that (with z-index from normal stacking). Actually the gradient has zIndex: 0 and the content has zIndex: 1. The AppHeader in the layout has no z-index - it would be in normal flow. So the stacking would be: 
1. AnimatedBackground (z-index -10 or similar, fixed)
2. Gradient overlay (fixed, z-index 0)
3. AppHeader (in layout, normal flow)
4. Page content div (in flow, with z-index 1 content inside)

The AppHeader and page content are siblings. Both would be in the same stacking context. The page's inner content has z-index 1 relative to the gradient. The AppHeader would be visible - it would sit at the top. Good.

Let me add AppHeader to the layouts. For (main) and sanctuary - variant authenticated. But actually the AppHeader component auto-detects based on user - so we can just use <AppHeader /> and it will show the right variant. For (marketing) - public. For (onboarding) - simplified. Let me add them. I need to wrap the layout content in a structure - actually the AppHeader needs to be a client component because it uses usePathname and useAuthStore. The layout is a server component by default. I'll need to make the layout use the AppHeader - AppHeader is already 'use client', so we can just import and use it in the layout. Layouts can use client components.
</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

PageShell with centered prop - let me check how PageShell handles centered. In my PageShell, when centered=true, the contentStyle has display flex, alignItems center, justifyContent center. But the inner div has maxWidth - when centered, the inner div wraps children. The PageShell's inner div gets width 100%, maxWidth 480px when maxWidth={480}. But actually in my PageShell I have:
- contentStyle: minHeight 100vh, padding, display flex, alignItems center, justifyContent center when centered
- innerStyle: width 100%, maxWidth, margin 0 auto

So the structure is:
<div contentStyle>  // flex center
  <div innerStyle>  // width 100%, maxWidth 480px
    {children}
  </div>
</div>

So children get the maxWidth container. Good. Now I need to update signup, forgot-password, reset-password, confirm-email, beta-signup. Let me read them and update.
