          {
            "text": "- Follow App Store guidelines",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "### Android",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "- Configure permissions properly",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "- Handle back button",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "- Test on different Android versions",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "- Follow Play Store guidelines",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "## Error Handling",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "try {",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "  await createContent(data);",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "} catch (error) {",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (error.code === 'NETWORK_ERROR') {",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "text": "    showError('No internet connection');",
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "  } else {",
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "text": "    showError('Something went wrong. Please try again.');",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "  logError(error);",
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "text": "## Testing",
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": "### Unit Tests",
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": "- Utilities",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": "- Components",
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": "- Hooks",
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "text": "- Services",
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "text": "### Integration Tests",
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "- Feature flows",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "- Navigation",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "- State management",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "text": "### E2E Tests",
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "text": "- Critical flows",
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "text": "- Real devices",
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "text": "- Offline scenarios",
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "text": "**Target**: &gt;80% code coverage",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "## Performance Tips",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **Lazy Load Screens**: Use &#96;React.lazy()&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **Memo Expensive Components**: Use &#96;React.memo()&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **Optimize Images**: WebP, compression",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **Cache Aggressively**: React Query + local storage",
            "lineNumber": 207
          }
        ]
      },

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/02-mobile/04-android-sdk-requirements.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 81
          }
        },
        "contents": "# Android SDK Requirements - Expo Development\n\n**Status**: ✅ Current | **Last Updated**: 2026-02-07\n\n## Quick Answer\n\n**Do you need Android SDK?**\n\n- ✅ **NO** - For development with Expo Go (recommended for most developers)\n- ⚠️ **YES** - For building custom development builds or production APKs\n\n---\n\n## Development Options\n\n### Option 1: Expo Go (No Android SDK Required) ✅ Recommended\n\n**Best for**: Most developers, especially when starting out\n\n**What you need**:\n- Node.js &gt;= 24.0.0\n- npm 10.0.0+\n- Expo CLI\n- Expo Go app on your phone (iOS/Android)\n\n**How it works**:\n1. Run &#96;npm run dev:mobile&#96; or &#96;expo start&#96;\n2. Scan QR code with Expo Go app\n3. App runs on your phone instantly\n4. Hot reload works automatically\n\n**Advantages**:\n- ✅ No Android SDK installation needed\n- ✅ No Android Studio needed\n- ✅ Works on any device with Expo Go\n- ✅ Fastest development setup\n- ✅ No build times\n\n**Limitations**:\n- ⚠️ Can't use custom native modules not included in Expo Go\n- ⚠️ Some advanced native features may not be available\n\n---\n\n### Option 2: Development Builds (Android SDK Required)\n\n**Best for**: When you need custom native modules or advanced features\n\n**What you need**:\n- Everything from Option 1, PLUS:\n- Android Studio (latest)\n- Android SDK (API 33+)\n- Java Development Kit (JDK) 17+\n- Android Emulator or physical device\n\n**How it works**:\n1. Build custom development build: &#96;eas build --profile development --platform android&#96;\n2. Install on device/emulator\n3. Run &#96;expo start --dev-client&#96;\n4. App runs with your custom native code\n\n**Advantages**:\n- ✅ Full access to all native modules\n- ✅ Can use any Expo module or custom native code\n- ✅ Production-like environment\n\n**Disadvantages**:\n- ❌ Requires Android SDK setup\n- ❌ Longer initial setup time\n- ❌ Build times for each update\n\n---\n\n### Option 3: Production Builds (Android SDK Required)\n\n**Best for**: Building APKs/IPAs for app stores\n\n**What you need**:\n- Everything from Option 2\n- EAS Build account (or local build setup)",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# Android SDK Requirements - Expo Development",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "**Status**: ✅ Current | **Last Updated**: 2026-02-07",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "## Quick Answer",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "**Do you need Android SDK?**",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "- ✅ **NO** - For development with Expo Go (recommended for most developers)",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "- ⚠️ **YES** - For building custom development builds or production APKs",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "## Development Options",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "### Option 1: Expo Go (No Android SDK Required) ✅ Recommended",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "**Best for**: Most developers, especially when starting out",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 20

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 23

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "**How it works**:",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "1. Run &#96;npm run dev:mobile&#96; or &#96;expo start&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "3. App runs on your phone instantly",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "4. Hot reload works automatically",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "**Advantages**:",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "- ✅ No Android SDK installation needed",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "- ✅ No Android Studio needed",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "- ✅ Fastest development setup",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "- ✅ No build times",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "**Limitations**:",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "- ⚠️ Can't use custom native modules not included in Expo Go",
            "lineNumber": 40

          {

          {

          {
            "text": "4. App runs with your custom native code",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "**Advantages**:",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "- ✅ Full access to all native modules",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "- ✅ Can use any Expo module or custom native code",

          },
          {
            "text": "- ✅ Production-like environment",

          },

          },

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/03-platforms/02-browser-optimization-strategy.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 233
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 310
          }
        },
        "contents": "- **Minor Differences**: Some Microsoft-specific features\n- **Easy Migration**: Most Chrome code works\n\n**What to Add**:\n- [ ] Edge-specific testing\n- [ ] Microsoft account integration (optional)\n- [ ] Edge-specific optimizations (minimal)\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Plan\n\n### Phase 1: Chrome-Only (Initial Launch)\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Optimize exclusively for Chrome\n- [ ] Test only on Chrome\n- [ ] Use Chrome-specific features\n- [ ] Add browser recommendation UI\n- [ ] Document Chrome requirements\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- Chrome-optimized web app\n- Browser recommendation system\n- Chrome-only feature set\n\n**Timeline**: Faster development, faster launch\n\n---\n\n### Phase 2: Browser Expansion (Post-Launch)\n\n**Priority Order**:\n1. **Edge** (Chromium) - Easiest, ~5-8% market share\n2. **Safari** (Desktop) - ~10-15% market share\n3. **Firefox** - ~3-5% market share\n4. **Safari** (iOS) - Requires mobile web optimization\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Browser detection and feature flags\n- [ ] Safari-specific optimizations\n- [ ] Firefox-specific optimizations\n- [ ] Cross-browser testing\n- [ ] Browser-specific fallbacks\n- [ ] Update browser recommendation\n\n**Code Structure**:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\n// Browser detection utility\nexport const Browser = {\n  CHROME: 'chrome',\n  SAFARI: 'safari',\n  FIREFOX: 'firefox',\n  EDGE: 'edge',\n  UNKNOWN: 'unknown',\n};\n\nexport function detectBrowser(): Browser {\n  const ua = navigator.userAgent;\n  if (/Chrome/.test(ua) &amp;&amp; /Google Inc/.test(navigator.vendor)) {\n    return Browser.CHROME;\n  }\n  if (/Safari/.test(ua) &amp;&amp; /Apple Computer/.test(navigator.vendor)) {\n    return Browser.SAFARI;\n  }\n  if (/Firefox/.test(ua)) {\n    return Browser.FIREFOX;\n  }\n  if (/Edg/.test(ua)) {\n    return Browser.EDGE;\n  }\n  return Browser.UNKNOWN;\n}\n\n// Feature detection\nexport function getBrowserFeatures() {\n  const browser = detectBrowser();",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- **Minor Differences**: Some Microsoft-specific features",
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Easy Migration**: Most Chrome code works",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "text": "**What to Add**:",
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "text": "- [ ] Edge-specific testing",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "text": "- [ ] Microsoft account integration (optional)",

          {
            "text": "- [ ] Edge-specific optimizations (minimal)",
            "lineNumber": 240

          {
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "text": "## Implementation Plan",
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "### Phase 1: Chrome-Only (Initial Launch)",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247
          },

        },
        "contents": "# Audio Components\n\n## SpeakingAnimation\n\nA **refined, professional** 4-page animated component with ChatGPT-like simplicity and futuristic glass-morphism design. Features clean minimalism, ample white space, and subtle animations that maintain a high-quality, professional feel.\n\n### 🎨 Design Philosophy\n\n- **ChatGPT-like Simplicity** - Clean, minimal design with focus on content\n- **Professional Glass-morphism** - Subtle translucent effects with backdrop blur\n- **Futuristic Vibes** - Refined, high-quality aesthetic without overwhelming visuals\n- **Ample White Space** - Clean layouts with breathing room\n- **Subtle Animations** - Smooth, professional transitions\n\n### ✨ Features\n\n- **4 Clean Pages**: Each page features elegant, minimal animations:\n  1. **Minimal Floating Orbs** - Three glass orbs with subtle floating motion\n  2. **Clean Frequency Bars** - 12 refined frequency bars with gentle pulsing\n  3. **Subtle Wave Pattern** - Layered concentric waves with soft expansion\n  4. **Minimal Rotating Rings** - Two rotating rings with clean lines\n\n- **Professional Effects**:\n  - 🪟 **Glass-morphism** - Subtle translucent cards with backdrop blur\n  - 🎨 **Clean Gradients** - Refined color transitions\n  - ✨ **Subtle Glows** - Minimal shadow effects\n  - 🌊 **Smooth Transitions** - Professional fade and slide animations\n\n- **Theme Integration**:\n  - Uses &#96;useTheme()&#96; hook for dynamic theming\n  - Respects theme colors and glass effects\n  - Fully responsive and accessible\n\n### 📦 Usage\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;tsx\nimport { SpeakingAnimation } from '@/components';\n\nfunction AudioPlayer() {\n  const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false);",
        "signatures": {},

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/components/audio/SpeakingAnimation.tsx",
        "range": {

        },
        "contents": "/**\n * SpeakingAnimation - A refined, professional 4-page animated component\n * with ChatGPT-like simplicity and futuristic glass-morphism design.\n * \n * Features:\n * - Clean, minimal animations with ample white space\n * - Professional glass-morphism effects\n * - Subtle futuristic vibes without overwhelming visuals\n * - Smooth, refined transitions\n * - 4 distinct pages with elegant simplicity\n */\nexport const SpeakingAnimation: React.FC&lt;SpeakingAnimationProps&gt; = ({\n  isSpeaking = false,\n  pageDuration = 5000, // 5 seconds per page for more contemplative feel\n  className = '',\n  style,\n  frequencyData,\n}) =&gt; {\n  const { theme } = useTheme();\n  const colors = theme.colors;\n  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(0);\n  const [isVisible, setIsVisible] = useState(false);\n\n  // Cycle through 4 pages when speaking\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    if (!isSpeaking) {\n      setIsVisible(false);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    setIsVisible(true);\n    const interval = setInterval(() =&gt; {\n      setCurrentPage((prev) =&gt; (prev + 1) % 4);\n    }, pageDuration);\n\n    return () =&gt; clearInterval(interval);\n  }, [isSpeaking, pageDuration]);\n\n  // Reset to first page when speaking starts\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    if (isSpeaking) {\n      setCurrentPage(0);\n    }\n  }, [isSpeaking]);\n\n  // Generate frequency bars (simulated if not provided)\n  const frequencyBars = frequencyData || Array.from({ length: 12 }, () =&gt; Math.random() * 0.6 + 0.2);\n\n  return (\n    &lt;div\n      className={className}\n;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [

        "contents": "2. **Implement on both platforms** - Mobile and Web simultaneously\n3. **Test frequently** - after each change on both platforms\n4. **Update changelog** - mark progress\n5. **Document decisions** - note why choices were made\n6. **Keep schemas coherent** - verify at each step\n7. **Ensure consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms\n\n### After Completing a Step\n\n1. **Verify UI checkpoint** - see visible progress on both platforms\n2. **Test functionality** - ensure it works on Mobile and Web\n3. **Verify consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms\n4. **Update changelog** - mark complete with date in &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;\n5. **Update docs** - if needed\n6. **Commit changes** - with descriptive message\n\n### When Re-Running a Step\n\n1. **Check changelog** - see what was done before in &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;\n2. **Update changelog** - add new entry with date\n3. **Note changes** - what was updated\n4. **Keep history** - don't delete previous entries\n5. **Test all platforms** - ensure changes work on all platforms\n\n---\n\n## Key Requirements\n\n### Voice-First Design\n- **Audio is primary** - text/visual are secondary\n- **Background audio** - support background playback\n- **Handle interruptions** - calls, notifications\n- **Voice recording** - high-quality capture\n\n### Three Content Types (NOT Interchangeable)\n- **Affirmations** - Cognitive re-patterning (shallow → medium)\n- **Guided Meditations** - State induction (medium)\n- **Rituals** - Identity encoding (deepest)\n\n**Reference**: Use Context7 to query &#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&#96;\n\n### Conversation Over Forms\n- **No static forms** - all creation through dialogue\n- **Chat-like interface** - conversational UI\n- **Context-aware** - adapts based on responses\n- **State machine** - manage conversation flow\n\n### Practice is Free\n- **Unlimited replay** - no credit consumption for playback\n- **Credits for creation** - only creation costs credits\n- **No subscription pressure** - user autonomy\n\n### User Autonomy",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "2. **Implement on both platforms** - Mobile and Web simultaneously",
            "lineNumber": 930
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **Test frequently** - after each change on both platforms",
            "lineNumber": 931
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **Update changelog** - mark progress",
            "lineNumber": 932
          },
          {
            "text": "5. **Document decisions** - note why choices were made",
            "lineNumber": 933
          },
          {
            "text": "6. **Keep schemas coherent** - verify at each step",
            "lineNumber": 934
          },
          {
            "text": "7. **Ensure consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms",
            "lineNumber": 935
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 936
          },
          {
            "text": "### After Completing a Step",
            "lineNumber": 937
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 938
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **Verify UI checkpoint** - see visible progress on both platforms",
            "lineNumber": 939
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **Test functionality** - ensure it works on Mobile and Web",
            "lineNumber": 940
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **Verify consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms",
            "lineNumber": 941
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **Update changelog** - mark complete with date in &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 942
          },
          {
            "text": "5. **Update docs** - if needed",
            "lineNumber": 943
          },
          {
            "text": "6. **Commit changes** - with descriptive message",
            "lineNumber": 944
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 945
          },
          {
            "text": "### When Re-Running a Step",
            "lineNumber": 946
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 947
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **Check changelog** - see what was done before in &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 948
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **Update changelog** - add new entry with date",
            "lineNumber": 949
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **Note changes** - what was updated",
            "lineNumber": 950
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **Keep history** - don't delete previous entries",
            "lineNumber": 951

          {
            "text": "5. **Test all platforms** - ensure changes work on all platforms",
            "lineNumber": 952
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 953
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 954
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 955
          },
          {
            "text": "## Key Requirements",
            "lineNumber": 956
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 957
          },
          {
            "text": "### Voice-First Design",
            "lineNumber": 958
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Audio is primary** - text/visual are secondary",
            "lineNumber": 959
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Background audio** - support background playback",
            "lineNumber": 960
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Handle interruptions** - calls, notifications",
            "lineNumber": 961
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Voice recording** - high-quality capture",
            "lineNumber": 962
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 963
          },
          {
            "text": "### Three Content Types (NOT Interchangeable)",
            "lineNumber": 964
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Affirmations** - Cognitive re-patterning (shallow → medium)",
            "lineNumber": 965
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Guided Meditations** - State induction (medium)",
            "lineNumber": 966
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Rituals** - Identity encoding (deepest)",
            "lineNumber": 967
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 968
          },
          {
            "text": "**Reference**: Use Context7 to query &#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 969
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 970
          },
          {
            "text": "### Conversation Over Forms",
            "lineNumber": 971
          },
          {
            "text": "- **No static forms** - all creation through dialogue",
            "lineNumber": 972
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Chat-like interface** - conversational UI",
            "lineNumber": 973
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Context-aware** - adapts based on responses",
            "lineNumber": 974
          },
          {
            "text": "- **State machine** - manage conversation flow",
            "lineNumber": 975
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 976
          },
          {
            "text": "### Practice is Free",

          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/components/audio/SpeakingAnimation.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 29
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 231,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export const SpeakingAnimation: React.FC&lt;SpeakingAnimationProps&gt; = \n\n\n  return (\n    &lt;div\n      className={className}\n      style={{\n        position: 'relative',\n        width: '100%',\n        height: '100%',\n        minHeight: '400px',\n        overflow: 'hidden',\n        borderRadius: '16px',\n        opacity: isVisible ? 1 : 0,\n        transition: 'opacity 0.4s ease-in-out',\n        background: colors.background.primary,\n        ...style,\n      }}\n    &gt;\n      {/* Subtle Background Gradient */}\n      &lt;div\n        style={{\n          position: 'absolute',\n          inset: 0,\n          background: &#96;radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, ${colors.accent.light}15 0%, transparent 70%)&#96;,\n        }}\n      /&gt;\n\n      {/* Page 1: Minimal Floating Orbs */}\n      &lt;Page\n        isActive={currentPage === 0}\n        pageIndex={0}\n        colors={colors}\n      &gt;\n        &lt;div className=\"minimal-orb-container\"&gt;\n          &lt;div className=\"minimal-orb minimal-orb-1\" /&gt;\n          &lt;div className=\"minimal-orb minimal-orb-2\" /&gt;\n          &lt;div className=\"minimal-orb minimal-orb-3\" /&gt;\n        &lt;/div&gt;\n      &lt;/Page&gt;\n\n      {/* Page 2: Clean Frequency Bars */}\n      &lt;Page\n        isActive={currentPage === 1}\n        pageIndex={1}\n        colors={colors}\n      &gt;\n        &lt;div className=\"clean-frequency-container\"&gt;\n          {frequencyBars.map((height, index) =&gt; (\n            &lt;div\n              key={index}\n              className=\"clean-frequency-bar\"\n              style={{\n                animationDelay: &#96;${index * 0.08}s&#96;,\n                '--bar-height': &#96;${height * 100}%&#96;,\n              } as React.CSSProperties &amp; { '--bar-height': string }}\n            /&gt;\n          ))}\n        &lt;/div&gt;\n      &lt;/Page&gt;\n\n      {/* Page 3: Subtle Wave Pattern */}\n      &lt;Page\n        isActive={currentPage === 2}\n        pageIndex={2}\n;",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [

          {
            "text": "      /&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "      {/* Page 1: Minimal Floating Orbs */}",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "      &lt;Page",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "        isActive={currentPage === 0}",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "        pageIndex={0}",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "        colors={colors}",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "      &gt;",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "        &lt;div className=\"minimal-orb-container\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "          &lt;div className=\"minimal-orb minimal-orb-1\" /&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "          &lt;div className=\"minimal-orb minimal-orb-2\" /&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "          &lt;div className=\"minimal-orb minimal-orb-3\" /&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "        &lt;/div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "      &lt;/Page&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "      {/* Page 2: Clean Frequency Bars */}",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "      &lt;Page",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "        isActive={currentPage === 1}",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "        pageIndex={1}",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "        colors={colors}",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "      &gt;",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "        &lt;div className=\"clean-frequency-container\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "          {frequencyBars.map((height, index) =&gt; (",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "            &lt;div",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "              key={index}",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "              className=\"clean-frequency-bar\"",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "              style={{",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "                animationDelay: &#96;${index * 0.08}s&#96;,",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "                '--bar-height': &#96;${height * 100}%&#96;,",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "              } as React.CSSProperties &amp; { '--bar-height': string }}",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "            /&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "          ))}",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "        &lt;/div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "      &lt;/Page&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "      {/* Page 3: Subtle Wave Pattern */}",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "      &lt;Page",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "        isActive={currentPage === 2}",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "        pageIndex={2}",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 232
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.30852794647216797

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/01-roadmap.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 687
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 763
          }
        },
        "contents": "- Audio storage integration\n\n**Success Criteria**: Can upload and download audio files\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: Can upload recordings, download and play stored audio\n\n---\n\n## Phase 9: AI Integration\n\n### Step 9.1: Set Up OpenAI Integration\n**Goal**: Connect to OpenAI API for content generation\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Set up OpenAI client\n- [ ] Create API route/function for script generation\n- [ ] Create prompts for each content type (Affirmation, Meditation, Ritual)\n- [ ] Add prompt engineering based on scientific foundations\n- [ ] Add error handling for API failures\n- [ ] Add rate limiting\n- [ ] Add cost tracking\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- OpenAI integration ready\n\n**Success Criteria**: Can generate content using OpenAI\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: Can generate scripts, see them in creation flows\n\n---\n\n### Step 9.2: Integrate OpenAI TTS\n**Goal**: Generate audio from text using OpenAI TTS\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Set up OpenAI TTS API calls\n- [ ] Create TTS generation function\n- [ ] Add voice selection (alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer)\n- [ ] Add SSML support for prosody control\n- [ ] Add audio format selection (mp3, opus)\n- [ ] Store generated audio in Supabase Storage\n- [ ] Add progress tracking for generation\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- TTS integration working\n\n**Success Criteria**: Can generate audio from text\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: Can generate audio, hear it play, see it stored\n\n---\n\n### Step 9.3: Implement Conversation Flow\n**Goal**: Create conversational content creation\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design conversation UI (chat-like interface)\n- [ ] Create conversation state machine\n- [ ] Implement conversation steps for each content type\n- [ ] Add context gathering through conversation\n- [ ] Add conversation history management\n- [ ] Add ability to go back and edit responses\n- [ ] Connect to OpenAI for conversational responses\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- Conversational creation flow\n\n**Success Criteria**: Can create content through conversation\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See chat interface, have conversation, generate content\n\n---\n\n## Phase 10: Payment &amp; Credits\n\n### Step 10.1: Integrate Stripe",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [

        "contents": "|------------|------|--------|-------|\n| content_items.script | Field | ✅ | Populated by AI |\n| content_items.audio_url | Field | ✅ | Populated by TTS |\n\n### Schema Changes Required\n- None (using existing fields)\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Steps\n\n### Step 9.1: Set Up OpenAI Integration\n**Goal**: Connect to OpenAI API for content generation\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Set up OpenAI client\n- [ ] Create API route/function for script generation\n- [ ] Create prompts for each content type (Affirmation, Meditation, Ritual)\n- [ ] Add prompt engineering based on scientific foundations\n- [ ] Add error handling for API failures\n- [ ] Add rate limiting\n- [ ] Add cost tracking\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: Can generate scripts, see them in creation flows\n\n---\n\n### Step 9.2: Integrate OpenAI TTS\n**Goal**: Generate audio from text using OpenAI TTS\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Set up OpenAI TTS API calls\n- [ ] Create TTS generation function\n- [ ] Add voice selection (alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer)\n- [ ] Add SSML support for prosody control\n- [ ] Add audio format selection (mp3, opus)\n- [ ] Store generated audio in Supabase Storage\n- [ ] Add progress tracking for generation\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: Can generate audio, hear it play, see it stored\n\n---\n\n### Step 9.3: Implement Conversation Flow\n**Goal**: Create conversational content creation\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design conversation UI (chat-like interface)\n- [ ] Create conversation state machine\n- [ ] Implement conversation steps for each content type\n- [ ] Add context gathering through conversation\n- [ ] Add conversation history management\n- [ ] Add ability to go back and edit responses\n- [ ] Connect to OpenAI for conversational responses\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See chat interface, have conversation, generate content\n\n---\n\n## Verification Checklist\n\n### AI Integration\n- [ ] OpenAI connection works\n- [ ] Script generation works\n- [ ] TTS generation works\n- [ ] Error handling works\n- [ ] Cost tracking works\n\n### Conversation Flow\n- [ ] Conversation UI works\n- [ ] State machine works\n- [ ] Context gathering works\n- [ ] Content generation works\n\n---\n\n## References",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/components/audio/SpeakingAnimation.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 29
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 231,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export const SpeakingAnimation: React.FC&lt;SpeakingAnimationProps&gt; = \n\n      &lt;style dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: &#96;\n        .page {\n          position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;\n          display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;\n          opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px);\n          transition: opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease;\n          pointer-events: none;\n        }\n        .page.active { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }\n        .minimal-orb-container { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%; }\n        .minimal-orb {\n          position: absolute; border-radius: 50%;\n          background: ${colors.glass.light};\n          backdrop-filter: blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px);\n          border: 1px solid ${colors.glass.border};\n          box-shadow: 0 4px 16px ${colors.mystical.glow}15;\n        }\n        .minimal-orb-1 { width: 120px; height: 120px; top: 25%; left: 20%; animation: minimalFloat-1 8s ease-in-out infinite; }\n        .minimal-orb-2 { width: 100px; height: 100px; top: 50%; right: 25%; animation: minimalFloat-2 10s ease-in-out infinite; }\n        .minimal-orb-3 { width: 80px; height: 80px; bottom: 25%; left: 50%; animation: minimalFloat-3 12s ease-in-out infinite; }\n        @keyframes minimalFloat-1 { 0%, 100% { transform: translate(0, 0); opacity: 0.6; } 50% { transform: translate(20px, -20px); opacity: 0.8; } }\n        @keyframes minimalFloat-2 { 0%, 100% { transform: translate(0, 0); opacity: 0.5; } 50% { transform: translate(-25px, 25px); opacity: 0.7; } }\n        @keyframes minimalFloat-3 { 0%, 100% { transform: translate(0, 0); opacity: 0.6; } 50% { transform: translate(15px, -15px); opacity: 0.8; } }\n        .clean-frequency-container { position: relative; width: 80%; max-width: 400px; height: 200px; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; }\n        .clean-frequency-bar {\n          flex: 1; max-width: 24px; height: var(--bar-height); min-height: 20px;\n          background: ${colors.gradients.primary}; border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0;\n          opacity: 0.7; animation: cleanBarPulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; transform-origin: bottom;\n        }\n        @keyframes cleanBarPulse { 0%, 100% { transform: scaleY(1); opacity: 0.7; } 50% { transform: scaleY(1.1); opacity: 0.9; } }\n        .subtle-wave-container { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }\n        .subtle-wave {\n          position: absolute; width: 300px; height: 300px; border-radius: 50%;\n          border: 1px solid ${colors.glass.border}; background: ${colors.glass.light}40;\n          backdrop-filter: blur(10px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);\n        }\n        .subtle-wave-1 { animation: subtleWave-1 6s ease-in-out infinite; }\n        .subtle-wave-2 { animation: subtleWave-2 8s ease-in-out infinite 1s; }\n        .subtle-wave-3 { animation: subtleWave-3 10s ease-in-out infinite 2s; }\n        @keyframes subtleWave-1 { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.3; } 50% { transform: scale(1.1); opacity: 0.5; } }\n        @keyframes subtleWave-2 { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.2; } 50% { transform: scale(1.15); opacity: 0.4; } }\n        @keyframes subtleWave-3 { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.25; } 50% { transform: scale(1.2); opacity: 0.45; } }\n        .minimal-ring-container { position: relative; width: 200px; height: 200px; }\n        .minimal-ring { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); border-radius: 50%; border: 1.5px solid \n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/components/audio/README.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 210
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 232
          }
        },
        "contents": "- **GPU-Accelerated** - Uses &#96;transform&#96; and &#96;opacity&#96; for smooth 60fps animations\n- **Optimized Rendering** - Minimal DOM elements for better performance\n- **CSS Animations** - Hardware-accelerated CSS keyframe animations\n- **Lazy Rendering** - Only renders when &#96;isSpeaking&#96; is true\n\n### 🎨 Design Notes\n\n- **ChatGPT-like** - Clean, minimal design with focus on clarity\n- **Professional** - Refined aesthetic suitable for professional applications\n- **Glass-morphism** - Subtle translucent effects for modern feel\n- **Futuristic** - High-quality vibes without overwhelming visuals\n- **Accessible** - Proper ARIA labels and semantic HTML\n- **Responsive** - Works beautifully on all screen sizes\n\n### 🔮 Design Principles\n\n1. **Less is More** - Minimal animations, maximum impact\n2. **White Space** - Ample breathing room for clarity\n3. **Subtle Effects** - Professional glows and shadows\n4. **Clean Lines** - Simple geometric shapes\n5. **Smooth Motion** - Professional transitions\n6. **Glass-morphism** - Modern translucent aesthetic",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- **GPU-Accelerated** - Uses &#96;transform&#96; and &#96;opacity&#96; for smooth 60fps animations",

            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "text": "- **CSS Animations** - Hardware-accelerated CSS keyframe animations",
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Lazy Rendering** - Only renders when &#96;isSpeaking&#96; is true",
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215

        "contents": "# Phase 9: AI Integration - Detailed Analysis\n\n## Overview\n**Goal**: Integrate OpenAI for content generation (scripts and TTS) and implement conversational content creation flow\n**Status**: ⏳ Pending → Ready to start after Phase 8\n**Dependencies**: Phase 8 (Audio System)\n\n## Changelog\n\n### 2026-02-07 - Initial Analysis Created\n- **Status**: 📝 Analysis Complete\n- **Notes**: Created detailed phase analysis with NOW/AFTER comparison and implementation steps\n- **Next**: Begin after Phase 8 completion\n\n---\n\n## Current State Analysis (NOW)\n\n### Current Implementation\n**Location**: Creation flows exist but are non-functional\n\n**What Exists** (After Phases 1-8):\n- ✅ Creation flow structures\n- ✅ Form inputs\n- ✅ Audio system ready\n- ❌ No AI integration\n- ❌ No script generation\n- ❌ No TTS generation\n- ❌ No conversational flow\n\n**Current Features**:\n- Creation Flows: ✅ Structure exists\n- AI Integration: ❌ Not implemented\n- Script Generation: ❌ Not implemented\n- TTS: ❌ Not implemented\n\n---\n\n## Target State (AFTER)\n\n### Target Implementation\n**New Location**: &#96;src/services/ai/&#96;, &#96;src/hooks/useAI.ts&#96;, &#96;src/screens/create/conversation/&#96;\n\n**What Will Exist**:\n- ✅ OpenAI integration for script generation\n- ✅ OpenAI TTS integration\n- ✅ Conversational creation flow\n- ✅ Prompt engineering based on scientific foundations\n- ✅ Cost optimization (GPT-4o-mini, Batch API)\n\n**Target Features**:\n- Script Generation: ✅ Working for all content types\n- TTS: ✅ Audio generation from text\n- Conversation: ✅ Chat-like creation flow\n- Cost Optimization: ✅ Implemented\n\n---\n\n## Schema Verification\n\n### Current Schema (NOW)\n| Table/Field | Type | Status | Notes |\n|------------|------|--------|-------|\n| content_items.script | Field | ✅ | Should exist |\n| content_items.audio_url | Field | ✅ | Should exist |\n\n### Target Schema (AFTER)\n| Table/Field | Type | Status | Notes |\n|------------|------|--------|-------|\n| content_items.script | Field | ✅ | Populated by AI |\n| content_items.audio_url | Field | ✅ | Populated by TTS |",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 79
          }
        },
        "contents": "# Technology Stack - waQup Mobile App\n\n**Status**: ✅ Finalized | **Last Updated**: 2026-02-07\n\n## Quick Reference\n\n| Category | Technology | Version |\n|----------|-----------|---------|\n| **Framework** | React Native + Expo | SDK 54 |\n| **Language** | TypeScript | 5.6+ |\n| **Navigation** | React Navigation | v7 |\n| **State** | Zustand + React Query | v4 + v5 |\n| **Backend** | Supabase | Latest |\n| **Audio** | expo-av | ~14.0 |\n| **TTS** | ElevenLabs | Professional Voice Cloning |\n| **AI** | OpenAI | GPT-4o-mini / GPT-4 |\n| **Payments** | Stripe React Native | Latest |\n| **Forms** | react-hook-form + zod | Latest |\n| **Animations** | react-native-reanimated | v3 |\n\n---\n\n## Core Decisions\n\n### React Native + Expo ✅\n**Why**: Cross-platform, cost-effective (~50% vs native), excellent Supabase support, OTA updates, App Store ready\n\n**Key Packages**:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\n{\n  \"expo\": \"~54.0.0\",\n  \"react-native\": \"0.81.5\",\n  \"@react-navigation/native\": \"^7.1.0\",\n  \"@react-navigation/native-stack\": \"^7.1.0\",\n  \"@react-navigation/bottom-tabs\": \"^7.1.0\"\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Supabase (Backend) ✅\n**Why**: Same database as web app, cost-effective (~$50-100/month), built-in auth/storage/realtime\n\n**Configuration**:\n- Use &#96;@supabase/supabase-js&#96; with AsyncStorage\n- Set &#96;detectSessionInUrl: false&#96; for mobile\n- Enable real-time subscriptions\n\n### Audio: ElevenLabs + expo-av ✅\n**TTS**: ElevenLabs Professional Voice Cloning\n- Enterprise-grade (10,000+ businesses)\n- Best for long-form content (10-30 min)\n- 70+ languages\n- Professional quality\n\n**Playback**: expo-av\n- Native audio playback\n- Background audio support\n- Handles interruptions\n\n### AI: OpenAI ✅\n**Conversations**: GPT-4o-mini (75% cost reduction)\n- Fast, cost-effective\n- Excellent for question generation\n- Prompt caching support\n\n**Scripts**: GPT-4 (Batch API for 50% savings)\n- Highest quality\n- Type-specific structures\n- Batch processing for background\n\n### Payments: Stripe React Native SDK ✅\n- Official SDK\n- Native payment UI\n- Apple Pay / Google Pay\n- Secure (PCI compliant)\n\n---\n\n## Project Structure",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# Technology Stack - waQup Mobile App",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "**Status**: ✅ Finalized | **Last Updated**: 2026-02-07",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "## Quick Reference",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "| Category | Technology | Version |",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "|----------|-----------|---------|",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "| **Framework** | React Native + Expo | SDK 54 |",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "| **Language** | TypeScript | 5.6+ |",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "| **Navigation** | React Navigation | v7 |",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "| **State** | Zustand + React Query | v4 + v5 |",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "| **Backend** | Supabase | Latest |",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "| **Audio** | expo-av | ~14.0 |",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "| **TTS** | ElevenLabs | Professional Voice Cloning |",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "| **AI** | OpenAI | GPT-4o-mini / GPT-4 |",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "| **Payments** | Stripe React Native | Latest |",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "| **Forms** | react-hook-form + zod | Latest |",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "| **Animations** | react-native-reanimated | v3 |",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "## Core Decisions",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "### React Native + Expo ✅",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "**Why**: Cross-platform, cost-effective (~50% vs native), excellent Supabase support, OTA updates, App Store ready",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "**Key Packages**:",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "{",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"expo\": \"~54.0.0\",",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"react-native\": \"0.81.5\",",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"@react-navigation/native\": \"^7.1.0\",",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"@react-navigation/native-stack\": \"^7.1.0\",",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"@react-navigation/bottom-tabs\": \"^7.1.0\"",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "### Supabase (Backend) ✅",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "**Why**: Same database as web app, cost-effective (~$50-100/month), built-in auth/storage/realtime",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "**Configuration**:",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "- Use &#96;@supabase/supabase-js&#96; with AsyncStorage",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "- Set &#96;detectSessionInUrl: false&#96; for mobile",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "- Enable real-time subscriptions",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "### Audio: ElevenLabs + expo-av ✅",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "**TTS**: ElevenLabs Professional Voice Cloning",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "- Enterprise-grade (10,000+ businesses)",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "- Best for long-form content (10-30 min)",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "- 70+ languages",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "- Professional quality",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "**Playback**: expo-av",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "- Native audio playback",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "- Background audio support",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "- Handles interruptions",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "### AI: OpenAI ✅",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "**Conversations**: GPT-4o-mini (75% cost reduction)",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "- Fast, cost-effective",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "- Excellent for question generation",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "- Prompt caching support",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "**Scripts**: GPT-4 (Batch API for 50% savings)",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "- Highest quality",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "- Type-specific structures",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "- Batch processing for background",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "### Payments: Stripe React Native SDK ✅",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "- Official SDK",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "- Native payment UI",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "- Apple Pay / Google Pay",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "- Secure (PCI compliant)",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "## Project Structure",
            "lineNumber": 78
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2433049976825714
    },

        "contents": "'use client';\n\nimport React, { useState } from 'react';\nimport {\n  Typography,\n  Button,\n  Input,\n  Card,\n  Loading,\n  Badge,\n  Progress,\n} from '@/components';\nimport { spacing, typography, borderRadius } from '@/theme';\nimport { useTheme } from '@/theme';\nimport { PageShell, ThemeSelector, SpeakingAnimation, AppHeader } from '@/components';\nimport Link from 'next/link';\n\nexport default function ShowcasePage() {\n  const { theme } = useTheme();\n  const colors = theme.colors;\n  const [inputValue, setInputValue] = useState('');\n  const [progressValue, setProgressValue] = useState(45);\n  const [selectedTab, setSelectedTab] = useState('Home');\n  const [isSpeaking, setIsSpeaking] = useState(false);\n\n  return (\n    &lt;PageShell intensity=\"medium\" bare&gt;\n      &lt;ThemeSelector /&gt;\n      &lt;AppHeader variant=\"public\" /&gt;\n      &lt;div style={{ maxWidth: '1400px', margin: '0 auto' }}&gt;\n          {/* Header */}\n          &lt;div style={{ marginBottom: spacing.xl, textAlign: 'center' }}&gt;\n}",

        "contents": "'use client';\n\nimport React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';\nimport { useTheme } from '@/theme';\n\nexport interface SpeakingAnimationProps {\n  /** Whether audio is currently playing/speaking */\n  isSpeaking?: boolean;\n  /** Duration for each page transition in milliseconds */\n  pageDuration?: number;\n  /** Custom className */\n  className?: string;\n  /** Custom style */\n  style?: React.CSSProperties;\n  /** Audio frequency data for reactive visualization (optional) */\n  frequencyData?: number[];\n}\n\n/**\n * SpeakingAnimation - A refined, professional 4-page animated component\n * with ChatGPT-like simplicity and futuristic glass-morphism design.\n * \n * Features:\n * - Clean, minimal animations with ample white space\n * - Professional glass-morphism effects\n * - Subtle futuristic vibes without overwhelming visuals\n * - Smooth, refined transitions\n * - 4 distinct pages with elegant simplicity\n */",

        "contents": "'use client';\n\nimport React from 'react';\nimport { Typography, Button } from '@/components';\nimport { useTheme } from '@/theme';\nimport { AppHeader, PageShell, ThemeSelector } from '@/components';\nimport { spacing, borderRadius } from '@/theme';\nimport Link from 'next/link';\nimport {\n  Sparkles,\n  Brain,\n  Music,\n  Zap,\n  Shield,\n  Heart,\n  ArrowRight,\n  Check,\n  Play,\n  Users,\n  Star,\n  ChevronRight,\n} from 'lucide-react';\n\nexport default function LandingPage() {\n  const { theme } = useTheme();\n  const colors = theme.colors;\n\n  const features = [\n    {\n      icon: Brain,\n      title: 'Neuroplasticity-Based',\n      description: 'Scientifically designed to rewire your subconscious mind through voice-first experiences',\n      color: colors.accent.primary,\n    },\n    {\n      icon: Music,\n      title: 'Voice Cloning',\n      description: 'Create personalized affirmations and rituals with your own voice or choose from our library',\n      color: colors.accent.secondary,\n    },\n    {\n      icon: Sparkles,\n      title: 'AI-Powered Creation',\n      description: 'Conversational AI guides you through creating transformative content tailored to your goals',\n      color: colors.accent.tertiary,\n    },\n    {\n      icon: Shield,\n      title: 'Privacy First',\n      description: 'Your voice data is encrypted and stored securely. You own your transformation journey',\n      color: colors.accent.primary,\n    },\n    {\n      icon: Heart,\n      title: 'Three Content Types',\n      description: 'Affirmations for cognitive re-patterning, Meditations for state induction, Rituals for identity encoding',\n      color: colors.accent.secondary,\n    },\n    {\n      icon: Zap,\n      title: 'Practice is Free',\n      description: 'Unlimited replay of your content. Credits only used for creation, never for practice',\n      color: colors.accent.tertiary,\n    },\n  ];\n\n  const benefits = [\n    'Transform your subconscious mind',\n,\n  ];\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/components/audio/README.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 135
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 212
          }
        },
        "contents": "function AudioVisualizer({ audioUrl }: { audioUrl: string }) {\n  const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false);\n  const [frequencyData, setFrequencyData] = useState&lt;number[]&gt;([]);\n  const audioRef = useRef&lt;HTMLAudioElement | null&gt;(null);\n  const analyserRef = useRef&lt;AnalyserNode | null&gt;(null);\n\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    const audioContext = new AudioContext();\n    const analyser = audioContext.createAnalyser();\n    analyser.fftSize = 32; // 16 frequency bins for cleaner look\n    \n    // Connect audio source to analyser\n    // ... your audio setup code\n    \n    analyserRef.current = analyser;\n    \n    const updateFrequencyData = () =&gt; {\n      if (!isPlaying) return;\n      \n      const dataArray = new Uint8Array(analyser.frequencyBinCount);\n      analyser.getByteFrequencyData(dataArray);\n      \n      // Normalize to 0-1 range\n      const normalized = Array.from(dataArray).map(val =&gt; val / 255);\n      setFrequencyData(normalized);\n      \n      requestAnimationFrame(updateFrequencyData);\n    };\n    \n    if (isPlaying) {\n      updateFrequencyData();\n    }\n    \n    return () =&gt; {\n      audioContext.close();\n    };\n  }, [isPlaying]);\n\n  return (\n    &lt;SpeakingAnimation \n      isSpeaking={isPlaying}\n      frequencyData={frequencyData}\n    /&gt;\n  );\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 🎭 Page Details\n\n#### Page 1: Minimal Floating Orbs\n- Three glass orbs with subtle floating motion\n- Clean glass-morphism with backdrop blur\n- Minimal shadows and glows\n- Represents calm, contemplative state\n\n#### Page 2: Clean Frequency Bars\n- 12 refined frequency bars\n- Gentle pulsing animation\n- Clean gradient fills\n- Perfect for audio visualization\n\n#### Page 3: Subtle Wave Pattern\n- Three layered concentric waves\n- Soft expansion and contraction\n- Minimal opacity changes\n- Represents flow and rhythm\n\n#### Page 4: Minimal Rotating Rings\n- Two rotating rings with clean lines\n- Different rotation speeds\n- Minimal visual weight\n- Represents harmony and balance\n\n### ⚡ Performance\n\n- **GPU-Accelerated** - Uses &#96;transform&#96; and &#96;opacity&#96; for smooth 60fps animations\n- **Optimized Rendering** - Minimal DOM elements for better performance",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "function AudioVisualizer({ audioUrl }: { audioUrl: string }) {",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "  const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false);",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "  const [frequencyData, setFrequencyData] = useState&lt;number[]&gt;([]);",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "  const audioRef = useRef&lt;HTMLAudioElement | null&gt;(null);",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "    const audioContext = new AudioContext();",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "    const analyser = audioContext.createAnalyser();",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "    analyser.fftSize = 32; // 16 frequency bins for cleaner look",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Connect audio source to analyser",
            "lineNumber": 147

            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "    analyserRef.current = analyser;",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "    const updateFrequencyData = () =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (!isPlaying) return;",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "      ",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "      const dataArray = new Uint8Array(analyser.frequencyBinCount);",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "      ",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Normalize to 0-1 range",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "      const normalized = Array.from(dataArray).map(val =&gt; val / 255);",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "      ",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },

            "lineNumber": 163

          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 165

          {

          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 167

            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "    return () =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "text": "      audioContext.close();",
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 171

          {
            "lineNumber": 173

        "contents": "# Core Product Documentation Reference\n\n**Purpose**: Reference guide to main waQup product documentation\n\n**Location**: &#96;../../docs/internal/&#96; (main waQup project)\n\n---\n\n## How to Access\n\n**Direct Access**: &#96;../../docs/internal/&#96;  \n**Use Context7**: Query docs using Context7 (recommended)\n\n---\n\n## Complete Documentation List\n\n### Core Documents (01-07)\n\n1. **01-product-constitution.md**\n   - Core identity, principles, boundaries\n   - Three content types definition\n   - Voice-first design principles\n\n2. **02-scientific-foundations.md**\n   - Scientific backing and research\n   - Neuroplasticity, subconscious mind\n   - Voice prosody effects\n\n3. **03-conversational-system.md**\n   - Conversation flows\n   - Content types (affirmations, meditations, rituals)\n   - State machine\n\n4. **04-ai-voice-ethics.md**\n   - AI voice guidelines\n   - Ethical boundaries\n   - Privacy principles\n\n5. **05-system-architecture.md**\n   - Complete system architecture\n   - APIs, infrastructure\n   - Technology stack\n\n6. **06-value-economy.md**\n   - Credits system\n   - Tokens and economic model\n   - Pricing structure\n\n7. **07-roadmap.md**\n   - Product roadmap\n   - Milestones\n   - Development phases\n\n### Technical Reference\n\n- **database.md** - Database schema, tables, RLS policies\n- **flows.md** - User flows, ritual creation, affirmation flow\n- **system-spec.md** - Technical specifications\n- **system-audit.md** - Implementation status\n- **undocumented-features.md** - Implemented features catalog\n\n### Audio &amp; Features\n\n- **marketplace-platform.md** - Marketplace features\n- **voice-interaction-design.md** - Voice interaction patterns\n\n---\n\n## Using Context7\n\n**Recommended**: Use Context7 to query these docs",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 56
          }
        },
        "contents": "# Multi-Platform Strategy - waQup\n\n**Purpose**: Define strategy for mobile apps (iOS/Android) and web platform (desktop browsers) with Revolut-level quality standards\n\n---\n\n## Platform Overview\n\nwaQup will be available on **two platforms**, developed **simultaneously from scratch**:\n\n1. **Mobile Apps** (iOS &amp; Android) - React Native + Expo\n2. **Web Platform** (Desktop Browsers) - Next.js (Chrome-first, PWA support)\n\n**Development Strategy**: Both platforms developed in parallel, tested simultaneously, ensuring consistency and quality across all platforms from day one.\n\n**Note**: Desktop functionality is provided via the web platform (Next.js), which works on desktop browsers with PWA support for an app-like experience.\n\n---\n\n## Platform-Specific Behaviors &amp; Differences\n\n### 1. Mobile Apps (iOS &amp; Android)\n\n**Primary Use Case**: On-the-go practice, background audio, notifications\n\n**Key Behaviors**:\n- **Background Audio**: Audio continues playing when app is backgrounded\n- **Lock Screen Controls**: Media controls on lock screen\n- **Notifications**: Push notifications for practice reminders\n- **Offline Mode**: Download content for offline use\n- **Touch Gestures**: Swipe, pinch, tap interactions\n- **Native Feel**: Platform-specific UI patterns (iOS vs Material Design)\n- **App Store Distribution**: Native app store presence\n\n**Technical Stack**:\n- React Native + Expo SDK 54\n- Native modules for audio (expo-av)\n- Push notifications (expo-notifications)\n- Deep linking support\n\n**Quality Standards**:\n- **Performance**: &lt; 2s app launch, &lt; 300ms screen transitions\n- **Animations**: 60fps smooth animations (react-native-reanimated)\n- **Touch Response**: &lt; 100ms touch feedback\n- **Audio Latency**: &lt; 50ms audio start delay\n- **Battery**: Optimized background audio, minimal battery drain\n\n---\n\n### 2. Web Platform (Desktop Browsers)\n\n**Primary Use Case**: Desktop access, quick access, sharing, discovery, no installation required\n\n**Key Behaviors**:\n- **Progressive Web App (PWA)**: Installable as desktop app, offline support\n- **Desktop Optimized**: Full keyboard navigation, desktop screen sizes",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# Multi-Platform Strategy - waQup",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "**Purpose**: Define strategy for mobile apps (iOS/Android) and web platform (desktop browsers) with Revolut-level quality standards",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "## Platform Overview",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "waQup will be available on **two platforms**, developed **simultaneously from scratch**:",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **Mobile Apps** (iOS &amp; Android) - React Native + Expo",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **Web Platform** (Desktop Browsers) - Next.js (Chrome-first, PWA support)",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "**Development Strategy**: Both platforms developed in parallel, tested simultaneously, ensuring consistency and quality across all platforms from day one.",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "**Note**: Desktop functionality is provided via the web platform (Next.js), which works on desktop browsers with PWA support for an app-like experience.",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "## Platform-Specific Behaviors &amp; Differences",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1. Mobile Apps (iOS &amp; Android)",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "**Primary Use Case**: On-the-go practice, background audio, notifications",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "**Key Behaviors**:",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Background Audio**: Audio continues playing when app is backgrounded",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Lock Screen Controls**: Media controls on lock screen",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Notifications**: Push notifications for practice reminders",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Offline Mode**: Download content for offline use",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Touch Gestures**: Swipe, pinch, tap interactions",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Native Feel**: Platform-specific UI patterns (iOS vs Material Design)",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "- **App Store Distribution**: Native app store presence",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "**Technical Stack**:",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "- React Native + Expo SDK 54",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "- Native modules for audio (expo-av)",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "- Push notifications (expo-notifications)",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "- Deep linking support",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "**Quality Standards**:",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Performance**: &lt; 2s app launch, &lt; 300ms screen transitions",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Animations**: 60fps smooth animations (react-native-reanimated)",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Touch Response**: &lt; 100ms touch feedback",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Audio Latency**: &lt; 50ms audio start delay",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Battery**: Optimized background audio, minimal battery drain",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2. Web Platform (Desktop Browsers)",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "**Primary Use Case**: Desktop access, quick access, sharing, discovery, no installation required",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "**Key Behaviors**:",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Progressive Web App (PWA)**: Installable as desktop app, offline support",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Desktop Optimized**: Full keyboard navigation, desktop screen sizes",
            "lineNumber": 56
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.21511749923229218
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "contents": "export default function ShowcasePage() {\n&lt;/Typography&gt;\n              &lt;div\n                style={{\n                  width: '100%',\n                  height: '450px',\n                  marginBottom: spacing.md,\n                  borderRadius: borderRadius.lg,\n                  overflow: 'hidden',\n                  position: 'relative',\n                  background: colors.background.primary,\n                  border: &#96;1px solid ${colors.border.light}&#96;,\n                  boxShadow: &#96;0 2px 8px ${colors.mystical.glow}10&#96;,\n                }}\n              &gt;\n                &lt;SpeakingAnimation isSpeaking={isSpeaking} pageDuration={5000} /&gt;\n              &lt;/div&gt;\n              &lt;div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: spacing.sm, alignItems: 'center' }}&gt;\n                &lt;Button\n                  variant={isSpeaking ? 'secondary' : 'primary'}\n                  onClick={() =&gt; setIsSpeaking(!isSpeaking)}\n                  style={isSpeaking ? {} : { background: colors.gradients.primary }}\n                &gt;\n                  {isSpeaking ? 'Pause' : 'Play'}\n                &lt;/Button&gt;\n                &lt;Typography variant=\"small\" style={{ color: colors.text.tertiary, marginLeft: spacing.sm }}&gt;\n                  {isSpeaking ? 'Animations active' : 'Click to start'}\n                &lt;/Typography&gt;\n              &lt;/div&gt;\n            &lt;/Card&gt;\n          &lt;/Section&gt;\n\n          {/* UI Components - Cards */}\n          &lt;Section title=\"UI Components - Cards\" colors={colors}&gt;\n            &lt;Card\n              variant=\"default\"\n              style={{\n                marginBottom: spacing.md,\n                background: colors.glass.light,\n                backdropFilter: 'blur(10px)'\n}",

        "contents": "import { Button } from '@/components';\n\nexport default function AudioPlaybackPage() {\n  const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false);\n\n  const handleTogglePlayback = () =&gt; {\n    setIsPlaying(!isPlaying);\n    // Your audio playback logic here\n  };\n\n  return (\n    &lt;div style={{ padding: '2rem', maxWidth: '800px', margin: '0 auto' }}&gt;\n      &lt;div \n        style={{ \n          width: '100%', \n          height: '450px', \n          marginBottom: '2rem',\n          borderRadius: '16px',\n          overflow: 'hidden',\n          background: '#FAFAFA',\n          border: '1px solid #E0E0E0',\n        }}\n      &gt;\n        &lt;SpeakingAnimation \n          isSpeaking={isPlaying}\n          pageDuration={5000}\n        /&gt;\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n      \n      &lt;Button onClick={handleTogglePlayback}&gt;\n        {isPlaying ? 'Pause' : 'Play'}\n      &lt;/Button&gt;\n    &lt;/div&gt;\n  );\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 🎨 Visual Design\n\nThe component features:\n\n- **Clean Backgrounds** - Light, airy backgrounds with subtle gradients\n- **Glass-morphism** - Translucent elements with backdrop blur\n- **Minimal Animations** - Subtle, professional motion\n- **White Space** - Ample breathing room for clarity\n- **Refined Typography** - Clean, readable text\n- **Smooth Transitions** - Professional fade and slide effects\n\n### 🔧 Advanced: Real Frequency Data\n\nFor real-time audio frequency visualization, connect to Web Audio API:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;tsx\nimport { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { SpeakingAnimation } from '@/components';\n\nfunction AudioVisualizer({ audioUrl }: { audioUrl: string }) {\n  const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false);",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "import { Button } from '@/components';",

          },

            "text": "  const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false);",
            "lineNumber": 83

          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },

            "text": "  const handleTogglePlayback = () =&gt; {",
