          {
            "text": "          overflow: 'hidden',",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "          background: '#FAFAFA',",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "          border: '1px solid #E0E0E0',",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "        }}",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "      &gt;",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "        &lt;SpeakingAnimation ",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "          isSpeaking={isPlaying}",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "          pageDuration={5000}",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "        /&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "      &lt;/div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "      ",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "      &lt;Button onClick={handleTogglePlayback}&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "        {isPlaying ? 'Pause' : 'Play'}",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "      &lt;/Button&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "    &lt;/div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "  );",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "### 🎨 Visual Design",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "The component features:",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Clean Backgrounds** - Light, airy backgrounds with subtle gradients",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Glass-morphism** - Translucent elements with backdrop blur",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Minimal Animations** - Subtle, professional motion",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "- **White Space** - Ample breathing room for clarity",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Refined Typography** - Clean, readable text",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Smooth Transitions** - Professional fade and slide effects",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "### 🔧 Advanced: Real Frequency Data",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "For real-time audio frequency visualization, connect to Web Audio API:",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;tsx",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "import { SpeakingAnimation } from '@/components';",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "function AudioVisualizer({ audioUrl }: { audioUrl: string }) {",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "  const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false);",
            "lineNumber": 137
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.20960800349712372
    },

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/components/audio/README.md",
        "range": {

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 84
          }
        },
        "contents": "function AudioPlayer() {\n  const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false);\n  const [frequencyData, setFrequencyData] = useState&lt;number[]&gt;([]);\n\n  // Optional: Connect to real audio frequency data\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    if (isPlaying) {\n      // Your audio analysis code here\n      // setFrequencyData(analyzedFrequencies);\n    }\n  }, [isPlaying]);\n\n  return (\n    &lt;div style={{ width: '100%', height: '450px' }}&gt;\n      &lt;SpeakingAnimation \n        isSpeaking={isPlaying}\n        pageDuration={5000} // 5 seconds per page\n        frequencyData={frequencyData} // Optional: real frequency data\n      /&gt;\n    &lt;/div&gt;\n  );\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 🎛️ Props\n\n| Prop | Type | Default | Description |\n|------|------|---------|-------------|\n| &#96;isSpeaking&#96; | &#96;boolean&#96; | &#96;false&#96; | Whether audio is currently playing/speaking |\n| &#96;pageDuration&#96; | &#96;number&#96; | &#96;5000&#96; | Duration for each page transition in milliseconds |\n| &#96;className&#96; | &#96;string&#96; | &#96;''&#96; | Custom CSS class name |\n| &#96;style&#96; | &#96;React.CSSProperties&#96; | &#96;undefined&#96; | Custom inline styles |\n| &#96;frequencyData&#96; | &#96;number[]&#96; | &#96;undefined&#96; | Optional array of frequency values (0-1) for reactive visualization |\n\n### 🎯 Example Integration\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;tsx\n'use client';\n\nimport { useState } from 'react';\nimport { SpeakingAnimation } from '@/components';\nimport { Button } from '@/components';\n\nexport default function AudioPlaybackPage() {\n  const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false);",
        "signatures": {},

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/02-mobile/02-architecture.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 100

        },
        "contents": "# Architecture - waQup Mobile App\n\n**Status**: ✅ Defined | **Last Updated**: 2026-02-07\n\n## Overview\n\nMobile app architecture optimized for React Native + Expo, sharing Supabase backend with web app.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nMobile App (React Native)\n    ↓\nSupabase Backend (PostgreSQL, Auth, Storage, Realtime)\n    ↓\nExternal Services (ElevenLabs, OpenAI, Stripe)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## App Layers\n\n### 1. Presentation Layer\n**Screens** (&#96;src/screens/&#96;):\n- Auth (Login, Signup, ForgotPassword)\n- Main (Home, Library, Create, Profile)\n- Content (Detail screens, Creation flows)\n\n**Components** (&#96;src/components/&#96;):\n- UI primitives (Button, Input, Card)\n- Features (AudioPlayer, ContentCard)\n- Layouts (Header, TabBar)\n\n### 2. State Management\n**Global State** (Zustand - &#96;src/stores/&#96;):\n- Auth store (user, session)\n- UI store (modals, loading)\n- Preferences store\n\n**Server State** (React Query - &#96;src/hooks/&#96;):\n- Content queries\n- User profile\n- Practice sessions\n- Real-time subscriptions\n\n### 3. Service Layer\n**API Services** (&#96;src/services/&#96;):\n- Supabase client\n- Content API\n- Audio API\n- Payment API\n- Auth API\n\n**Storage** (&#96;src/services/storage/&#96;):\n- Audio upload/download\n- File management\n\n### 4. Navigation Layer\n**Structure** (&#96;src/navigation/&#96;):\n- RootNavigator (Auth vs Main)\n- AuthNavigator (Stack)\n- MainNavigator (Bottom Tabs)\n- ContentNavigator (Stack)\n\n---\n\n## Data Flow\n\n### Content Creation\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nUser Input → Validation → Service → Supabase → External API → Process → Update State → UI\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Audio Playback\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nUser Taps Play → Audio Service → Load from Storage → Play → Track Progress → Record Session\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## Key Decisions\n\n### Offline-First\n- Cache content locally (React Query)\n- Store audio files locally\n- Queue actions when offline\n- Sync when online\n\n### Real-Time Updates\n- Supabase Realtime subscriptions\n- Update React Query cache automatically\n- Live UI updates\n\n### Audio Handling\n- Background audio support\n- Handle interruptions gracefully\n- Cache audio files locally\n- Stream from CDN\n\n### Performance\n- Lazy load screens\n- Optimize images",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "**Structure** (&#96;src/navigation/&#96;):",

            "lineNumber": 68

      "codeBlock": {

        "contents": "# Implementation Guide - waQup Mobile App\n\n**Status**: 📝 Active | **Last Updated**: 2026-02-07\n\n## Quick Start\n\n1. **Follow Roadmap**: &#96;../../rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/01-roadmap.md&#96;\n2. **Update Changelog**: &#96;../../rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96; after each step\n3. **Reference This Guide**: For patterns and gotchas\n\n---\n\n## Essential Patterns\n\n### Supabase Connection\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\nimport { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';\nimport AsyncStorage from '@react-native-async-storage/async-storage';\n\nexport const supabase = createClient(\n  process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,\n  process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY!,\n  {\n    auth: {\n      storage: AsyncStorage,\n      autoRefreshToken: true,\n      persistSession: true,\n      detectSessionInUrl: false, // Important for mobile\n    },\n  }\n);\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Audio Playback (expo-av)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\nimport { Audio } from 'expo-av';\n\nconst { sound } = await Audio.Sound.createAsync(\n  { uri: audioUrl },\n  { shouldPlay: true }\n);\n\n// Background audio config in app.json\n{\n  \"expo\": {\n    \"plugins\": [[\"expo-av\", {\n      \"microphonePermission\": \"Allow waQup to access your microphone.\"\n    }]],\n    \"ios\": {\n      \"infoPlist\": {\n        \"UIBackgroundModes\": [\"audio\"]\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### React Query Hook\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\nconst { data, isLoading, error } = useQuery({\n  queryKey: ['content', contentId],\n  queryFn: () =&gt; getContent(contentId),\n  cacheTime: Infinity,\n  staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000, // 5 minutes\n});\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Zustand Store\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\nimport { create } from 'zustand';\n\ninterface AuthState {\n  user: User | null;\n  setUser: (user: User | null) =&gt; void;\n}\n\nconst useAuthStore = create&lt;AuthState&gt;((set) =&gt; ({\n  user: null,\n  setUser: (user) =&gt; set({ user }),\n}));\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Forms (react-hook-form + zod)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\nimport { useForm } from 'react-hook-form';\nimport { zodResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/zod';\nimport { z } from 'zod';\n\nconst schema = z.object({\n  email: z.string().email(),\n  password: z.string().min(8),\n});",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# Implementation Guide - waQup Mobile App",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "**Status**: 📝 Active | **Last Updated**: 2026-02-07",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "## Quick Start",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **Follow Roadmap**: &#96;../../rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/01-roadmap.md&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **Update Changelog**: &#96;../../rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96; after each step",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **Reference This Guide**: For patterns and gotchas",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "## Essential Patterns",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "### Supabase Connection",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "import AsyncStorage from '@react-native-async-storage/async-storage';",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "export const supabase = createClient(",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "  process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY!,",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "  {",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "    auth: {",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "      storage: AsyncStorage,",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "      autoRefreshToken: true,",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "      persistSession: true,",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "      detectSessionInUrl: false, // Important for mobile",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "    },",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": ");",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "### Audio Playback (expo-av)",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "import { Audio } from 'expo-av';",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "const { sound } = await Audio.Sound.createAsync(",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "  { uri: audioUrl },",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "  { shouldPlay: true }",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": ");",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "// Background audio config in app.json",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "{",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"expo\": {",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"plugins\": [[\"expo-av\", {",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "      \"microphonePermission\": \"Allow waQup to access your microphone.\"",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "    }]],",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"ios\": {",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "      \"infoPlist\": {",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"UIBackgroundModes\": [\"audio\"]",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "### React Query Hook",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "const { data, isLoading, error } = useQuery({",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "  queryKey: ['content', contentId],",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "  queryFn: () =&gt; getContent(contentId),",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "  cacheTime: Infinity,",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "  staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000, // 5 minutes",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "});",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "### Zustand Store",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "import { create } from 'zustand';",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "interface AuthState {",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "  user: User | null;",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "  setUser: (user: User | null) =&gt; void;",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "const useAuthStore = create&lt;AuthState&gt;((set) =&gt; ({",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "  user: null,",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "  setUser: (user) =&gt; set({ user }),",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "}));",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "### Forms (react-hook-form + zod)",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form';",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "import { zodResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/zod';",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "import { z } from 'zod';",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "const schema = z.object({",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "  email: z.string().email(),",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "  password: z.string().min(8),",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "});",
            "lineNumber": 92
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.20101666450500488
    },

        "contents": "**Tracking** (&#96;03-tracking/&#96;):\n- &#96;01-changelog.md&#96; - Step completion tracking, updates, status\n- &#96;02-analysis-template.md&#96; - Template for creating phase analysis documents\n- &#96;03-step-tracking.md&#96; - Template for tracking individual steps\n\n### Using Context7 for Documentation\n\n**ALWAYS use Context7 when you need documentation information:**\n\n1. **For Product Understanding**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"What are the three content types in waQup and how do they differ?\"\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n2. **For Scientific Backing**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"What is the scientific foundation for voice-first design?\"\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n3. **For Technical Architecture**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"How does the conversation system work?\"\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/03-conversational-system.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n4. **For Database Schema**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"What is the database schema for content items?\"\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/database.md\n   OR\n   Reference: rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/02-schema-verification.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n5. **For Audio Generation**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"How does ElevenLabs voice cloning work?\"\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/audio-generation.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n6. **For Technology Stack**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"What is the finalized tech stack for mobile?\"\n   Reference: docs/02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n7. **For Implementation Details**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"What are the implementation patterns for React Native?\"\n   Reference: docs/02-mobile/03-implementation.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n8. **For Architecture**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"What is the mobile app architecture?\"\n   Reference: docs/02-mobile/02-architecture.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Context7 Usage Pattern**:\n- **Before implementing**: Query relevant docs using Context7\n- **When stuck**: Use Context7 to find answers in docs\n- **When verifying**: Use Context7 to check requirements\n- **When documenting**: Use Context7 to reference existing patterns",

        "contents": "10. **Scientific Foundations**: &#96;../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md&#96; - Research backing\n11. **System Architecture**: &#96;../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&#96; - Full architecture\n12. **Database**: &#96;../../docs/internal/database.md&#96; - Complete schema\n13. **User Flows**: &#96;../../docs/internal/flows.md&#96; - User journeys\n14. **Audio Generation**: &#96;../../docs/internal/audio-generation.md&#96; - Voice cloning, TTS\n15. **Conversational System**: &#96;../../docs/internal/03-conversational-system.md&#96; - Conversation flows\n16. **All Other Docs**: &#96;../../docs/internal/&#96; - Complete reference (20+ files)\n\n**Use Context7 to query these docs when needed!**\n\n---\n\n## When in Doubt - Use Context7 First\n\n### Documentation Lookup Strategy\n\n1. **Use Context7 to query docs** - Fastest way to find information\n   - Query: \"What does [topic] say about [specific question]?\"\n   - Reference the relevant doc from the list above\n   \n2. **Check mobile docs** - &#96;docs/02-mobile/&#96; folder\n   - &#96;01-technology-stack.md&#96; - Tech decisions\n   - &#96;02-architecture.md&#96; - Architecture\n   - &#96;03-implementation.md&#96; - Implementation guide\n\n3. **Check roadmap** - &#96;rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/01-roadmap.md&#96;\n   - Overall plan and phases\n   - Step-by-step guide\n\n4. **Check changelog** - &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;\n   - What's been done\n   - Current status\n\n5. **Check phase analysis** - &#96;rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/&#96;\n   - Detailed steps for each phase\n\n6. **Use Context7 for main docs** - &#96;../../docs/internal/&#96;\n   - Product constitution\n   - Scientific foundations\n   - System architecture\n   - Database schema\n   - User flows\n   - Audio generation\n   - All other internal docs (20+ files)\n\n### Context7 Query Examples\n\n**For Product Questions**:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nUse Context7: \"What are the core principles of waQup?\"\nReference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**For Technical Questions**:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nUse Context7: \"How does the Supabase integration work?\"\nReference: ../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md\n&#96;&#96;&#96;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "10. **Scientific Foundations**: &#96;../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md&#96; - Research backing",
            "lineNumber": 1204
          },
          {
            "text": "11. **System Architecture**: &#96;../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&#96; - Full architecture",
            "lineNumber": 1205
          },
          {
            "text": "12. **Database**: &#96;../../docs/internal/database.md&#96; - Complete schema",
            "lineNumber": 1206
          },
          {
            "text": "13. **User Flows**: &#96;../../docs/internal/flows.md&#96; - User journeys",
            "lineNumber": 1207
          },
          {
            "text": "14. **Audio Generation**: &#96;../../docs/internal/audio-generation.md&#96; - Voice cloning, TTS",
            "lineNumber": 1208
          },
          {
            "text": "15. **Conversational System**: &#96;../../docs/internal/03-conversational-system.md&#96; - Conversation flows",
            "lineNumber": 1209
          },
          {
            "text": "16. **All Other Docs**: &#96;../../docs/internal/&#96; - Complete reference (20+ files)",
            "lineNumber": 1210
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1211
          },
          {
            "text": "**Use Context7 to query these docs when needed!**",
            "lineNumber": 1212
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1213
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 1214
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1215
          },
          {
            "text": "## When in Doubt - Use Context7 First",
            "lineNumber": 1216
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1217
          },
          {
            "text": "### Documentation Lookup Strategy",
            "lineNumber": 1218
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1219
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **Use Context7 to query docs** - Fastest way to find information",
            "lineNumber": 1220
          },
          {
            "text": "   - Query: \"What does [topic] say about [specific question]?\"",
            "lineNumber": 1221
          },
          {
            "text": "   - Reference the relevant doc from the list above",
            "lineNumber": 1222
          },
          {
            "text": "   ",
            "lineNumber": 1223
          },

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 1230
          },
          {
            "text": "   - Step-by-step guide",
            "lineNumber": 1231
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1232
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **Check changelog** - &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;",

          },
          {

          },

          },

Summary of what’s in place:

---

## 1. **Comparison doc** — `docs/04-reference/04-pages-comparison.md`

Single place that:

- **Intended pages** – Lists what the roadmap and main-product docs (e.g. `flows.md`, `03-conversational-system.md`, `voice-interaction-design.md`, `marketplace-platform.md`) say should exist. Those live under `../../docs/internal/`; the doc says to use **Context7** to query them and summarizes the result.
- **Current app pages** – What exists today under `packages/web/app/`.
- **Gap analysis** – Tables for:
  - **Missing (to create)**
  - **To change / clarify**
  - **To delete** (none required)
  - **Already aligned**

It explicitly covers:

- **UI/speak – orb that speaks** → Missing. Add a speak/orb experience (e.g. `/speak` or global) + conversation UI (Phase 9 + voice-interaction-design).
- **Marketplace** → Missing. Phase 14: discovery, creator dashboard, verification, etc.
- **Three pipelines** → Entry points exist; missing full **conversational** flow and meditations list/detail/edit; creation should be “conversation over forms”.
- **Edit sound/etc in pipelines** → Missing. Add an edit-audio/script step or screen in (or after) each creation pipeline.

Other gaps called out: affirmation detail & edit; meditation list, detail, edit; conversation UI/state machine as single source for creation.

---

## 2. **All Pages index** — `/pages` in the app

Updated so the app’s page list matches the comparison:

- **To create** (new entries, status `to_create`):
  - **Voice & conversation:** `/speak`, `/create/conversation`, edit-audio for affirmations/rituals/meditations (`/sanctuary/.../[id]/edit-audio`).
  - **Affirmations:** detail and edit (`/sanctuary/affirmations/[id]`, `.../edit`).
  - **Meditations:** list, detail, edit (`/sanctuary/meditations`, `.../[id]`, `.../[id]/edit`).
  - **Marketplace:** `/marketplace`, `/marketplace/creator`.
- **To change** (existing routes, status `to_change` + note):
  - `/home` and `/sanctuary`: note to clarify relationship (roadmap: “Home (Sanctuary)”).
  - The three **create** routes (affirmations, rituals, meditations): note “Make conversational (orb/speak)”.

So in one place you have:

- **Docs:** `docs/04-reference/04-pages-comparison.md` – full reasoning and references.
- **App:** `/pages` – live list of all routes with status (exists / to create / to change) and short notes.

---

## 3. **Context7 note**

The **main product docs** (flows, conversational system, voice interaction, marketplace) are in the **parent project** at `../../docs/internal/`. This repo’s `docs/01-core/README.md` points to them and says to use **Context7** to query. I couldn’t run Context7 from here; the comparison doc is written so that when you (or someone) runs Context7 against `docs/internal/`, the structure and intent match. If something in `docs/internal/` contradicts the comparison, that doc is the place to update after you run Context7.

---

**Next step:** Use the comparison doc to decide priorities (e.g. speak/orb, conversation creation, edit-audio, meditations list/detail, marketplace), then add/remove/change routes and keep both the comparison doc and the `/pages` index updated as you go.

---


Your repo is already set up and in sync:

- **Remote**: `origin` is **https://github.com/InnerFlect-Tech/waqup-new** (fetch and push).
- **Branch**: `main` is **up to date with `origin/main`** — the last push (commit `09e2381`) is already on GitHub.

The only uncommitted changes are build artifacts (`.next/`, `tsconfig.tsbuildinfo`), which are normally not committed.

When you have new commits to push, use:

```bash
git add -A
git restore --staged packages/web/.next/ packages/web/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo   # leave build artifacts unstaged
git commit -m "Your message"
git push origin main
```

Or in Cursor: **Source Control** → stage/commit → **Push**, and it will use the same `origin` and your GitHub auth.

---


Summary of changes:

**1. Split by auth**
- **Without auth (public)**  
  Landing & marketing, Auth, Onboarding, Utility (showcase, pages, sitemap-view).
- **With auth (protected)**  
  Main (home, library, create, profile), Sanctuary, Affirmations, Rituals, Meditations, Voice & conversation, Marketplace.

**2. Exceptions callout**
- One short note at the top: public = everything under “Without auth”; protected = only routes under `/home`, `/library`, `/create`, `/profile`, `/sanctuary`.  
- It explicitly says: *`/pages`*, *`/showcase`*, *`/sitemap-view`* and *`/onboarding/*`* are public on purpose (dev/testing or first-time flow).

**3. Layout and card size**
- **Max width** of the content block set to **720px** (no full-width stretch).
- **Route cards** use less padding (`spacing.sm`), smaller type (path 13px, description 12px, note 11px), and **grid layout** `repeat(auto-fill, minmax(240px, 1fr))` so cards sit in a compact grid and each card is a smaller “square” instead of full-width rows.

**4. Grouping**
- “Affirmations (missing detail/edit)” and “Useful Links” are folded into the main Affirmations/Rituals/Meditations and “Utility (public by exception)” so the list is shorter and clearer.

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

/speak - at app root. So app/speak/page.tsx. But (main) layout has home, library, create, profile - so routes under (main) are /home, /library, /create, /profile. So /speak would need to be either app/speak/page.tsx (root level, no (main) wrapper) or inside (main) as app/(main)/speak/page.tsx -> /speak. In Next.js, (main) is a route group so (main)/speak would be /speak. So I need app/(main)/speak/page.tsx for /speak to get the authenticated layout, or app/speak/page.tsx for a root-level route. AuthProvider: isProtectedRoute is pathname.startsWith('/home') etc - /speak is not in the list so it would be "unknown" and redirect to login if !user. So /speak should probably be protected (user must be logged in to speak). So put it under (main) so it gets the main layout and is under the same nav: app/(main)/speak/page.tsx -> /speak. That way the header shows and it's clearly part of the app. Actually re-read: pathname.startsWith('/sanctuary') is protected. So if we use app/speak/page.tsx we get /speak. For /speak to be protected we'd need to add pathname.startsWith('/speak') to isProtectedRoute. I'll create app/(main)/speak/page.tsx so the URL is /speak and it uses the main layout. Wait - (main) group doesn't add a segment, so (main)/speak/page.tsx is indeed /speak. Good.

/create/conversation - (main)/create/conversation/page.tsx -> /create/conversation. Good.

/marketplace and /marketplace/creator - need to be under app. So app/marketplace/page.tsx and app/marketplace/creator/page.tsx. They're not under (main) so they won't get the main layout. We could put them under (main) as (main)/marketplace/page.tsx so they get the auth header. I'll do app/(main)/marketplace/page.tsx and app/(main)/marketplace/creator/page.tsx so /marketplace and /marketplace/creator get the main layout. But then we need to add pathname.startsWith('/marketplace') to isProtectedRoute in AuthProvider. Let me check - if we don't add it, then /marketplace would be considered neither public nor protected, so the else branch would run: if !user, redirect to login. So actually we need to add /marketplace to protected routes for the redirect to work correctly. Let me check the logic again. isProtectedRoute = pathname.startsWith('/home') || ... If /marketplace is not in the list, isProtectedRoute is false. isPublicRoute = publicRoutes.includes(pathname) || pathname.startsWith('/showcase') || pathname.startsWith('/onboarding'). So /marketplace is not public. So we hit: else if (!isPublicRoute && !isProtectedRoute && pathname !== '/') { if (!user) router.push('/login'); }. So unauthenticated users going to /marketplace would be redirected to login. So we don't have to add /marketplace to isProtectedRoute for that; the "unknown" route logic already sends them to login. So we can create app/marketplace/page.tsx at root (no (main)) and it will still redirect to login when !user. But then the page won't have the main layout (header). So for consistency I'll put marketplace under (main): (main)/marketplace/page.tsx and (main)/marketplace/creator/page.tsx. Then we need to add pathname.startsWith('/marketplace') to isProtectedRoute so that the first branch (isProtectedRoute && !user -> redirect to login) runs. Otherwise the second branch runs and redirects too, so it's the same. Actually if we don't add it to isProtectedRoute, the second branch still redirects. So the only difference is whether we want the header. Let me put (main)/marketplace so the header shows.
</details></think>

Summary of what was added and updated:

**New stub pages (all use `PlaceholderPage`):**

| Route | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `/sanctuary/affirmations/[id]` | Affirmation detail (Phase 5.2); links to edit and edit-audio |
| `/sanctuary/affirmations/[id]/edit` | Edit affirmation |
| `/sanctuary/affirmations/[id]/edit-audio` | Edit sound/script for affirmation |
| `/sanctuary/rituals/[id]/edit-audio` | Edit sound/script for ritual |
| `/sanctuary/meditations` | Meditations list; link to create |
| `/sanctuary/meditations/[id]` | Meditation detail; links to edit and edit-audio |
| `/sanctuary/meditations/[id]/edit` | Edit meditation |
| `/sanctuary/meditations/[id]/edit-audio` | Edit sound/script for meditation |
| `/speak` | Orb that speaks (Phase 9) |
| `/create/conversation` | Conversational creation |
| `/marketplace` | Marketplace discovery (Phase 14.1); link to creator |
| `/marketplace/creator` | Creator dashboard (Phase 14.2) |

**Other updates:**
- **AuthProvider**: `/speak` and `/marketplace` are now protected (redirect to login when not authenticated).
- **Pages index** (`/pages`): All of the above are marked as **Exists** with note “Stub” where relevant.
- **Sitemap**: Added `/sanctuary/meditations`, `/speak`, `/create/conversation`, `/marketplace`, `/marketplace/creator`.

Stubs live under the right layouts: sanctuary routes use the sanctuary layout, and `/speak`, `/create/conversation`, and `/marketplace` use the main (authenticated) layout.
